Both of these are required to play %1!s! and although you can continue to play the game by pressing OK, please note that it is not officially supported and may result in crashes, lockups, and poor performance.

english: CHAPTER 4. A Spy in H.A.R.M.'s Way
CHAPTER 6. Diary of a Double Agent

zh: 测试 测试 测试 测试
沃尔科夫的巢穴（2-4名玩家）

english: The house where Melvin used to live.
zh: 梅尔文以前住过的房子

english: The Devil and the deep blue sea.
I think we should presume she's failed.
zh: 我认为我们应该假定她已经失败了

english: UNITY has sent Cate Archer to Japan to investigate a rumored international crime convention expected to take place in the pastoral village of Inotakimura. Her objective is to photograph the meeting's participants without arousing their suspicion.\n\nHer first task will be to locate agent Isamu Hatori, who will provide further information on her assignment. He's waiting somewhere in the village.
zh: UNITY派凯特·阿彻前往日本，调查一场据传将在田园村庄稻泷村举行的国际犯罪大会。她的目标是在不引起与会者怀疑的情况下，拍下他们的照片。\n\n她的首要任务是找到特工羽鸟勇，他将提供这次任务的进一步情报。他正在村里的某处等候。

english: The meeting is scheduled to take place at the estate of an enigmatic figure known only as The Director. Cate will have to infiltrate the estate grounds, locate the main house, and find the window Hatori-san indicated on the map. This vantage should allow her to take the photographs she needs without exposing herself to unnecessary risk.\n\nOnce she's obtained the photos, she must return to the bridge where Yamata-san is waiting. A UNITY intercept team is standing by to evacuate her to Tokyo when the mission is complete.
zh: 会议预定在一位仅以“局长”为人所知的神秘人物宅邸中举行。凯特必须潜入宅邸范围，找到主宅，并寻找羽鸟先生在地图上标出的那扇窗户。从那里观察，应该能让她在无风险的情况下拍到所需照片。\n\n取得照片后，她必须返回山田先生等候的桥边。任务完成后，一支UNITY拦截小队会在那里接应，并将她撤往东京。

english:
Spy plane photographs show a run-down, understaffed military base, but Mr. Barnes warns that this decrepitude is likely a ruse. Although the Americans often greatly overestimate Soviet military capacity, UNITY isn't taking any chances.

The first phase of Cate's mission is to facilitate her own escape. A little sabotage should go a long way toward preventing reinforcements from being called in.

Santa has enlisted a pilot who is familiar with the region to get Cate in and out. She must protect him at all costs.
zh:
间谍飞机拍摄的照片显示，这是一座年久失修、人员不足的军事基地，但巴恩斯先生警告说，这种破败景象很可能只是伪装。尽管美国人经常严重高估苏联的军事实力，但UNITY仍不打算冒任何风险。

凯特任务的第一阶段，是为自己的撤离创造条件。进行一些破坏，应该能有效阻止敌方呼叫增援。

圣诞老人找来了一名熟悉当地情况的飞行员，负责接送凯特。她必须不惜一切代价保护他。

english: After analyzing the Americans' intelligence data, UNITY is convinced that Project: Omega is headquartered in the Main Records Building at the center of the compound. Security will be tight, so it won't be easy for Cate to reach the target site, let alone get inside and recover the data she requires.\n\nFortunately, she's going in under the cover of night, which should afford some small advantage.
zh: 分析完美国方面的情报数据后，UNITY确信欧米伽计划的核心位于基地中央的主档案大楼。那里戒备森严，凯特想接近目标地点已非易事，更别说进入内部并取得所需数据了。\n\n幸运的是，她将在夜色掩护下潜入，这多少能给她带来一点优势。

english: Now that Cate has recovered information on Project: Omega, she faces the even greater challenge of getting it out of the Soviet Union. To complicate matters further, both the Russians and H.A.R.M. are hunting for her.\n\nShe'll have to cross her fingers and hope that her meticulous preparations pay off. The night is about to light up.
zh: 凯特虽然已经取得了欧米伽计划的情报，却还面临着更艰巨的挑战：如何将情报带出苏联。更麻烦的是，苏联人和H.A.R.M.都在追捕她。\n\n她只能祈祷自己周密的准备能够奏效。今夜即将火光冲天。

english: Without any other compelling leads to follow, Cate heads to Akron, Ohio to search for clues at the former residence of the notorious Melvin Blitzny. Blitzny, a vacuum cleaner salesman by trade, had been groomed to assume the identity of UNITY operative Tom Goodman as part of H.A.R.M.'s last despicable plot. He met his end at the hands of his own mentor.\n\nWhatever trepidation Cate may feel at entering the domain of this treacherous man must be set aside if she is to achieve her goal.
zh: 由于没有其他更有价值的线索可供追查，凯特前往俄亥俄州阿克伦，在臭名昭著的梅尔文·布利茨尼故居搜寻线索。布利茨尼原本是一名吸尘器推销员。为了实施上一场卑劣的阴谋，H.A.R.M.将他培养成UNITY特工汤姆·古德曼的替身，准备让他冒用古德曼的身份，最终他却死在了自己导师手中。\n\n无论进入这个奸诈之人的住所让凯特感到多么不安，为了达成目标，她都必须抛开顾虑。

english: Magnus Armstrong has contacted his old friend Kamal, a disillusioned H.A.R.M. operative in India who promises his assistance. While Kamal isn't familiar with Project: Omega, he's certain any pertinent information can be found in the central vault at the Indian headquarters.\n\nBruno has concluded that a direct infiltration of the compound is too risky given the intense security Cate would likely face. Therefore, Kamal will help her accomplish perhaps her strangest objective thus far: to get a job with H.A.R.M. Once hired, she'll have the security clearance necessary to move about the compound freely.
zh: 马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗联系了自己的老朋友卡马尔。卡马尔是一名对H.A.R.M.心灰意冷的印度特工，并承诺提供协助。虽然他不了解欧米伽计划，但他确信，所有相关情报都能在印度总部的中央金库中找到。\n\n布鲁诺认为，考虑到凯特可能面对的严密安保，直接潜入总部的风险太大。因此，卡马尔会帮助她完成迄今为止或许最离奇的目标：设法进入H.A.R.M.工作。一旦被录用，她就能获得所需的安全权限，在总部内自由活动。

english: Having proven her value to H.A.R.M., Cate has secured a job with the very organization she has vowed to destroy. A higher security clearance should help her get close to the prize: the main vault. There she hopes to find the missing piece of the puzzle.\n\nUnfortunately, the vault is off limits to all but the highest ranking H.A.R.M. employees, so the biggest challenge still lies ahead. If only she could have unearthed better intelligence about the security countermeasures she must face.
zh: 凯特向H.A.R.M.证明了自己的价值，成功进入了这个她发誓要摧毁的组织。更高级别的安全权限，应该能帮助她接近真正的目标——主金库。她希望能在那里找到拼图中缺失的最后一块。\n\n遗憾的是，只有H.A.R.M.最高级别的员工才有权进入金库，因此最严峻的挑战仍在前方。要是她能提前获得更多关于安保措施的情报就好了。

english: The trail of clues has led Cate and Armstrong to a secret facility in Antarctica where H.A.R.M. is conducting Project: Omega. Once they discover its actual nature, they can plot a means of disrupting it.\n\nAssuming they don't strangle each other first.
zh: 线索将凯特和阿姆斯特朗引向了南极洲的一处秘密设施，H.A.R.M.正在那里实施欧米伽计划。只要查明计划的真正内容，他们就能设法将其破坏。\n\n前提是两人不会先掐死对方。

english: Because of Cate's success in India, The Director has ordered the destruction of H.A.R.M.'s Indian headquarters as punishment. The attack will provide an ideal field test for the super soldiers before they are sent to Khios on their primary mission.\n\nAlthough Cate has recovered vital information on Project: Omega, she has decided to proceed directly to India in hopes of averting the tragedy that is likely to unfold once the assault begins.
zh: 由于凯特在印度取得成功，局长下令摧毁H.A.R.M.印度总部，以示惩罚。在将超级士兵派往希俄斯执行主要任务前，这次袭击正好可以作为一次理想的实战测试。\n\n尽管凯特已经取得了关于欧米伽计划的重要情报，她仍决定立即赶往印度，希望能在进攻开始、悲剧发生之前阻止这一切。

english:
With the technical specifications she recovered from the Antarctic facility, Cate feels confident that Doctor Schenker can come up with a means of combating the super soldiers.

Meanwhile, the news that Armstrong is alive and in the custody of H.A.R.M. has given her a clear sense of purpose. She must find out where he is and devise a plan to rescue him.
zh:
凭借从南极设施取回的技术资料，凯特相信申克博士能够找出对付超级士兵的方法。

与此同时，阿姆斯特朗尚在人世且被H.A.R.M.俘虏的消息，也让她有了明确目标。她必须查明他的下落，并制订营救计划。

english: Cate has snuck aboard H.A.R.M.'s top secret underwater base in an effort to rescue Magnus Armstrong from certain death. Her first task will be to locate him. Information on his whereabouts should be stored in the supercomputer.\n\nOnce Armstrong is free, the two of them will have to improvise an escape route, as Cate's shark mini-sub only seats one.
zh: 为了从必死的命运中救出马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗，凯特偷偷潜入了H.A.R.M.的绝密水下基地。她的首要任务是找到他，超级计算机中应该保存着有关他下落的情报。\n\n救出阿姆斯特朗后，两人还得临时想办法逃离，因为凯特的鲨鱼迷你潜艇只能乘坐一人。

english: With the underwater base collapsing around them and a rogue super soldier on the loose, Cate and Armstrong must work together to escape from this watery grave.\n\nAssuming they can even find a way off the base, they'll still have to contend with well armed and equally desperate H.A.R.M. personnel fighting for their own lives.
zh: 水下基地正在他们周围坍塌，还有一名失控的超级士兵四处游荡。凯特和阿姆斯特朗必须协力逃出这座水下坟墓。\n\n即使他们真能找到离开基地的办法，还得应付那些全副武装、同样为保命而拼死战斗的H.A.R.M.人员。

english:
After falling into the hands of H.A.R.M., Cate finds herself in a needlessly elaborate but nonetheless perilous death trap. She'll need quick reflexes and extraordinary judgment to emerge unscathed.

Meanwhile, the situation in the Sea of Marmara is getting bleaker by the hour. If she's going to derail H.A.R.M.'s nefarious machinations, she'd better do it quickly.
zh:
落入H.A.R.M.手中后，凯特被困进了一套毫无必要地复杂、却依然致命的死亡机关。她必须依靠迅捷反应和非凡判断力，才能毫发无伤地逃出生天。

与此同时，马尔马拉海的局势每小时都在恶化。若想挫败H.A.R.M.的邪恶阴谋，她最好赶快行动。

english: The world teeters on the brink of nuclear catastrophe, with the United States and Soviet Union closer to war than at any time since the Cuban Missile Crisis. Again, the fate of humanity hinges upon the sovereignty of a tiny island nation. \n\nH.A.R.M.'s super soldiers are en route to Khios aboard an undetectable submarine designed to bypass the inevitable NATO blockade. The Americans can't send in troops to defend the island without provoking the Soviets, and yet the Soviets are claiming they are powerless to stop the invasion. Both sides are locked in a deadly standoff, but it is H.A.R.M.'s finger on the trigger.
zh: 世界正处于核灾难的边缘，美国与苏联之间的战争风险达到了古巴导弹危机以来的最高点。人类的命运再一次取决于一个小小岛国的主权。\n\nH.A.R.M.的超级士兵正搭乘一艘无法探测、专为突破北约封锁而设计的潜艇前往希俄斯。美国若派兵保卫该岛，就会激怒苏联；苏联却声称自己无力阻止入侵。双方陷入了致命僵局，而扣在扳机上的却是H.A.R.M.的手指。

english: Cate has snuck aboard H.A.R.M.'s top secret underwater base for reasons we don't want to disclose in this demo for fear of spoiling surprises should you decide to play the game. Suffice to say she has a mission to accomplish and the portion of it you are about to sample is merely the introduction.
zh: 凯特出于我们不愿在试玩版中透露的原因，偷偷潜入了H.A.R.M.的绝密水下基地，以免你决定游玩正式版时被提前剧透。总之，她有一项任务需要完成，而你即将体验的部分只不过是序幕。

english:
A routine mission has gone disastrously awry and now Cate Archer is in serious trouble. She's probably halfway to the rendezvous point by now with ninjas swarming after her.

The UNITY intercept team that was to evacuate her to Tokyo must now rush to her aid. The objective is simple: get Cate out of there in one piece.
zh:
一次例行任务演变成了灾难，如今凯特·阿彻身陷险境。此刻她大概已经走到会合点的一半，身后则有大批忍者蜂拥追赶。

原本负责将她撤往东京的UNITY拦截小队，现在必须火速前去支援。目标很简单：让凯特完好无损地离开那里。

english:
Cate has managed to escape from a remote Soviet military base with crucial information on Project: Omega. She obtained this data from a super computer that appears to have been supplied and monitored by H.A.R.M.

A UNITY intercept team has been sent in to mop up. The team's primary objective is to put that computer out of commission once and for all.

The team is being airdropped inside the base perimeter and will rally at a small hunting cabin near the compound itself.
zh:
凯特成功逃离了一座偏远的苏联军事基地，并带回了关于欧米伽计划的关键情报。她从一台显然由H.A.R.M.提供并监控的超级计算机中取得了这些资料。

UNITY已派出一支拦截小队负责善后。小队的首要目标，是彻底摧毁那台计算机。

队员将被空投到基地范围内，并在设施附近的一座小型狩猎木屋集合。

english:
Cate is currently en route to Calcutta, where she will attempt to infiltrate H.A.R.M.'s Indian headquarters to learn more about Project: Omega.

A UNITY intercept team is already on site to gather intelligence to facilitate her mission. They will need to locate and photograph a known H.A.R.M. employee by the name of Balaji Malpani.
zh:
凯特目前正在前往加尔各答，准备潜入H.A.R.M.的印度总部，以进一步调查欧米伽计划。

一支UNITY拦截小队已经抵达当地，为她的任务搜集情报。他们需要找到并拍摄一名已知的H.A.R.M.雇员——巴拉吉·马尔帕尼。

english:
Cate has radioed in with disturbing news. Magnus Armstrong is trapped in Antarctica with H.A.R.M. reinforcements closing in and some sort of indestructible super soldier on the loose.

A UNITY intercept team is being sent in to rescue Armstrong and demolish the site to prevent further work on Project: Omega.
zh:
凯特通过无线电传来了令人不安的消息。马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗被困在南极，H.A.R.M.援军正在逼近，而且还有某种刀枪不入的超级士兵四处游荡。

UNITY正派出一支拦截小队营救阿姆斯特朗，并摧毁该设施，以阻止欧米伽计划的后续研究。

english:
Shortly after Cate fought off a devastating attack on UNITY headquarters by a pack of machinegun-toting mimes, she departs on a mission to rescue Armstrong from the clutches of H.A.R.M.

Unfortunately, it seems the mime infestation wasn't completely addressed. The assassins have launched a new attack, apparently determined to inflict as much damage as possible on UNITY.

With Cate gone, it will be up to a lone intercept team to deal with the crisis.
zh:
凯特刚刚击退一群手持机枪的哑剧演员对UNITY总部发动的毁灭性袭击，便启程执行任务，从H.A.R.M.手中营救阿姆斯特朗。

遗憾的是，哑剧演员的问题似乎并未得到彻底解决。那些杀手发动了新一轮袭击，显然决心尽可能重创UNITY。

凯特不在，只能由一支孤立无援的拦截小队处理这场危机。

english: During a dangerous mission deep inside the Soviet Union, Cate receives orders to sabotage a communications relay tower at a remote Siberian outpost. Her first goal is to procure the explosives she'll need to carry out her mission. Then it's just a matter of setting the charge at the base of the tower and getting out of the area before reinforcements arrive.\n\nTips: Just because you're spotted doesn't mean you have to fight. You can often evade pursuers and hide from them until they give up. Also, be sure to search filing cabinets, desk drawers, and neutralized enemies for valuable information and useful items.
zh: 在深入苏联境内执行危险任务期间，凯特接到命令，要破坏一座偏远西伯利亚前哨站的通信中继塔。她首先必须取得完成任务所需的炸药。之后只需把炸药安放在塔基处，并在援军抵达前撤离。\n\n提示：被敌人发现并不意味着你非得交战。你通常可以甩开追兵并躲藏起来，直到他们放弃搜索。另外，务必搜查文件柜、书桌抽屉和被解决的敌人，以寻找宝贵情报和有用物品。

english: Cate has come to Akron, Ohio, in search of clues relating to Project: Omega, an enigmatic Soviet plot that threatens to bring about World War III.\n\nWhen her mission takes a sudden turn for the unexpected, she finds herself in a trailer park with ninja assassins all around and a tornado closing in. Her only hope of escape is to defeat the ninjas and their mysterious leader, Isako, before she ends up somewhere over the rainbow or six feet deep.
zh: 凯特来到俄亥俄州阿克伦，寻找与欧米伽计划有关的线索。这项神秘的苏联阴谋可能引发第三次世界大战。\n\n任务突然发生意外，她发现自己身处拖车公园，周围全是忍者杀手，一场龙卷风也正逼近。她唯一的逃生希望，就是在自己被卷上彩虹彼端或埋进六尺之下以前，击败忍者及其神秘首领伊沙子。

english: This level demonstrates the LithTech Jupiter System's new water support as well as the use of decals.
zh: 本关展示了LithTech Jupiter系统新增的水体支持及贴花效果。

english: This level showcases a few of the new characters from No One Lives Forever 2.
zh: 本关展示了《无人永生2》中的几位新角色。

english: Cate travels to Japan to investigate a rumored international crime convention.
zh: 凯特前往日本，调查传闻中的国际犯罪大会。

english: Cate must infiltrate the estate of The Director and photograph him.
zh: 凯特必须潜入局长的宅邸并拍摄他的照片。

english: Cate heads for Siberia to investigate Project: Omega. Her first task is to prepare for her escape.
zh: 凯特前往西伯利亚调查欧米伽计划。她的首要任务是为逃脱做好准备。

english: After nightfall, Cate sneaks into the military base to find the Main Records Building.
zh: 入夜后，凯特潜入军事基地，寻找主档案大楼。

english: Her mission complete, Cate must escape the compound alive.
zh: 任务完成后，凯特必须活着逃出基地。

english: Cate goes to Akron, Ohio to search for clues in the house of Melvin Blitzny.
zh: 凯特前往俄亥俄州阿克伦，在梅尔文·布利茨尼的住所中寻找线索。

english: Cate and Armstrong arrive in India to infiltrate H.A.R.M.'s local headquarters office.
zh: 凯特和阿姆斯特朗抵达印度，准备潜入H.A.R.M.的当地总部。

english: Having earned the trust of H.A.R.M., Cate must get into their vault.
zh: 取得H.A.R.M.的信任后，凯特必须设法进入他们的保险库。

english: Cate and Armstrong journey to Antarctica to learn the nature of Project: Omega.
zh: 凯特和阿姆斯特朗前往南极，调查欧米伽计划的真相。

english: Cate returns to India in hopes of thwarting a Super Soldier attack.
zh: 凯特返回印度，希望阻止超级士兵的袭击。

english: Cate stops by UNITY headquarters to talk to Dr. Shenker about the Super Soldiers.
zh: 凯特顺道来到UNITY总部，与申克博士讨论超级士兵。

english: Cate sneaks aboard H.A.R.M.'s secret underwater base to rescue Armstrong.
zh: 凯特偷偷潜入H.A.R.M.的秘密水下基地，营救阿姆斯特朗。

english: Cate and Armstrong search for a way off the underwater base as it begins to fall apart.
zh: 水下基地开始崩塌，凯特和阿姆斯特朗寻找逃生方法。

english: After being captured by H.A.R.M., Cate must survive the dreaded Man-Handler and face an old enemy.
zh: 被H.A.R.M.俘虏后，凯特必须从可怕的“辣手摧花机”中活下来，并面对一名旧敌。

english: Cate must fight off the Super Soldier invasion and protect the flag of Khios.
zh: 凯特必须击退超级士兵的入侵，并保护希俄斯的旗帜。

english: A UNITY intercept team must hurry to rescue Cate in Japan.
zh: 一支UNITY拦截小队必须火速赶往日本营救凯特。

english: A UNITY intercept team is sent to Siberia to destroy a Soviet super computer.
zh: 一支UNITY拦截小队被派往西伯利亚，摧毁一台苏联超级计算机。

english: A UNITY intercept team is sent to India to collect information on Balaji Malpani.
zh: 一支UNITY拦截小队被派往印度，搜集巴拉吉·马尔帕尼的相关情报。

english: A UNITY intercept team heads for Antarctica to rescue Armstrong from H.A.R.M.
zh: 一支UNITY拦截小队前往南极，从H.A.R.M.手中营救阿姆斯特朗。

english: A UNITY intercept team must fight off a deadly mime attack.
zh: 一支UNITY拦截小队必须击退致命的哑剧演员袭击。

english: Tip: You can use the space bar to skip movie sequences, although it is recommended that you watch each movie the first time it plays. Note that you can turn Load Screen tips off in the Options - Game menu.
zh: 提示：你可以按“空格键”跳过过场动画，不过建议第一次播放时完整观看。你也可以在“选项—游戏”菜单中关闭载入界面提示。

english: Tip: If you're not sure what to do next, check the Mission screen (default hotkey: Tab) to see your objectives. Also, the compass in the upper right of your screen often indicates important destinations.
zh: 提示：不确定下一步该做什么时，可以查看“任务”界面（默认快捷键：Tab），确认当前目标。此外，屏幕右上角的指南针也经常会标示重要地点。

english: Tip: You can usually run and hide instead of fighting. Enemies can lose track of you at intersections if they didn't see which way you went. You can also escape by finding a Hiding Place.
zh: 提示：通常情况下，你可以选择逃跑并躲藏，而不是正面交战。如果敌人没有看清你去了哪个方向，就可能在岔路口跟丢你。你也可以通过寻找藏身处来摆脱追兵。

english: Tip: Always search bodies for valuable items. You must hold down the Action button until the progress bar disappears in order to collect everything an enemy is carrying.
zh: 提示：务必搜查尸体，获取有价值的物品。你必须持续按住“操作”键，直到进度条消失，才能拿走敌人携带的全部物品。

english: Tip: Be sure to spend your Skill Points to improve your abilities. Keep in mind that you can earn extra skill points by accomplishing optional objectives or finding intelligence items and Spy Training Manuals.
zh: 提示：记得使用技能点提升能力。完成可选目标，或找到情报物品和《间谍训练手册》，都可以获得额外技能点。

english: Tip: If you find the game too difficult or not challenging enough, adjust the difficulty setting in the Options menu. You might also reevaluate your tactics if you're charging headlong into combat.
zh: 提示：如果你觉得游戏太难，或者缺乏挑战性，可以在“选项”菜单中调整难度设置。要是你总是迎头冲进战斗，也不妨重新考虑一下自己的战术。

english: Tip: You may occasionally have to obtain special items to accomplish an objective. Consult the Inventory screen (default hotkey: N) to see items you're carrying and examine them for clues.
zh: 提示：有时你需要取得特殊物品才能完成目标。请查看“物品栏”界面（默认快捷键：N），确认当前携带的物品，并仔细检查其中是否藏有线索。

english: Tip: Shooting a Tracking Device at an enemy will mark his or her position on your radar, making it easier for you to time your movements and to elude pursuers.
zh: 提示：向敌人发射追踪装置后，Ta的位置会显示在雷达上，方便你掌握行动时机并甩开追兵。

english: Tip: Some weapons accommodate multiple varieties of ammunition. Use the Change Ammo key (default: F) to cycle through available ammo types or consult the Equipment screen (default: M).
zh: 提示：部分武器可以使用多种弹药。按“切换弹药”键（默认：F）可在现有弹药类型之间切换，也可以查看“装备”界面（默认快捷键：M）。

english: Tip: Use the Intelligence screen (default: I) to examine any maps you've collected. By studying landmarks and using your compass, you should be able to figure out where you are and where you need to go.
zh: 提示：你可以在“情报”界面（默认快捷键：I）查看已经收集到的地图。只要观察地标并结合指南针，就应该能判断自己身在何处，以及下一步该去哪里。

english: Tip: Enemies will become alarmed when they see unconscious or dead allies lying around. You can move bodies out of the way using the Move Body key (default: G).
zh: 提示：敌人看到昏迷或死亡的同伴倒在地上时会提高警惕。你可以使用“搬运尸体”键（默认：G）将尸体移到不显眼的地方。

english: Tip: Security cameras trigger alarms if they spot you or a body. Shooting a security camera will also set off an alarm, but you can find special camera disabling ammunition for the CT-180 Utility Launcher.
zh: 提示：监控摄像机发现你或尸体时会触发警报。射击摄像机同样会拉响警报，不过你可以为CT-180 多功能发射器找到专门用于瘫痪摄像机的弹药。

english: Tip: Sometimes you may have to travel back to an area you've already visited in order to complete an objective. Rely on your compass to help you figure out where to go next.
zh: 提示：为了完成某项目标，有时你必须返回已经到访过的区域。请依靠指南针判断下一步该去哪里。

english: Tip: The Last Weapon key (default: X) is a convenient means of quickly switching between stealth-oriented weapons and those that provide stronger firepower.
zh: 提示：“上一件武器”键（默认：X）可以方便地在潜行武器和火力更强的武器之间快速切换。

english: Tip: Eavesdropping on enemies sometimes provides useful information. Also, enemies will often wander off to other tasks after a conversation, making it easier for you to proceed.
zh: 提示：偷听敌人交谈有时能获得有用情报。此外，敌人在谈话结束后往往会离开去执行其他任务，让你更容易继续前进。

english: Tip: The crosshair provides useful feedback on weapon accuracy. The blurrier it becomes, the wilder your shots. Steady your aim by standing still. Sneaking perturbs your aim less than running.
zh: 提示：准星会反馈武器的准确度。准星越模糊，射击偏差越大。站立不动可以稳定瞄准；潜行对准星的影响也小于奔跑。

english: Tip: Intentionally creating a disturbance can be an excellent way to lure unsuspecting guards out of your way. Be on the lookout for coins or other interactive items.
zh: 提示：故意制造骚动，是把毫无防备的守卫引开的绝佳方法。请留意硬币或其他可互动的物品。

english: Tip: You will not actually throw a grenade until you release the Fire button. Grenades explode three seconds after you throw them unless they impact a target, in which case they detonate immediately.
zh: 提示：松开“开火”键后，你才会真正投出手榴弹。手榴弹会在投出三秒后爆炸；若撞上目标，则会立刻引爆。

english: Tip: A snowmobile will afford moderate protection against enemy fire in an arc in front of you, so it is therefore advisable to charge targets directly instead of circling them and exposing your back.
zh: 提示：雪地摩托能在你正前方一定角度内提供中等程度的敌方火力防护。因此，与其绕着目标盘旋并暴露后背，不如直接冲向敌人。

english: Tip: To defuse an explosive, simply target it and hold down the Action button until the progress bar runs down. The more skilled you are with gadgets, the more rapidly you can neutralize the device.
zh: 提示：要拆除炸药，只需瞄准它并持续按住“操作”键，直到进度条归零。你的工具技能越高，解除装置的速度就越快。

english: Tip: When you pick up a new weapon or gadget, you will select it automatically. You can disable this feature by setting Auto-switch weapons to No in the Options - Game menu.
zh: 提示：拾取新武器或工具时会自动选中它。你可以在“选项－游戏”菜单中将“自动切换武器”设为“否”，以关闭此功能。

english: Tip: When you are able to interact with an object, text will appear just below the cursor describing what will happen when you press the Action button.
zh: 提示：当你可以与某个物体互动时，光标下方会显示文字，说明按下“操作”键后会发生什么。

english: Tip: Body armor absorbs damage very effectively. Without it, weapons inflict a greater amount of damage. If you run out of armor, it may be advisable to play more cautiously until you find more.
zh: 提示：防弹衣能够非常有效地吸收伤害。没有护甲时，武器造成的伤害会更高。护甲耗尽后，在找到补充品以前最好谨慎行动。

english: Tip: When you are fighting a major villain, a meter will appear at the top of the screen to indicate how much damage you must inflict to achieve victory.
zh: 提示：与主要反派交战时，屏幕顶部会出现计量条，显示你还需造成多少伤害才能获胜。

english: Tip: Save your progress often! Use the Quicksave key (F6) or the Save Game option in the System menu. Also keep in mind that the game Autosaves your progress at the beginning of each scene.
zh: 提示：经常保存进度！使用快速保存键（F6）或“系统”菜单中的“保存游戏”选项。另请记住，每个场景开始时，游戏都会自动保存进度。

english: Tip: Sometimes it's more advisable to run away than to fight. Consider your objectives when you find yourself facing daunting odds.
zh: 提示：有时逃跑比战斗更明智。面对悬殊敌情时，请先考虑自己的任务目标。

english: Tip: If you find yourself backed into a corner and unable to fight back, rely on your trusty banana to slip past.
zh: 提示：若你被逼入死角且无法还击，可以依靠那根可靠的香蕉滑倒敌人并趁机脱身。

english: Tip: Use the Lean keys (defaults: Q and E) to see around corners without exposing yourself to danger. Enemies will eventually notice you, so only peek for a few seconds at a time.
zh: 提示：使用“探身”键（默认：Q和E）观察拐角另一侧，而不让自己暴露在危险中。敌人最终仍会发现你，所以每次只探头几秒。

english: Tip: Alarmed civilians may cry out for help, bringing the police to investigate. Be sure not to fire weapons near pedestrians or you will cause them to panic.
zh: 提示：受到惊吓的平民可能会呼救，引来警察调查。不要在行人附近开枪，否则会让他们陷入恐慌。

english: Tip: Explore your surroundings carefully to find bonus objectives and useful items and equipment.
zh: 提示：仔细探索周围环境，以发现奖励目标、有用物品和装备。

english: Tip: Sneaking (default: Left Shift) will insure enemies do not hear your footsteps. You can use Sneak Toggle (default: Caps Lock) if you prefer to Sneak by default.
zh: 提示：潜行（默认：左Shift键）可确保敌人听不见你的脚步声。若希望默认保持潜行，可使用“切换潜行”键（默认：Caps Lock）。

english: Tip: If you cannot locate an attacker, check balconies or rooftops for snipers. If you have a weapon with a scope, use Zoom (default: Z) to target distant enemies.
zh: 提示：若找不到攻击者，请检查阳台或屋顶是否有狙击手。若武器带瞄准镜，可使用“放大”（默认：Z）瞄准远处敌人。

english: Tip: Be sure to protect allies from enemy fire. You will fail the mission if they are killed.
zh: 提示：务必保护友军免受敌方火力伤害。若他们被杀，任务将会失败。

english: Tip: Use the Quick Load hotkey (F9) to restore your last Quick Save without accessing the menus.
zh: 提示：使用快速载入快捷键（F9），无需进入菜单即可恢复最近一次快速保存。

english: Tip: You can use the F8 key to take screenshots of the game. Shots are numbered consecutively and placed in the folder you selected for the game's installation.
zh: 提示：你可以按F8键截取游戏画面。截图将按顺序编号，并保存到安装游戏时选择的文件夹中。

english: Tip: Avoid hazardous substances such as scalding steam, fire, and electricity or you will take damage.
zh: 提示：避开高温蒸汽、火焰和电流等危险物质，否则会受到伤害。

english: Tip: Head shots inflict greater damage than shots to the torso or limbs. Enemies are also easier to dispatch when they aren't alert.
zh: 提示：爆头造成的伤害高于射击躯干或四肢。敌人没有警觉时也更容易被解决。

english: Tip: The CT-180 Utility Launcher can be equipped with multiple ammunition types, including camera disablers, tranquilizer darts, and electrical devices.
zh: 提示：CT-180 多功能发射器可装填多种弹药，包括摄像机干扰器、麻醉飞镖和电击装置。

english: Tip: Try to dispatch enemies quietly to avoid alerting other adversaries. Enemies that are suspicious or alarmed will cry out in pain, causing a disturbance.
zh: 提示：尽量安静地解决敌人，以免惊动其他对手。产生怀疑或进入警戒状态的敌人受伤时会痛呼，从而引起骚动。

english: Tip: After clearing an area, it is possible to bring additional enemies to your position by activating alarm switches. If you are low on health, armor, or ammunition, you may want to set traps for reinforcements and loot them.
zh: 提示：清理完一个区域后，可以通过启动警报开关，引来更多敌人。若生命值、护甲或弹药不足，可以为援军设置陷阱，再搜刮他们的物品。

english: Tip: Enemies will approach the Angry Kitty Proximity Device thinking it's a cute little kitten. Once a target enters its activation range, the Angry Kitty will pounce.
zh: 提示：敌人会把“愤怒猫咪”感应装置当成可爱的小猫而靠近。一旦目标进入触发范围，“愤怒猫咪”就会扑上去。

english: Tip: To view a list of the equipment you are carrying, access the Equipment Menu (default: M). You can select a weapon or gadget to display the ammo types available for each.
zh: 提示：要查看当前携带的装备列表，请打开“装备”菜单（默认：M）。选择武器或工具后，可以查看各自可用的弹药类型。

english: Tip: An oxygen meter will appear once you have submerged yourself in water. When the meter is depleted, you will begin to drown.
zh: 提示：潜入水中后会出现氧气计量条。计量条耗尽后，你将开始溺水。

english: Tip: To view documents or photographs you've collected during a mission, access the Intelligence screen (default: I). Select an item to display it.
zh: 提示：要查看任务中收集的文件或照片，请进入“情报”界面（默认：I），然后选择要显示的物品。

english: Tip: Your Health, Armor, and Ammunition display can be configured in three different ways. Use the = key to cycle through these options.
zh: 提示：生命值、护甲和弹药显示有三种布局。按“=”键可在这些选项之间循环切换。

english: Tip: It is possible to reverse direction instantly by hitting the Turn Around key (default: Backspace).
zh: 提示：按下“转身”键（默认：Backspace）可以立即掉头。

english: Tip: The Glue Bomb ammunition for the Utility Launcher will delay pursuers without injury. Simply shoot at enemies or on the ground in front of them and they will become temporarily stuck.
zh: 提示：多功能发射器的胶水炸弹弹药可以在不造成伤害的情况下拖住追兵。只需射击敌人或他们面前的地面，就能让其暂时被粘住。

english: Tip: To pause the game, either use the Pause key (located in the upper right portion of most keyboards) or bring up the in-game menus using Esc or one of the menu hotkeys, such as I for Intelligence or P for Player.
zh: 提示：要暂停游戏，可以按Pause键（通常位于键盘右上方），也可以按Esc或菜单快捷键打开游戏内菜单，例如按I进入“情报”，或按P进入“玩家”。

english: Tip: You can access your UNITY Keychain Light quickly by using the Keychain Light hotkey (default: L).
zh: 提示：使用“钥匙扣灯”快捷键（默认：L），可以快速打开UNITY钥匙扣灯。

english: Tip: Once you've completed the game, a Chapter List will become available in the Single Player menu. You can use it to replay specific chapters any time you please.
zh: 提示：通关后，“章节列表”将出现在单人游戏菜单中，你可以随时用它重玩特定章节。

english: Tip: You can use the Right Mouse Button to dispel in-game menus in addition to pressing the Esc key.
zh: 提示：除了按Esc键以外，也可以按鼠标右键关闭游戏内菜单。

english: Tip: Icons are displayed on the left side of your screen when you are damaged by substances such as fire, sleeping gas, stun gas, or poison.
zh: 提示：受到火焰、催眠气体、眩晕气体或毒素等物质伤害时，屏幕左侧会显示相应图标。

english: You found an empty mouse trap.
zh: 你找到了一个空捕鼠夹

english: You've found a moldy ham sandwich.
zh: 你找到了一个发霉的火腿三明治

english: You found a mouse trap with a dead mouse in it.
zh: 你找到了一个夹着死老鼠的捕鼠夹

english: You found a tattered comic book.
zh: 你找到了一本破烂的漫画书

english: You found a file of blank paper.
You found a box of tissues.
You found a bottle of hair tonic.
You found a pack of gum.
You found a pencil with the eraser chewed off.
zh: 你找到了一支橡皮头被咬掉的铅笔

english: You found a small bottle of gin.
zh: 你找到了一小瓶杜松子酒
你找到了一台卡住的订书机

english: You found an office supply catalog.
zh: 你找到了一本办公用品目录

english: You found notebooks filled with doodles.
zh: 你找到了几本画满涂鸦的笔记本

english: You found a stale, half-eaten doughnut.
zh: 你找到了半个已经不新鲜的甜甜圈
你找到了一把塑料叉子
你找到了一把左手剪刀

english: You found a box of thumb tacks.
You found six black pens, all dry.
zh: 你找到了六支已经干涸的黑色钢笔

english: You found a bottle of aspirin.
zh: 你找到了一瓶阿司匹林

english: You found a permanent marker with no cap.
zh: 你找到了一支没有笔帽的永久性记号笔

Disguised as a mascara kit, this devious gadget quietly knocks out enemies for a short duration.
zh: 这件阴险的工具伪装成睫毛膏套装，可以悄无声息地使敌人暂时昏迷。

english: A traditional Japanese long sword. Silent and deadly. A well-timed swing may block projectiles such as shuriken and small caliber bullets.
zh: 传统的日本长刀，安静而致命。把握好挥刀时机，可以挡开手里剑、小口径子弹等飞行物。

english: A curved Indian sword. Useful for dispatching enemies quietly. Can also block small caliber bullets and certain other projectiles.
zh: 一种弯曲的印度刀剑，适合悄无声息地解决敌人，也能挡住小口径子弹及部分其他飞行物。

english: Japanese throwing stars are assassins' weapons. They're most effective against unsuspecting foes.
zh: 日本手里剑是刺客使用的武器，对毫无防备的敌人最为有效。

english: A thrown explosive device that can be lobbed over walls and around corners. Makes up in effectiveness what it lacks in subtlety.
zh: 一种投掷式爆炸装置，可以越过墙壁或拐角投掷。虽然毫不隐蔽，但威力足以弥补这一缺点。

english: A powerful explosive device cunningly disguised as an ordinary alley cat. Once its proximity fuse is activated, it will chase after its victims and explode.
zh: 一种威力强大的爆炸装置，巧妙伪装成普通野猫。近炸引信启动后，它会追逐目标并爆炸。

english: A .32 caliber handgun. Reliable and effective. Can be fitted with a silencer.
zh: 一把 .32 口径手枪，可靠而有效，可安装消音器。

english: This multi-purpose tool was designed to accommodate a large, cylindrical canister that can be fitted with various devices and forms of ammunition.
zh: 这种多功能工具可装入大型圆柱形弹筒，弹筒能够搭载各种装置和弹药。

english: While not standard issue for spies, a combat shotgun can be useful in certain situations. Accommodates shells and various types of slug.
zh: 战斗霰弹枪虽非间谍的标准装备，但在某些情况下非常有用，可装填霰弹及多种独头弹。

english: A popular submachinegun due to its reliability and stylish design. While holding it by the side-mounted magazine is not recommended, most agents do.
zh: 这种冲锋枪凭借可靠性和时尚外形广受欢迎。虽然不建议握住侧置弹匣使用，但大多数特工都会这么做。

english: The enduring M1921-A1 submachinegun remains popular with certain criminal organizations who enjoy its gangster connotations.
zh: 经久不衰的M1921-A1冲锋枪仍受到某些犯罪组织的喜爱，因为它带有浓厚的黑帮气息。

english: A rugged, reliable Eastern Bloc assault rifle that has become increasingly popular with criminals and terrorists.
zh: 一种坚固可靠的东欧集团突击步枪，近年来越来越受罪犯和恐怖分子欢迎。

english: This high-power bolt action rifle makes an effective sniper's weapon. Features an integrated 4X scope and can be fitted with a silencer.
zh: 这种高威力栓动步枪是优秀的狙击武器，自带4倍瞄准镜，并可安装消音器。

english: A sturdy sportsman's crossbow ideal for situations that necessitate subtlety over raw firepower. A scope can be mounted to ensure accuracy at longer ranges.
zh: 一种坚固的运动十字弓，适合需要隐蔽而非纯粹火力的场合。可安装瞄准镜，以确保远距离射击精度。

english: This fold-out micromissile launcher fits comfortably inside a woman's handbag, making it easy for an agent to carry and difficult for enemies to detect.
zh: 这种折叠式微型导弹发射器可以轻松放进女士手提包，既方便特工携带，也不易被敌人发现。

english: This miniature spy camera is hidden inside a functional lipstick. The camera has a limited depth of field, so you may have to zoom in for a clear shot.
zh: 这台微型间谍相机隐藏在一支可以正常使用的口红里。相机景深有限，因此可能需要放大才能拍清楚。

english: An industrial strength explosive device ideally suited to sabotage.
zh: 一种工业级高强度爆炸装置，非常适合用于破坏行动。

english: This ordinary looking women's compact conceals a sophisticated decoding device used to read encrypted text and ascertain numerical codes for security devices.
zh: 这个看似普通的女士粉盒中藏着精密的密码破译装置，可用于读取加密文字，并查明安全设备的数字密码。

english: This miniature welder uses aerosol hairspray as fuel, which makes it easy to disguise but not quite as effective as a regular welder.
zh: 这台微型焊接器以喷雾发胶为燃料，因此很容易伪装，但效果不如普通焊接器。

english: What appears to be an ordinary toe nail clipper is actually a sophisticated lock pick.
zh: 看似普通的脚趾甲剪，实际上是一件精密的开锁工具。

english: When attached to a telephone, this electronic bug will record sound data. You must then activate the bug to hear both sides of the conversation.
zh: 将这个电子窃听器连接到电话上后，它会记录声音数据。之后必须启动窃听器，才能听到通话双方的内容。

english: This perfume bottle sprays a solution that quickly and conveniently disposes of bodies. Be sure to search for useful items before removing a target.
zh: 这瓶香水会喷出一种溶液，能够快速方便地处理尸体。清除目标前，务必先搜查有用物品。

english: By throwing this coin, you can create disturbances to lure guards away from their posts.
zh: 投掷这枚硬币可以制造声响，把守卫从岗位上引开。

english: You can leave bear traps lying around to snare enemies. Just don't step on one yourself.
zh: 你可以在地上放置捕熊夹来困住敌人，但千万别自己踩上去。

english: The globe on this keychain is actually a small bulb that emits a faint glow.
zh: 这个钥匙扣上的球体其实是一枚会发出微弱光芒的小灯泡。

english: Even an ordinary banana can be devastating in the right hands. Leave it where someone is likely to step on it.
zh: 即便是普通香蕉，落到合适的人手里也能造成巨大杀伤。把它放在别人可能踩到的地方。

english: Put away your weapon to avoid frightening civilians.
zh: 收起武器，以免吓到平民。

english: This device will temporarily daze anyone caught in its explosion radius.
zh: 这件装置会使爆炸范围内的所有人暂时眩晕。

english: This canister grenade explodes in a cloud of sleeping gas that renders enemies unconscious for a short duration.
zh: 这种罐式手榴弹爆炸后会释放催眠气体，使敌人暂时昏迷。

english: Releases a cloud of corrosive gas that burns the skin and interferes with breathing. Very dangerous.
zh: 释放一团腐蚀性气体，灼伤皮肤并妨碍呼吸，非常危险。

english: Sends enemies into uncontrollable fits of laughter, incapacitating them until the effect wears off.
zh: 使敌人陷入无法控制的狂笑，直到效果消失前都无法行动。

english: A modified Gordon submachinegun. The barrel has been swapped out for an integrated silencer.
zh: 一把经过改装的戈登冲锋枪，枪管已更换为一体式消音器。

english: Nullifies poison damage caused by cyanide-tipped rounds and poisoned crossbow bolts.
zh: 抵消氰化物弹头和毒弩箭造成的中毒伤害。

english: Reduces burn damage caused by phosphorous rounds, scalding steam, and other heat sources.
zh: 减少磷弹、灼热蒸汽及其他热源造成的烧伤伤害。

english: Reduces concussion damage caused by explosions.
zh: 减少爆炸造成的震荡伤害。

english: Prevents excessive blood loss caused by dum dum rounds.
zh: 防止达姆弹造成的严重失血。

english: Protects wearer from most types of damage.
zh: 保护穿戴者免受大多数类型的伤害。
麦卡利斯特 .32 自动手枪消音器

english: Silencer for RFA Series-4 Bolt-action Rifle
zh: RFA 系列-4 栓动步枪消音器
戈登 9mm 冲锋枪消音器
维护者运动家十字弓瞄准镜
巴卡洛夫“矫正者”瞄准镜

english: Thrown projectile with razor sharp edges. Can also be used to cause distractions.
zh: 带有锋利刃口的投掷武器，也可用于制造声响转移注意。

english: Fragmentation explosive detonates on a 3 second fuse.
zh: 破片炸弹会在三秒引信结束后爆炸。

english: Releases a cloud of stun gas that temporarily dazes targets.
zh: 释放一团眩晕气体，使目标暂时失去行动能力。

english: Area effect that renders targets temporarily unconscious.
zh: 范围效果，可使目标暂时昏迷。

english: Produces a deadly cloud of corrosive gas.
zh: 产生一团致命的腐蚀性气体。

english: Standard .32 caliber full metal jacket ammunition.
zh: 标准 .32 口径全金属被甲弹。

english: .32 caliber rounds with tiny poison capsules inserted at the tip of each cartridge. Effective against living targets.
zh: .32 口径弹药，每枚弹头尖端都装有微型毒药胶囊，对生物目标十分有效。

english: Disables security cameras by displaying innocuous video loop.
zh: 播放无害的循环画面，使监控摄像机失效。

english: Creates a puddle of powerful liquid adhesive. Will stop enemies in their tracks for short duration.
zh: 形成一摊强力液体黏合剂，使敌人短时间内动弹不得。

english: Anti-Super Soldier Serum produces a chemical reaction in super soldiers that effectively causes them to boil. Harmless against humans.
zh: 抗超级士兵血清会在超级士兵体内引发化学反应，实际上将其煮沸，但对普通人无害。

english: Produces a cloud of debilitating laughing gas.
zh: 产生一团使人丧失行动能力的笑气。

english: 12-gauge shot spreads from the gun barrel, creating a wide firing arc that is highly effective at close range.
zh: 12号霰弹从枪口散射，形成宽广射击范围，近距离威力极强。

english: Explosive pellets burst on impact, causing massive damage to targets.
zh: 爆炸弹丸命中后炸裂，对目标造成巨大伤害。

english: Standard 9 millimeter full metal jacket ammunition.
zh: 标准9毫米全金属被甲弹。

english: Standard .45 caliber full metal jacket ammunition.
zh: 标准 .45 口径全金属被甲弹。

english: Phosphorous-coated 7.62x39 ammunition continues to burn on impact.
zh: 表面涂有磷的7.62x39弹药，命中后会持续燃烧。
标准 .308 口径全金属被甲弹。

english: Standard crossbow ammunition. Can sometimes be recovered from soft targets.
zh: 标准十字弓弹药，有时可以从较软的目标身上回收。

english: Poison-coated crossbow ammunition. Can sometimes be recovered from soft targets.
zh: 涂有毒药的十字弓弹药，有时可以从较软的目标身上回收。

english: Incendiary crossbow ammunition continues to burn on impact.
zh: 燃烧十字弓弹药，命中后会持续燃烧。

english: Explosive-tipped crossbow ammunition that detonates on impact.
zh: 带爆炸弹头的十字弓弹药，命中时引爆。

english: Small self-propelled missile that explodes on impact.
zh: 一种小型自推进导弹，命中时爆炸。
可变焦的间谍相机功能。

english: Timed explosive device with an adjustable timer.
zh: 带可调计时器的定时爆炸装置。

english: Standard electronic code analyzer and decipherer.
zh: 标准电子密码分析与破译器。

english: Instantaneously atomizes bodies, removing them permanently.
zh: 瞬间将尸体雾化，永久清除。

english: Chemically neutralizes invisible ink, making it perceptible to the naked eye.
zh: 通过化学方式中和隐形墨水，使其能被肉眼看见。

english: Radio transmitter darts that mark an enemy's location on your radar.
zh: 无线电发射飞镖，可在雷达上标记敌人的位置。

zh: 贴有红色标签的录音带

zh: 贴有蓝色标签的录音带

english: An audio tape with a green label.
zh: 贴有绿色标签的录音带

zh: 贴有黄色标签的录音带

zh: 贴有紫色标签的录音带

zh: 巴拉吉公寓保险柜的密码

超级计算机服务部门通行卡
一把生锈的一字螺丝刀

english: Grimy AA batteries. They seem to have run out of juice.
zh: 沾满污垢的AA电池，似乎已经没电了。

english: A briefcase to be delivered to Hatori-san.
zh: 一个要交给羽鸟先生的公文包

english: You can use this fuel for the snowmobile.
zh: 这些燃料可以给雪地摩托使用

english: This fuse appears to be in good condition.
zh: 这个保险丝看起来完好无损

english: An ordinary key ring with several different keys.
zh: 一个普通的钥匙环，上面挂着几把不同的钥匙。

english: A coil of copper wire for electrical work.
zh: 一卷用于电气作业的铜线

english: A heavy duty wrench. It'll do the job when bare hands won't.
zh: 一把重型扳手，徒手做不到的事，它应该能完成。

english: A loose door knob. It could come in handy for replacing missing or defective doorknobs.
zh: 一个脱落的门把手，可以用来替换缺失或损坏的门把手。

english: The ringer of a wind chime.
An empty bucket. Looks like it could hold quite a bit of water.
zh: 一个空水桶，看起来能装不少水。

english: The handle for a water faucet.
Super Computer User Manual v1.0. Lists input procedures for the Super Computer.
zh: 《超级计算机用户手册》1.0版，列出了超级计算机的输入流程。

zh: 这张207-B申请表已经填好，用于申请《超级计算机用户手册》。

english: Supercomputer User Manual Supplement v2.0. Lists updated input procedure for Super Computer.
zh: 《超级计算机用户手册补充说明》2.0版，列出了更新后的超级计算机输入流程。

english: A H.A.R.M. ID badge used to enter secure areas.
zh: 用于进入安全区域的H.A.R.M.身份证

english: The label on this vacuum tube reads: Replacement part for M-9 Data Processing Unit.
zh: 这根真空管的标签上写着：M-9数据处理单元替换零件

english: The security code for the M-9 Data Processing Unit.
zh: M-9数据处理单元的安全密码

zh: 用于访问数据处理单元的旁路组件

zh: 启动M-9数据处理单元所需的密码

english: Lists the file ID for information pertaining to Project: Omega.
zh: 列出了欧米伽计划相关情报的文件编号

english: Rupees are a basic monetary unit in India.
zh: 卢比是印度的基本货币单位

english: These are ignition keys for a snowmobile.
zh: 这是雪地摩托的点火钥匙

english: Refined sugar can be used to sweeten coffee or to cause an engine to seize up.
zh: 精制糖既可以用来给咖啡调味，也可以让发动机卡死。

english: Dr. Schenker's glasses are impossible to mistake. The thick lenses are scored with scratches and don't seem to have been cleaned for some months. It's difficult to imagine how he can see anything through them.
zh: 申克博士的眼镜一眼就能认出来。厚厚的镜片布满划痕，看起来已经几个月没清洗了，很难想象他怎么能透过它们看清任何东西。

english: The ignition key for a snowmobile.
Fifty rupees. Perhaps you can give this to Crazy Harij to open the city gates.
zh: 五十卢比。也许可以交给疯狂哈里吉，让他打开城门。

english: This catalogue is required in order to obtain Version 1.0 of the Supercomputer Services User Manual from the Supercomputer Services Department
zh: 要从超级计算机服务部门领取《超级计算机服务用户手册》1.0版，必须使用这本目录。

english: This key is needed to operate the loading crane in the submarine bay.
zh: 这把钥匙用于操作潜艇船坞的装卸起重机

english: This security card can be used on card key readers to gain entry to restricted areas.
zh: 这张安全卡可以在门禁读卡器上使用，以进入限制区域。

english: This recorder contains the voice identification for a H.A.R.M. Underwater Base employee.
zh: 这台录音机保存着一名H.A.R.M.水下基地员工的声纹识别信息。

english: A flat head screwdriver. Might be useful for prying things open.
zh: 一把一字螺丝刀，也许可以用来撬开东西。

english: The label on this audio tape identifies\nit as a volume in the audio journal of\nTom Goodman.
zh: 这盘录音带的标签表明，\n它是汤姆·古德曼录音日记中的\n一卷。

english: This coffee doesn't smell particularly fresh, but it's warm and strong.
zh: 这壶咖啡闻起来不太新鲜，但很热，也很浓。

english: Keys for Balaji Malpani's room at the Hotel Happy Guest as well as his private safe.
zh: 巴拉吉·马尔帕尼在“快乐宾客酒店”的房间钥匙，以及私人保险柜钥匙。

zh: 超级计算机服务部门门禁卡

Return to Yamata-san at the bridge.
zh: 返回桥边与山田先生会合

zh: 找回这封信剩余的三页
将公文包交给羽鸟先生

english: Erase three dead drop chalk marks.
zh: 清除三处秘密投递点的粉笔标记

english: Try not to let enemies sound the alarm.
zh: 尽量别让敌人拉响警报

english: Recover six pages of UNITY field manual.
zh: 找回UNITY外勤手册的六页内容

english: Recover all four pages of the UNITY field manual.
zh: 找回UNITY外勤手册的全部四页内容
失败：未能拍摄会议现场

english: Don't let any alarms be sounded in the yard around the main house.
zh: 不要触发主宅周围庭院内的任何警报

english: Don't make any suspicious noise near the window!
zh: 不要在窗户附近发出任何可疑声响！

english: Radio UNITY mission control for instructions.
zh: 通过无线电联系UNITY任务控制中心，获取指示

english: Locate and secure the hunting cabin as a base of operations.
zh: 找到并控制狩猎木屋，将其作为行动基地

english: Place three explosives on the underpinnings of the main bridge.
zh: 在主桥底部支撑结构上安放三处炸药

english: Avoid the main bridge leading into the base.
Minimize Soviet casualties at all costs.
zh: 无论如何都要将苏军伤亡降到最低

english: Plant explosive at the base of the radio tower.
zh: 在无线电塔底部安放炸药

english: Plant explosives at power relay station.
zh: 在电力中继站安放炸药

english: Rescue your pilot from his Soviet captors, and escort him out of the facility.
zh: 从苏军手中救出飞行员，并护送他离开设施

english: Return to the hunting cabin and wait for dark.
zh: 返回狩猎木屋，等待天黑

english: Discover the nature of the conspiracy you've uncovered.
zh: 查明你所发现的阴谋真相

english: Try to prevent Soviet soldiers from summoning backup.
zh: 尽量阻止苏军士兵呼叫增援

english: Place explosive at the outer gate.
Place explosive at the fuel depot in the motor pool.
zh: 在车场的燃料库安放炸药

zh: 在食堂旁的丙烷罐上安放炸药
取得欧米伽计划的相关情报

english: Recover both pages of Soviet Military Readiness Report.
zh: 找回《苏军战备报告》的两页内容
收集全部四份费用报告

english: Plant bugs on four phones in the main records building.
zh: 在主档案大楼的四部电话上安装窃听器

english: Prevent H.A.R.M. from blowing up your plane.
Recover the other page of the Soviet Military Readiness Report.
zh: 找回《苏军战备报告》的另一页

english: Recover top secret document from the safe in the old Records Building.
zh: 从旧档案大楼的保险柜中取得绝密文件
取得有关“阿纳托利”的更多情报
寻找欧米伽计划的相关情报

english: Find all the correspondence between Goodman and Mr. Smith.
zh: 找到古德曼与史密斯先生之间的全部往来信件

english: Rendezvous with Kamal. Be careful not to injure innocents or police patrolling the area.
zh: 与卡马尔会合，小心不要伤害无辜平民或在该地区巡逻的警察

english: Bug the phone in Anoop Banerjee's office, then listen back to the conversation.
zh: 在阿努普·班纳吉的办公室电话上安装窃听器，然后回放通话内容

english: Return to the entry hall before your absence is noted.
zh: 在别人发现你离开之前返回入口大厅

english: Collect the Wanted posters before they are spotted by civilians.
zh: 在通缉海报被平民发现前将其全部收走

english: Recover the contents of the manager's safe.
zh: 取得经理保险柜中的物品

english: Plant explosives in the secret Evil Alliance film vault.
zh: 在邪恶联盟的秘密胶片库中安放炸药

english: Recover information on Project Omega from the main vault.
zh: 从主保险库中取得欧米伽计划的相关情报
跟随阿姆斯特朗前往安全地点
与阿姆斯特朗一起逃脱
无论如何都要保护阿姆斯特朗
拍摄H.A.R.M.总部内的目标（待定）

english: Plant bug on three telephones in H.A.R.M. headquarters.
zh: 在H.A.R.M.总部的三部电话上安装窃听器
拍摄墙壁保险柜中的文件

english: Obtain the blackmail evidence on Kamal.
zh: 取得用于勒索卡马尔的证据

english: Don't kill anyone or you'll fail your mission!
zh: 不能杀死任何人，否则任务失败！

english: Avoid being caught or you'll be escorted back to the lobby and have to try again!
zh: 避免被抓，否则你会被押回大厅，只能重新尝试！

english: Reach the lower level without killing anyone.
zh: 在不杀死任何人的情况下抵达下层

english: Retrieve supplies from the phone booth near the movie theatre.
zh: 从电影院附近的电话亭取得补给

english: Don't get caught now or you'll fail your mission!
zh: 现在不能被抓，否则任务失败！
取得欧米伽计划的相关情报

english: Recover three pages of medical report.
zh: 找回医疗报告的三页内容

english: Recover additional data on Lieutenant Anders.
zh: 取得有关安德斯中尉的更多资料
从超级士兵手中救出平民

english: Put out the fire for Crazy Harij or he'll be very angry!
zh: 替疯狂哈里吉灭火，否则他会非常生气！
找回四份放错位置的文件

english: Find out where Armstrong is being held.
zh: 查明阿姆斯特朗被关押在哪里

english: Rescue Armstrong. He's being held in the lower decks in a Super Soldier pod.
zh: 救出阿姆斯特朗，他被关在下层甲板的一具超级士兵培养舱中

english: Find a way off the underwater base before it implodes.
zh: 在水下基地内爆前找到离开的方法

english: Gain access to the Director's private deck.
Recover information on the H.A.R.M. super secret submarine.
zh: 取得H.A.R.M.超级秘密潜艇的相关情报

english: Recover a copy of the H.A.R.M. employee handbook.
Obtain the Supercomputer User Manual v1.0 from the Supercomputer Services Department.
zh: 从超级计算机服务部门取得《超级计算机用户手册》1.0版

english: Locate the Supercomputer User Manual Supplement v2.0.
zh: 找到《超级计算机用户手册补充说明》2.0版

english: Locate the bilge pump valve and open it.
zh: 找到舱底水泵阀门并将其打开

english: Obtain a copy of H.A.R.M.'s new mission statement.
zh: 取得一份H.A.R.M.的新使命宣言

english: Locate the umbilicus that leads to the Command Deck.
zh: 找到通往指挥甲板的脐带通道

english: Escape the needlessly elaborate death trap.
zh: 逃出这套毫无必要地复杂的死亡机关

english: Recover the new H.A.R.M. public relations plan.

zh: 取得H.A.R.M.的希俄斯入侵计划

english: Rendezvous with Armstrong at the fort.
zh: 在要塞与阿姆斯特朗会合

english: Locate Balaji Malpani then photograph him. His apartment would be a good place to start.
zh: 找到巴拉吉·马尔帕尼并拍摄他，可以先从他的公寓查起

english: Head to the extraction point at the cafe near Balaji's apartment.
zh: 前往巴拉吉公寓附近咖啡馆的撤离点

english: Meet up with your team at the UNITY cabin and radio headquarters to receive final instructions.
zh: 在UNITY木屋与队伍会合，并通过无线电联系总部以接收最终指示

english: Take down the computer by infiltrating the installation and planting 4 explosives.
zh: 潜入设施并安放四处炸药，摧毁计算机

english: Take down the computer by planting explosives. 3 targets are left.
zh: 安放炸药摧毁计算机，还剩三个目标

english: Take down the computer by planting explosives. 2 targets are left.
zh: 安放炸药摧毁计算机，还剩两个目标

english: Take down the computer by planting explosives. 1 target is left.
zh: 安放炸药摧毁计算机，还剩一个目标

english: Gather additional data on the Super Soldier project.
zh: 搜集有关超级士兵计划的更多资料

english: Meet back at the UNITY cabin and radio headquarters for an extraction.
zh: 返回UNITY木屋，并通过无线电联系总部请求撤离

english: Locate Cate. Her last reported location was near the waterfall outside the village.
zh: 找到凯特，她最后一次报告的位置在村外瀑布附近

english: Return to the extraction point with Cate.
zh: 与凯特一起返回撤离点

english: Find the generator and turn on the power to all the area's doors and gates.
zh: 找到发电机并恢复供电，使该地区所有门和大门重新运作

english: Gain entry to Balaji's apartment by finding a spare set of keys or perhaps a lockpick.
zh: 找到备用钥匙或开锁器，进入巴拉吉的公寓

english: Find a good vantage point from which to photograph Balaji at his mistress's apartment.
zh: 寻找合适的观察位置，拍摄身处情妇公寓中的巴拉吉
找到并救出阿姆斯特朗

english: Find information on where H.A.R.M. is taking Armstrong.
zh: 查明H.A.R.M.要把阿姆斯特朗带到哪里

english: Look for appropriate targets and plant 6 sets of explosives.
zh: 寻找合适的目标并安放六组炸药

english: Look for appropriate targets and plant 5 sets of explosives.
zh: 寻找合适的目标并安放五组炸药

english: Look for appropriate targets and plant 4 sets of explosives.
zh: 寻找合适的目标并安放四组炸药

english: Look for appropriate targets and plant 3 sets of explosives.
zh: 寻找合适的目标并安放三组炸药

english: Look for appropriate targets and plant 2 sets of explosives.
zh: 寻找合适的目标并安放两组炸药

english: Look for appropriate targets and plant 1 explosive.
zh: 寻找合适的目标并安放一处炸药

english: Return to the extraction point for retrieval.
The mimes have taken 4 hostages. Save them.
zh: 哑剧演员抓了四名人质，救出他们

english: The mimes have 3 hostages. Save them.
zh: 哑剧演员还扣押着三名人质，救出他们

english: The mimes have 2 hostages. Save them.
zh: 哑剧演员还扣押着两名人质，救出他们

english: The mimes have 1 hostage. Save him.
zh: 哑剧演员还扣押着一名人质，救出他

english: Meet at the extraction point in the lobby to receive your next mission.
zh: 在大厅的撤离点会合，以接收下一项任务

english: Collect 50 rupees and pay Crazy Harij to let you through the gates into the inner part of the city.
zh: 收集五十卢比，交给疯狂哈里吉，让他放你通过城门进入城市内区

english: Get to the UNITY helicopter for extraction.

zh: H.A.R.M.秘密地下巢穴\n位置不明

english: 4:31 p.m.\nKingdom of Khios, Sea of Marmara
zh: 下午4:31\n马尔马拉海，希俄斯王国

english: Somewhere in the Sea of Marmara

zh: 平民伤亡过多，无法接受！

english: You were sucked into the tornado!
You allowed Hatori-san to be killed!
zh: 你没能阻止羽鸟先生遇害！
你没能阻止阿姆斯特朗死亡！

english: You killed your pilot! Now you can't go home!
zh: 你杀死了飞行员！现在你回不了家了！

english: You allowed your pilot to be killed!
zh: 你没能阻止飞行员遇害！

english: You spent too long screwing around in the restroom and now you've blown your cover. You are quickly apprehended and tortured for information. In less than a week, the U.S. and U.S.S.R. are at war and most of civilization evaporates.
zh: 你在洗手间里磨蹭了太久，身份已经暴露。你很快便被逮捕，并遭到严刑逼供。不到一周，美国与苏联便爆发战争，大部分人类文明随之灰飞烟灭。
羽鸟先生的心脏起搏器失灵了，他死了。

english: You allowed Yamata-san to be killed!
zh: 你没能阻止山田先生遇害！

english: You've blown your cover! You no longer have a way to gain entry to their headquarters.
zh: 你的身份已经暴露！现在你再也无法进入他们的总部。

english: That sort of behavior is unacceptable. You're fired!
zh: 这种行为不可接受。你被解雇了！

english: Angry at being attacked by his so-called ally,\nArmstrong punches you so hard you die.
zh: 阿姆斯特朗因遭到所谓盟友的袭击而勃然大怒，\n一拳将你打死。

english: Address the mechanical mynah bird for useful advice.
zh: 向机械八哥询问有用的建议

english: The fuse is dead. You'll have to replace it.
zh: 保险丝坏了，你得更换一个新的

english: The wires have shorted out. They can be repaired if you can find some copper wire.
zh: 线路短路了，如果能找到一些铜线，就可以修好

english: The valve handle is missing. You can't get a good grip with your bare hands.
zh: 阀门手柄不见了，徒手根本抓不牢

english: The snowmobile is out of fuel.
You need a password to access this computer.
zh: 你需要密码才能访问这台计算机

english: It's too heavy for you to lift.
I've found 10 Rupees. Only 40 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差40卢比

english: I've found 10 Rupees. Only 30 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差30卢比

english: I've found 10 Rupees. Only 20 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差20卢比

english: I've found 10 Rupees. Only 10 more Rupees to go.
zh: 我找到了10卢比，还差10卢比

english: That makes 50 Rupees! Let's head to the gate.
I found a note from Balaji to his mistress. We need to find the set of keys he left for her nearby. Fan out and search the area.
zh: 我找到了巴拉吉写给情妇的便条。我们需要找到他留在附近、准备交给情妇的那串钥匙，分头搜索这一带

english: I found a note from Balaji's mistress to meet at her apartment. Look for a flowerbox outside and find a spot across the street. We can photograph them through the window.
zh: 我找到了巴拉吉的情妇留下的便条，上面约他在她的公寓见面。寻找门外摆着花箱的房间，再找到街对面合适的位置，我们就能透过窗户给他们拍照

english: I found the keys to Balaji's apartment. Let's search the place for clues.
zh: 我找到了巴拉吉的公寓钥匙。进去搜查，看看有没有线索

english: BRUNO: A Soviet spy has unlocked the installation gates. Get inside and plant explosives. Fuel depots would make excellent targets. Good luck!
zh: 布鲁诺：一名苏联间谍已经打开了设施大门。进入基地并安放炸药，燃料库会是绝佳目标。祝你好运！

english: The gate to the Old Records Building is locked with a weldable lock.
zh: 旧档案大楼的大门上有一把可以用焊接器破坏的锁

english: I've welded the lock off the gate to the Old Records Building.
zh: 我已经焊掉了旧档案大楼大门上的锁

english: BRUNO: Good work team. Unfortunately you'll have to hold off the Soviets until the UNITY extraction team can arrive.
zh: 布鲁诺：干得好，各位。遗憾的是，在UNITY撤离小队赶到之前，你们必须先挡住苏联人。

english: The doors are locked. Perhaps you can find a loose set of keys.
zh: 门锁着，也许能找到一串没人看管的钥匙

english: The doors and gates are inoperative. You need to turn the power back on first.
zh: 这些门和大门都无法使用，你必须先恢复供电

english: You need to find Cate and bring her to the extraction point!
zh: 你需要找到凯特，并把她带到撤离点！

english: I've found Cate and am bringing her back to the extraction point. I'll need everyone's protection on the return trip.
zh: 我已经找到凯特，正带她返回撤离点，回程途中需要所有人提供掩护

english: Let's meet at the next rally point.
zh: 我们在下一个集合点会合

english: This door is locked. You need to find the keys.
zh: 这扇门锁着，你得找到钥匙

english: If only you had some sugar...

zh: 你偷偷摸摸时被抓住了！

english: To open this safe, you'll need to find the combination numbers.
zh: 想打开这个保险柜，你得先找到各位数密码

english: The gate seems to be barred from the other side.
zh: 大门似乎从另一侧闩住了

english: The door is locked from the other side.
The door is locked from the inside.
Consult Intelligence screen (default hotkey: I) to review information.
zh: 请查看“情报”界面（默认快捷键：I）以回顾相关信息

english: You found the keys to the snowmobile.
zh: 你找到了雪地摩托的钥匙

english: A screwdriver is needed to open this panel.
zh: 需要一把螺丝刀才能打开这个面板

english: Primary objective failed. No Skill Points awarded.\nReturn to Yamata-san at the bridge.
zh: 主要目标失败，无法获得技能点。\n返回桥边与山田先生会合。

english: I've turned the power back on. Head back to the security gates.
zh: 我已经恢复供电，返回安全门吧。

english: I've just seen Armstrong being air lifted out by helicopter along with a strange creature. Please advise.
zh: 我刚刚看到阿姆斯特朗和一个奇怪的生物一起被直升机空运走了，请指示下一步行动。

english: BRUNO: We can't save Armstrong now. See if you can find out where they are taking him.
zh: 布鲁诺：现在已经救不了阿姆斯特朗了，设法查清他们要把他带到哪里。

english: I've located the information on Armstrong's whereabouts. Advise on the next course of action.
zh: 我已经查到阿姆斯特朗的去向，请指示下一步行动。

english: BRUNO: Let's bring this place to the ground. Explosives are being air dropped to you now. Check outside to find them.
zh: 布鲁诺：把这里夷为平地吧。炸药正在空投给你，去外面找找。

english: I've planted explosive number 6. Let's return to the extraction point.
zh: 我已经安放了6号炸药，返回撤离点吧

english: The power to the security gates is off. Let's find the generator and restore power.
zh: 安全门断电了，去找发电机恢复供电

english: Headquarters, the I'm at the Rally Point. Please advise.
zh: 总部，我已抵达集合点，请指示。

english: You must wait for the rest of your team to arrive!
zh: 你必须等待队伍的其他成员抵达！

english: Great idea, but you don't have the File Identification Number for Project: Omega.
zh: 主意不错，但你没有欧米伽计划的文件识别编号

english: Maybe you should look for the File Identification Number for Project: Omega. It's probably stored in the vicinity.
zh: 也许你该寻找欧米伽计划的文件识别编号，它大概就存放在附近

english: Seven more Super Soldiers to go!
Six more Super Soldiers to go!
Five more Super Soldiers to go!
Four more Super Soldiers to go!
Three more Super Soldiers to go!
Two more Super Soldiers to go!
One more Super Soldier to go!
Rescue your pilot and prevent H.A.R.M. from blowing up your plane!
zh: 救出飞行员，并阻止H.A.R.M.炸毁你的飞机！

english: Sink the Super Secret Submarine and stop the Super Soldier invasion.
zh: 击沉超级秘密潜艇，阻止超级士兵入侵

english: This safe is opened by a special key. The lock cannot be picked.
zh: 这个保险柜需要特殊钥匙才能打开，无法用开锁器破解

english: It's an image of a crane.
This is a voice activated door.\nYour name isn't recognized by the security system.
zh: 这扇门由声纹启动。\n安全系统无法识别你的姓名。

english: This door is sealed by an emergency lockdown.\nYou'll need to interrupt power to the security system.
zh: 这扇门因紧急封锁而被密封。\n你需要切断安全系统的电源。

english: Hide! If you're caught now, you'll fail your mission.
zh: 躲起来！现在被抓住，任务就会失败！
告诉我有关任务目标的事
告诉我有关技能点的事

english: Enter the File Identification Number for Project: Omega.
zh: 输入欧米伽计划的文件识别编号

english: I'll meet you at the sweet shop on the west side of the neighborhood. Look for the sign with the crane near a vending machine.
zh: 我会在这一带西侧的点心铺与你会合，留意自动售货机附近带有仙鹤图案的招牌。

english: You found a letter containing classified information.
zh: 你找到了一封包含机密情报的信

english: You found a roll of 35mm film.
zh: 你找到了一卷35毫米胶卷
你找到了一张重要蓝图
你找到了一些散乱的文件
你找到了一盘开盘式录音带

english: Um, excuse me, miss. The Director has requested an audience with you.
zh: 呃，打扰一下，小姐，局长要见您。

english: Right, well, I'll just tell him you'll be along shortly then.
zh: 好的，那我就告诉他，您马上过去。

english: Mother, you can't keep calling me at work. I have an operation to run.
zh: 妈，你不能总往我工作的地方打电话，我还有行动要指挥。

english: What am I supposed to do? You're never at home. How do you expect me to get in touch with you, carrier pigeon?
zh: 那我还能怎么办？你从来都不在家，难道要我派信鸽联系你吗？

english: I haven't even told you why I called.
zh: 我还没告诉你为什么打电话呢。

english: Yes, well, maybe next time you'll get to the point instead of lambasting me for a quarter hour.
zh: 是啊，也许下次你能先说正事，而不是一开口就训我整整一刻钟。

english: Don't you hang up on me, do you hear me?
zh: 你敢挂我电话试试，听见没有？

english: Mr. Volkov has requested your services. He's expecting someone to crash our little party tonight. He wants you to make our uninvited guest feel at home. Permanently.
zh: 沃尔科夫先生需要你效劳。他料到今晚会有人来搅局，希望你能让这位不速之客宾至如归——永远留下。

english: When will my debt be paid, sensei.
zh: 我的债什么时候才能还清，师父？

english: When I tell you it is.
I promise we'll talk about it further, but first... Cate Archer must die!
zh: 我答应会再和你谈这件事，不过首先……凯特·阿彻必须死！

english: Don't be naive. You have many enemies.
zh: 别这么天真，你的仇家可不少。

english: A secret admirer, then? How flattering.
zh: 那就是某位暗恋者喽？真让人受宠若惊。

english: I'm impressed. I didn't expect you to make it this far.
zh: 真令我刮目相看，没想到你能走到这里。

english: Of course she is. Isako doesn't make mistakes. Do you, Isako?
zh: 当然死了。伊沙子从不失手，对吧，伊沙子？

english: Well, that's reassuring. Although I'd be even more reassured if you'd brought me proof.
zh: 那我就放心了。不过，要是你能带回证据，我会更放心。

english: Now, Dmitrij. What did you expect? Her head on a platter?
zh: 行了，德米特里。你还想要什么？把她的脑袋装在盘子里端来吗？

english: Director, your mother is on the phone.
Sensei. You said we could discuss my future when the girl was dead.
zh: 师父，您说过，等那个女人死后，我们就可以谈谈我的未来。

english: Your future? Your future is with us, my dear.
zh: 你的未来？亲爱的，你的未来就在我们这里。

english: Here's the number where you can reach me, old boy, although I'd encourage you not to.
zh: 这是能联系到我的号码，老伙计，不过我劝你最好别打。

english: I haven't had a proper vacation for 15 years. I won't be talked out of this one.
zh: 我已经十五年没正经休过假了，谁也别想劝我放弃这次假期。

english: I was referring to the idea of leaving me in charge.
zh: 我是说，把这里交给我负责这件事，请您再考虑一下。

english: Oh, do quit whining. Who else is there?
zh: 行了，别抱怨了。除了你还能有谁？

english: Well then, I'm off. See you in a few weeks.
Very lucky to be alive. The team found her just in time. She's been asking for you.
zh: 能活下来已经非常幸运了。救援队及时找到了她，她一直在问您。

english: Sorry I couldn't come to Tokyo. The business in Prague turned a bit messy. How the bloody hell are you?
zh: 抱歉没能去东京。布拉格那边的事情变得有些棘手。你到底怎么样了？

english: Ready to get back to work.
zh: 已经准备好回去工作了。

english: Hasty? It's been nearly two weeks.
I wouldn't recommend any strenuous activity.
zh: 我不建议你进行任何剧烈活动。

english: Listen to the doctor. I need you in tip top shape.
zh: 听医生的。我需要你恢复到最佳状态。

english: Then let me do something useful. I'm wasting away!
zh: 那就让我做点有用的事，我都快闲废了！

english: Temporary Director Lawrie, please report to the War Room immediately.
zh: 劳里临时局长，请立即前往作战室。

english: Don't ask. I've got to run. You stay put.
zh: 别问了，我得赶紧过去。你留在这里。

english: Gentlemen, sorry to have kept you waiting.
zh: 各位先生，抱歉让你们久等了。

english: Normally we wouldn't just barge in on you like this, but the situation is urgent. I'm Isaac Barnes. This is General Morgan Hawkins.
zh: 通常我们不会这样直接闯进来，但情况紧急。我是艾萨克·巴恩斯，这位是摩根·霍金斯将军。

english: Bruno Lawrie. Temporary Director of UNITY.
I thought I told you to stay put!
zh: 我不是让你留在那里吗！

english: Gentlemen, this is Agent Archer, one of our top undercover operatives.
zh: 各位，这位是阿彻特工，我们最优秀的卧底特工之一。

english: You ever swallow a lit cigar?
Mr. Lawrie, Ms. Archer, allow me to get straight to the point.
zh: 劳里先生，阿彻女士，请容我开门见山。

english: Are you familiar with the island of Khios?
In the Sea of Marmara. Indeed. It's highly coveted by all the major powers.
zh: 位于马尔马拉海。当然知道，各大强国都对它垂涎已久。

english: Something to do with its natural resources, isn't it?
zh: 是因为那里的自然资源吧？

english: Precisely. We've reason to believe the Soviets are planning to invade Khios within the next two weeks.
zh: 没错。我们有理由相信，苏联计划在未来两周内入侵希俄斯。

english: The second them Reds set foot on that island, Uncle Sam's got a Polaris-shaped surprise package waiting to be signed, sealed, and delivered right to Moscow.
zh: 那些红色分子只要一踏上那座岛，山姆大叔就会送上一份北极星导弹形状的惊喜包裹，签好字、封好口，直接送到莫斯科。

english: As the general suggests, the consequences of an invasion could be catastrophic. A full scale nuclear conflict is a distinct possibility.
zh: 正如将军所说，入侵的后果可能是灾难性的，爆发全面核战争的可能性非常高。

english: But Khios is virtually impregnable to a conventional assault. How are they planning to invade?
zh: 但希俄斯几乎不可能被常规进攻攻陷，他们打算怎么入侵？

english: We're hoping you can find out. All we know is that it involves a secret weapon program known as Project: Omega.
zh: 我们希望你们能查出来。目前只知道这与一项名为欧米伽计划的秘密武器项目有关。

english: We shoulda force-fed them Commies a nuke-u-ler sandwich back in '62.
zh: 早在六二年，我们就该把核弹三明治硬塞进那些共党分子的嘴里。

english: According to our spies, the Soviets are coordinating this project from an out of the way base in Siberia. We need to know what we're dealing with and we think the answer is somewhere inside that facility.
zh: 据我们的间谍报告，苏联人正在西伯利亚的一处偏远基地协调这项计划。我们必须弄清楚自己面对的是什么，而答案很可能就在那座设施里。
快点，不然我们要冻僵了。

english: I'll stay here. You start generator.
zh: 我留在这里，你去启动发电机。

english: If they find us, big trouble.
zh: 要是被他们发现，我们就有大麻烦了。
快点，不然他们要把门撞开了。

english: Your boss wants you on radio.
Foxhunt, this is Foxhound. We've left some items for you in the shed. The combination to the lock is 36 - 7 - 42.
zh: 猎狐，这里是猎犬。我们在棚屋里给你留了一些装备，锁的密码是36 - 7 - 42。

english: Snowmobile is out of gas. Look for gas can.
zh: 雪地摩托没油了，去找汽油桶。

english: Be careful of bridge. Many soldiers. Look for better way.
zh: 过桥时小心，那里有很多士兵。找条更安全的路。

english: Me too. I hate this place.
zh: 我也是，我讨厌这个地方。

english: I thought my wife's cooking was bad. She's a gourmet chef compared to whoever's running the kitchen around here.
zh: 我以前还觉得我老婆做饭难吃。和这里掌勺的人相比，她简直是顶级大厨。

english: Too bad, boys. We ain't leaving any time soon.
zh: 可惜了，小伙子们，我们暂时哪儿也去不了。

english: I should've taken that assignment in Cairo. At least it would've been warm.
zh: 我真该接下开罗的任务，至少那里暖和。

english: You didn't hear? Somebody blew up the Cairo headquarters.
zh: 你没听说吗？有人把开罗总部炸了。

english: Hard to say. Everybody's claiming responsibility. Probably Fine Feathered Fiends, but it could have been Anger Mismanagement or Pretty Poison.
zh: 很难说，所有人都在抢着认领。大概是“华羽恶徒”干的，不过也可能是“愤怒失控”或者“美丽毒药”。

english: Guess I made the right choice after all. At least there's plenty of vodka.
zh: 看来我终究还是选对了，至少这里伏特加管够。

english: Make me coffee. I'll be fine.
I'll drink coffee. You secure plane.
zh: 我喝咖啡，你去控制飞机。

english: Go on. I'll be there soon.
That makes 14, Mr. Volkov. Do you feel better yet?
zh: 这已经是第十四个了，沃尔科夫先生。您现在感觉好些了吗？

english: A little. Let's do one more.
Please, don't do this! I beg you!
zh: 求你了，别这样！我求求你！

english: Mother, we've been over this a thousand times. I'm NOT coming home for Christmas.
zh: 妈，这事我们已经说过上千遍了，我圣诞节不会回家。

english: You want to kill me like you killed your father.
zh: 你就想像害死你父亲一样害死我。

english: Mummy, Daddy died of dysentery in Kenya.
zh: 妈妈，爸爸是在肯尼亚死于痢疾的。

english: He died of a broken heart because you never amounted to anything. When I think of the sacrifices we made.
zh: 他是因为你一事无成，伤透了心才死的。一想到我们为你作出的那些牺牲……

english: Don't you hang up on me.
Marvin? Be a good chap and fetch me a little drinkie-pooh, would you?
zh: 马文？劳驾给我拿点小酒来，好吗？

english: Mr. Volkov was disappointed to learn that Cate Archer is still alive.
zh: 沃尔科夫先生听说凯特·阿彻还活着，非常失望。

english: She's my enemy. And you're my retainer. Or have you forgotten who saved your life all those years ago?
zh: 她是我的敌人，而你是我的家臣。还是说，你已经忘了多年前是谁救了你的命？

english: Don't tell me you're afraid of her.
Then kill her.  And bring back proof this time.
zh: 那就杀了她，这次把证据带回来。

english: Her head on a platter should suffice.
zh: 把她的脑袋装在盘子里端回来应该就够了。

english: We were hoping for something a little more conclusive.  What do you know about this H.A.R.M. organization?
zh: 我们希望得到更确凿一点的证据。你对H.A.R.M.这个组织了解多少？

english: We've had dealings with them before. They were barely competent at the time. Rumor has it they've restructured the organization since then, but nobody's quite sure what that means exactly.
zh: 我们以前和他们打过交道。那时候他们几乎是一群饭桶。传言说他们后来重组了组织，不过没人确切知道这到底意味着什么。

english: Means you didn't kick their butts hard enough.
zh: 说明你们当初揍得还不够狠。

english: If nothing else, we've established that Project: Omega is H.A.R.M.'s brainchild, even if we still don't know exactly what it is.
zh: 至少我们已经确认，欧米伽计划是H.A.R.M.一手策划的，尽管我们仍然不知道它究竟是什么。

english: That proposal we found was dated 1965.
zh: 我们找到的那份提案日期是1965年。

english: That means it was well underway during the H.A.R.M. incident last year.
zh: 这意味着去年发生H.A.R.M.事件时，这项计划早已全面展开。

english: We've already scoured the North American facility where they were keeping Doctor Schenker. There's no mention of Project: Omega in the files we recovered. Sadly, the Alpine facility was completely demolished.
zh: 我们已经彻底搜查过他们关押申克博士的北美设施，回收的文件中完全没有提及欧米伽计划。遗憾的是，阿尔卑斯设施已经被彻底摧毁了。

english: There's one other place I can think to look.
zh: 我还能想到另一个可以调查的地方。
我们已经搜过古德曼的房子了。

english: His name was Melvin Blitzny. Tom Goodman died in Amsterdam, remember?
zh: 他叫梅尔文·布利茨尼。汤姆·古德曼已经死在阿姆斯特丹了，记得吗？

english: Regardless, our teams have been through the place thoroughly.
zh: 不管怎么说，我们的队伍已经把那里彻底搜过了。

english: This is a waste of time.
Nothing a week's worth of rest won't clear up.
zh: 休息一个星期就没事了。

english: I don't have time for that. I have to find Armstrong.
zh: 我没那个时间，我得去找阿姆斯特朗。

english: Come on, ya jessies. You ain't even trying!
zh: 来啊，你们这群娘娘腔！根本没使劲嘛！

english: How'd you find me?  Oh, that's right, you're a spy.
zh: 你是怎么找到我的？哦，对了，你是间谍。

english: Having a tough go of it?
Well, it's eleven against one. Excuse me a moment.
zh: 毕竟是十一个打一个，稍等片刻。

english: Make that twelve. I didn't see the one in the corner. I won't be a minute.
zh: 现在是十二个。刚才没看见角落里那个，马上就好。

english: Right. Now what can I do for you?
zh: 好了，有什么需要我帮忙的？

english: I don't know. I've pretty much washed my hands of international intrigue.
zh: 不知道。我差不多已经彻底不碰国际阴谋这档子事了。

english: All we're asking is that you help Cate infiltrate the India branch.
zh: 我们只需要你帮助凯特潜入印度分部。

english: You don't need me for that.
A lot's changed since you left H.A.R.M. Security's tighter than ever.
zh: 你离开H.A.R.M.以后，那里变了很多，安保比以前严密多了。

english: Well, I suppose I could make a few calls, but don't expect me to get involved.
zh: 好吧，我可以打几个电话，不过别指望我亲自掺和进去。

english: Kamal, Magnus.  I'm coming to India.
zh: 卡马尔，马格努斯。我要去印度。

english: I have an appointment with Monsieur Volkov.
zh: 我和沃尔科夫先生有约。

english: I was sent for by Dmitrij Volkov.
zh: 是德米特里·沃尔科夫派人召我来的。

english: I'm sorry, can you speak up?

zh: 带我去见沃尔科夫，现在。

english: I just want to say, Monsieur, that it is an honor to stand in the presence of the legendary Dmitrij Volkov. You are, without a doubt, the Michelangelo of murder.
zh: 我只想说，先生，能够站在传奇人物德米特里·沃尔科夫面前，是我的荣幸。毫无疑问，您就是杀人界的米开朗基罗。

english: Well, that's very kind of you.
Monsieur Volkov, tell me who did this to you and I shall exact terrible vengeance.
zh: 沃尔科夫先生，请告诉我是谁把您害成这样，我一定让他遭到可怕的报复。

english: Now then. You're probably wondering why I've summoned one of the world's most dangerous contract killers on such short notice.
zh: 那么，你大概在想，我为什么这么匆忙地召来世界上最危险的职业杀手之一。

english: Because you want me to kill someone?
Not just someone.  I want you to kill Cate Archer.
zh: 不是普通人，我要你杀掉凯特·阿彻。

english: How do I convince them to hire me?
zh: 我要怎么说服他们雇用我？

english: Demonstrate your value to them. Maybe they need a maid.
zh: 向他们证明你的价值。也许他们正缺一个女佣。

english: Right. I'll stay here. You grab him and find out what he's after.
zh: 好，我留在这里。你去抓住他，问清楚他的目的。

english: Kamal sent me to meet you.

zh: 你为什么不先表明身份？

english: I thought I was being followed.
Kamal is waiting for you at the... gasp.
I said grab him, not stab him.
zh: 我是让你抓住他，不是捅他。

english: He was about to tell me where to meet Kamal.
zh: 他刚才正准备告诉我去哪里见卡马尔。

english: Not a problem. Kamal said he'd wear a pink carnation so you'd recognize him.
zh: 没问题。卡马尔说他会戴一朵粉色康乃馨，好让你认出他。

english: I can't afford to be seen.
I'll handle this. You look for Kamal.
zh: 这里交给我，你去找卡马尔。

english: It's not like I blend in.
zh: 我这模样又不可能混在人群里。

english: Ah, there you are! I was beginning to worry.
zh: 啊，你终于来了！我都开始担心了。

english: This map shows the location H.A.R.M.'s hideout. I left a package for you in a newspaper box near there.
zh: 这张地图标出了H.A.R.M.藏身处的位置。我在附近的报箱里给你留了一个包裹。

english: Oh, before I forget, you'll probably need some money to get by Crazy Harij. Fifty rupees should be enough.
zh: 哦，差点忘了。你大概还需要点钱才能通过疯狂哈里吉那一关，五十卢比应该够了。

english: No one passes without paying Harij.
zh: 不给哈里吉钱，谁也不许通过。

english: I've told you MANY times: fifty rupees if you want through this gate.
zh: 我已经告诉你很多次了：想通过这扇门，就交五十卢比。

english: If I catch you charging tolls again, I'll arrest you. I swear it.
zh: 要是再让我发现你私自收过路费，我就逮捕你。我说到做到。

english: No! No! It's NOT your gate. I'm warning you!
zh: 不！不是！这不是你的门，我警告你！

english: Now get out of my sight.
Who is this I'm speaking to?
Who is this I'M speaking to?
zh: 请问我又是在和谁通话？

english: Balaji, you idiot, it's me, Anoop.
zh: 巴拉吉，你这个白痴，是我，阿努普。

english: Oh! I was wondering if that was you, my good friend. How are you?
zh: 哦！我刚才还在想是不是你呢，我的好朋友。你过得怎么样？

english: Fine, thank you. So, what is the password for today? Have you thought of something?
zh: 很好，谢谢。那么，今天的密码是什么？你想好了吗？

english: I have! And I think you'll like it very much!
zh: 想好了！而且我觉得你一定会非常喜欢！

english: Okay. The password for the day is... Are you ready?
zh: 好，今天的密码是……准备好了吗？
穆利加汤。你觉得怎么样？

english: I think I should feed you to ferocious weasels.
zh: 我觉得应该把你喂给凶猛的黄鼠狼。

english: I don't know what you're talking about.
The chief of security. Where can I find him?
zh: 保安主管，我在哪里能找到他？

english: We don't have a chief of security.
zh: 我们这里没有保安主管。

english: Isn't this H.A.R.M.'s Indian headquarters office?
zh: 这里不是H.A.R.M.的印度总部吗？

english: Supposing this were H.A.R.M. and you did have a security chief named Anoop Banerjee, where would I find him?
zh: 假设这里就是H.A.R.M.，而且你们确实有一位名叫阿努普·班纳吉的保安主管，那我在哪里能找到他？

english: Down the hall. His office is on the second floor.
zh: 沿走廊直走，他的办公室在二楼。

english: You don't have clearance to leave this building. I'll tell Banerjee you want to see him.
zh: 你没有离开这栋楼的权限。我会告诉班纳吉你想见他。

english: Now's your chance, Cate. Get into Banerjee's office and plant a bug on his phone. Don't get caught!
zh: 机会来了，凯特。进入班纳吉的办公室，在他的电话上安装窃听器。别被发现！

english: Jolly good! Now find the junction box. According to Intelligence, it's somewhere on the first floor.
zh: 干得漂亮！现在去找接线箱。根据情报，它就在一楼的某处。

english: It was those Evil Alliance bastards.
Pacpac managed to save two cases of Sparkle Soda, but they got all the ice cream and candy.
zh: 帕克帕克设法保住了两箱闪亮汽水，可冰激凌和糖果全被他们抢走了。

english: Curse them! They've pushed us too far this time. Return to base immediately. We must prepare.
zh: 该死！他们这次欺人太甚。立即返回基地，我们必须做好准备。

english: Prem? Bring the girl to my office. I will see her now.
zh: 普雷姆？把那个姑娘带到我办公室，我现在就见她。

english: Mr. Banerjee is a busy man. Please don't waste his time.
zh: 班纳吉先生很忙，请不要浪费他的时间。

english: Where do you think you're going?
If you do not want to speak to Mr. Banerjee, you must leave.
zh: 不想和班纳吉先生谈，就必须离开。

english: I'm warning you. This is your last chance.
zh: 我警告你，这是最后一次机会。

english: Very well. You obviously don't want to speak to him. Get out or I'll throw you out!
zh: 很好，看来你显然不想和他谈。滚出去，否则我就把你扔出去！

english: I believe she's in the restroom.
Excuse me, miss? The boss will see you now.
zh: 打扰一下，小姐？老板现在要见您。

english: I'm beginning to grow concerned about you.
Please come out or I shall break down the door.
zh: 请出来，否则我就要破门了。

english: Guards! Don't let her get away!
Even if I did work for this H.A.R.M. company, how could I be guaranteed of your qualifications?
zh: 就算我真的在这家名叫H.A.R.M.的公司工作，我又怎么能确定你具备相应的能力？

english: I'm told that Evil Alliance has an office in the area.
zh: 听说“邪恶联盟”在这一带设有办事处。

english: I wouldn't know. But, please, go on.
Well, what if I were to bring you the contents of their safe and wreck their operation?
zh: 要是我把他们保险柜里的东西带给你，再顺手摧毁他们的行动呢？

english: Let's just say that if I were responsible for hiring people for an organization like the one you describe, I would be very impressed by such a bold display.
zh: 这么说吧，假如我负责替你所描述的那种组织招聘人员，我一定会对这种大胆的表现印象深刻。

english: Girlie, I don't need a lecture. I'm a big boy. Besides, to be perfectly honest, there's not that much difference between me drunk and me sober.
zh: 小姑娘，我可不需要你教训。我已经是大人了。而且说实话，我喝醉和清醒时也没多大区别。

english: Well, I think I've got the job.
zh: 好了，我想我已经得到这份工作了。

english: That's a good start, but not good enough. From what Kamal tells me, you'll need a higher security clearance if you want to get near that safe.
zh: 这是个不错的开始，但还不够。据卡马尔所说，想接近那个保险柜，你需要更高级别的安全权限。

english: I guess I'll have to get myself promoted.
You're hired. It's an entry level position, but I think you'll find the salary and benefits very competitive. Welcome to H.A.R.M.
zh: 你被录用了。这只是一个初级职位，不过我想你会发现这里的薪资和福利相当有竞争力。欢迎加入H.A.R.M.。

english: You startled me. She's quite intimidating, isn't she?
zh: 你吓了我一跳。她看起来很有威慑力，对吧？

english: Kali is a paradox. Protector and destroyer. She nearly demolished the world in her attempt to save it.
zh: 迦梨是个矛盾的存在，既是守护者，也是毁灭者。为了拯救世界，她险些将整个世界摧毁。

english: Isn't that always the case. What happened?
zh: 这种事似乎总是如此。后来发生了什么？

english: There was a demon general called Raktabija, whose every drop of blood, when shed upon the ground, would birth a new Raktabija... until the battlefield was covered with them. In their despair, the gods called upon Parvati, consort of Lord Shiva. Taking the form of Kali, she rode into battle, spreading out her tongue to catch the demon's blood before it could touch the soil and spawn new armies. But she became drunk on his blood and her victory dance threatened to tear the world apart, until Lord Shiva threw himself beneath her feet and the sight of him calmed her.
zh: 曾经有一位名叫罗陀毗阇的恶魔将军。他每流一滴血到地上，就会诞生一个新的罗陀毗阇……直到整个战场都被他们占满。绝望之中，众神向湿婆神的配偶帕尔瓦蒂求助。她化身为迦梨，冲入战场，伸出舌头接住恶魔的鲜血，不让它落到土地上滋生新的军队。可她饮下鲜血后陷入狂醉，胜利之舞几乎将世界撕裂。最后，湿婆神躺到她脚下，她看到丈夫后才平静下来。

english: And not unlike my wife. Except that she would continue dancing.
zh: 而且和我妻子很像，只不过她肯定会继续跳下去。

english: You should wash your hands with hot water.
I suggest you wash your hands with hot water.
There is a lavatory through those doors and to the right.
zh: 穿过那些门后右转就是洗手间。

english: As I said, you should wash your hands. Use hot water.
zh: 我说过了，你应该去洗手，用热水。

english: Hey, everyone! It's Cate Archer! British superspy!
zh: 嘿，各位！是凯特·阿彻！英国超级间谍！

english: Get to the street! Armstrong is waiting for you!
zh: 快到街上去！阿姆斯特朗正在等你！

english: Why are you testing my patience?
zh: 你为什么非要挑战我的耐心？

english: Hey, you, give us a hand, willya?
I expected more of a challenge.
zh: 我还以为会更有挑战性。

english: So this is the mighty Cate Archer? I'm not impressed.
zh: 这就是大名鼎鼎的凯特·阿彻？真让我失望。

english: When I get out of here, I'm gonna pound that pasty face of yours through the nearest wall.
zh: 等我从这里出去，我要把你那张惨白的脸直接砸进最近的一堵墙里。

english: It's a long way down, mon ami. The only way you'll get out of that cage is to leak out like onion soup.
zh: 下面可深得很，我的朋友。你想从笼子里出来，唯一的办法就是像洋葱汤一样从缝里漏出去。

english: Oui? Okay, sounds like Fred Astaire?  Bicycle?  Pony?
zh: 是吗？好吧，听起来像弗雷德·阿斯泰尔？自行车？小马？
我的天啊！直接告诉我不行吗！

english: Sir, come quickly! We have a problem outside!
zh: 先生，快来！外面出问题了！

english: No good. The door's barred from the other side.
zh: 没用，门从另一边闩住了。

english: Stand back. I'm gonna ram it.
Not exactly what I had in mind.
zh: 这可不是我想象中的办法。

english: You're gonna have to get this door open, lassie.
zh: 你得想办法把门打开，小姑娘。

english: Why am I getting shot at?
They're mine. You can't have them.
zh: 她们是我的，你不能抢走她们。

english: I'll report this to the Director.
zh: 我会向局长报告这件事。

english: You won't be so lucky next time.
zh: 下次你就不会这么走运了。

english: Aunt Phyllis tells me you still haven't called her. The woman is lying on her deathbed and you can't be bothered to make a telephone call.
zh: 菲莉丝姨妈告诉我，你还是没给她打电话。她都已经躺在病床上快死了，你却连一通电话都懒得打。

english: Mother, Aunt Phyllis used to keep me locked in the cellar whenever you sent me to stay with her.
zh: 妈，您以前每次把我送到菲莉丝姨妈家，她都会把我锁在地窖里。

english: If I'd known what an ingrate you'd turn out to be, I would have locked you in the cellar too! I swear, if your father...
zh: 早知道你会变成这种忘恩负义的东西，我当初也该把你锁进地窖！我发誓，要是你父亲……

english: Goodbye, Mummy. Lovely to hear your voice.
zh: 再见，妈妈。听到您的声音真令人愉快。

english: Yes, sir. The division is currently en route to the test area.
zh: 完成了，先生。部队目前正在前往测试区。

english: Good. We'll kill two birds with one stone.  Is there something else?
zh: 很好，这样可以一石二鸟。还有别的事吗？

english: There has been a slight complication.
Finally some good news for a change. All this diplomacy crap's giving me a headache.
zh: 总算有点好消息了。搞这些该死的外交把戏都快让我头疼死了。

english: Our agents are closing in as we speak.
zh: 我们的特工正在逼近目标。

english: You really impressed me back there.
zh: 你刚才的表现真让我刮目相看。
听听你这哭哭啼啼的样子。

english: All you had to do was grab him, you dumb ox.
zh: 你只需要抓住他，你这头蠢牛。

english: Well, at least you got his coat. Maybe he'll freeze to death.
zh: 至少你抢到了他的外套，也许他会冻死。

english: Excuse me. Agent Archer, the site should be just beyond that ridge ahead.
zh: 打扰一下，阿彻特工，目标地点应该就在前方那道山脊后面。

english: I didn't realize I was in the company of a genius.
zh: 没想到我竟然在和一位天才同行。

english: I've kicked your arse before; I can do it again.
zh: 我以前能揍你，现在照样可以。

english: When did you become such a bully?
zh: 你什么时候变得这么蛮横了？

english: Wait here. I'll have a look around.
zh: 在这里等着，我去四处看看。

english: I hope you don't break a nail.
Do you want to wait in the plane?
Here, I'll give you a boost.
You have to stop him. He's out of control.
zh: 你必须阻止他，他已经失控了。

english: Poor Hotchkins. He tried to warn them.
zh: 可怜的霍奇金斯，他试图警告他们。

english: The other subjects were fine, but that one... that one was different.
zh: 其他实验体都很正常，可那一个……那一个不一样。

english: Willpower. That's what it was. We should have increased its chemical treatments.
zh: 是意志力，就是这个原因。我们本该加强对他的化学处理。
可怜的，可怜的霍奇金斯。

english: H.A.R.M.'s planning a field test! They're going to use the super soldiers to destroy their Indian headquarters! As punishment!
zh: H.A.R.M.正在策划一次实地测试！他们要用超级士兵摧毁自己的印度总部，以此作为惩罚！

english: It may have already started. I'm on my way there. Alert the police and tell them not to try to fight back. Just evacuate the area.
zh: 也许已经开始了。我现在正赶去那里。通知警方，让他们不要试图反击，只需要疏散这一带。

english: If your men can keep the soldiers busy, I'll see about getting those people out of there.
zh: 让你的人拖住那些士兵，我来想办法把那些人救出来。

english: I guess so. What about you? Are you all right?
zh: 应该没事。你呢？你还好吗？

english: I think I'm out of a job.
Ms. Archer, I'm glad you came back. I have news about Magnus Armstrong.
zh: 阿彻女士，你能回来真是太好了。我有关于马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗的消息。

english: What is it? Is he all right?
He's in the custody of H.A.R.M.
Is this the information on the super soldiers?
zh: 这是关于超级士兵的资料吗？

english: I think I left them in the cafeteria.
zh: 我想我把它落在食堂了。

english: As you can see from this diagram, I've got it all figured out. You give me twelve hours, I'll give you Mother Russia.
zh: 正如你从这张图上看到的，我已经把一切都计划好了。给我十二个小时，我就把俄罗斯母亲交给你。

english: Not a very detailed plan of attack.
zh: 这进攻计划可不怎么详细。

english: We can work out the details later. The first thing is to get El Presidente to sign off on the idea.
zh: 细节之后再慢慢研究。第一件事，是让总统先生批准这个想法。

english: Let me know what he says.
General Hawkins was just explaining his plan for invading Russia.
zh: 霍金斯将军刚才正在解释他的俄罗斯入侵计划。

english: Of course, he left out the part where he describes what actually happens during the invasion.
zh: 当然，他略过了真正开始入侵以后究竟要做什么的部分。

english: Too bad his zeal isn't matched by his intelligence.
zh: 可惜他的热情没有与智力相匹配。

english: I don't know about you Brits, but us Americans ain't gonna sit on our muffins waiting for the bomb to fall.
zh: 我不知道你们英国人怎么想，但我们美国人可不会坐在那里干等着炸弹落下来。

english: I'd describe how the plan works, but it's kinda technical. It'd go right over your purty little head.
zh: 我倒是可以解释这项计划的原理，不过内容有点技术性，凭你那漂亮的小脑袋恐怕听不懂。

english: Why don't you stick to swapping recipes and leave the thinking to us.
