english: Perhaps you can ask the flower vendor.
Yes, I saw a man with a carnation. He was here a short time ago.
zh: 对，我见过一个戴康乃馨的男人，他不久前还在这里。

english: I heard someone was murdered near here!
Wearing a carnation? No, I'm sorry.
Did you hear about the murder? What is this neighborhood coming to?
zh: 听说那起谋杀了吗？这个街区到底怎么了？

english: Why don't you ask the florist?
zh: 为什么不去问花店老板？

english: The man was about 6 feet tall with a bushy red beard, wearing a skirt.
zh: 男人大约六英尺高，留着浓密红胡子，穿着裙子。

english: I don't know much about women's fashion. Anyway, the girl looked European with brown hair, an orange shirt, and striped pants. She was the one with the gun.
zh: 我不懂女装。总之，那个女人看起来像欧洲人，棕色头发，穿橙色上衣和条纹裤子。拿枪的是她。

english: Just arrest them. We'll sort out the details later.
zh: 先逮捕他们，细节以后再弄清楚。

english: Yes, a man bought a pink carnation from me just a few minutes ago. Are you his friend? He dropped that.
zh: 是的，几分钟前有个男人从我这里买了一朵粉色康乃馨。你是他的朋友吗？他掉了这个。

english: Who's been eating my mango chutney!?! My mother made that for ME!!!
zh: 谁吃了我的芒果酸辣酱？！那是我妈妈专门给我做的！！！

english: Where is that idiot woman? She was supposed to be here 20 minutes ago.
zh: 那个蠢女人去哪儿了？她本该二十分钟前就到。

english: A man was killed behind the Hotel Happy Guest! They say it was a gang of bandits!
zh: 有人在快乐宾客酒店后面被杀了！听说是一群强盗干的！

english: I'm told a family was mauled by wild dogs at the Hotel Happy Guest. How tragic!
zh: 听说有一家人在快乐宾客酒店被野狗咬伤了，真悲惨。

english: I wish those gangsters had taken over a different movie theater. This one had such comfortable seats.
zh: 真希望那些匪徒占领的是另一家电影院，这家的座椅原本特别舒服。

english: You, there. I bring word from Kamal. He wants to meet you.
zh: 你，过来。我带来了卡马尔的消息，他想见你。

english: Sadly, I forgot where I saw him. You'll have to find him yourself.
zh: 遗憾的是，我忘了在哪里见到他，你只能自己找。

english: Like you, I am a victim of injustice. I have been driven away from my precious gate by nasty policemen.
zh: 和你一样，我也是不公正待遇的受害者。那些讨厌的警察把我从心爱的城门赶走了。

english: I realize you must find me irresistible, but I'm tired of talking to you.
zh: 我知道你肯定觉得我无法抗拒，但我已经厌倦和你说话。

english: The acting was terrible! And the special effects? The blood looked like red paint!
zh: 演技糟透了！还有特效呢？那些血看起来就像红油漆！

english: It was arterial spray. It's brighter because it contains more oxygen. And how can you criticize the acting considering the movies YOU like?! I give up.
zh: 那是动脉喷血。因为含氧量更高，所以颜色更鲜艳。考虑到你喜欢的那些电影，你怎么有脸批评演技？！我不说了。

english: My favorite part is where she starts to undress and then the truck drives through the wall. I was laughing so hard soda shot out of my nose.
zh: 我最喜欢她开始脱衣服，然后卡车撞穿墙壁的那一段。我笑得太厉害，汽水都从鼻子里喷出来了。

english: I like the scene in the bar with the guy with the thing and the other guy with the eye patch? I thought I was going to have to be hospitalized from laughing too much. What a great movie.
zh: 我喜欢酒吧那场，有个拿着那东西的人，还有另一个戴眼罩的人？我笑得差点需要住院。真是部好电影。

english: You, there! I said put out this fire!
Hello, Agent Archer. How are you today?
zh: 你好，阿彻特工。今天过得怎么样？

english: Are you, are you actually talking to me? Wow.
zh: 你……你真的在和我说话吗？哇。

english: Hi, Cate. Mildred said to thank you for the flowers. She's feeling much better.
zh: 嗨，凯特。米尔德里德让我谢谢你的花，她感觉好多了。

english: I don't feel well at all.
It's the girl from the poster!
Why are you trying to intimidate me?
Please don't point that thing at me.
zh: 请不要拿那东西指着我。

english:
Public Notice: Village curfew@PUBLIC NOTICE:

A mandatory curfew is in effect tonight from 6:00pm to 6:00am. Residents caught out of doors during these hours will be dealt with severely. 

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
Katakuri Ninja Clan
zh:
公告：村庄宵禁@公共告示：

今晚将实行强制宵禁，时间为下午6:00至次日上午6:00。凡在此期间被发现身处户外的居民，都将受到严厉处置。

室井春子
助理管理员
片栗忍者一族

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Patrols@To all clan members:

We expect the spy to enter the village from the east, where most of the best tourist attractions are concentrated, but it's also possible she'll approach from the direction of the falls. Please report to your assigned posts promptly this evening. It is recommended you eat before your shift begins, as our food budget was used up by last month's attack on the Oshii clan headquarters.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：巡逻@致全体族人：

我们预计那个间谍会从村庄东侧进入，因为那里集中了大部分最受欢迎的旅游景点，不过她也可能从瀑布方向接近。今晚请准时前往各自负责的岗位。建议大家在轮班开始前先吃饭，因为我们的伙食预算已经被上个月对押井一族总部的袭击耗尽了。

室井春子
助理管理员

english:
UNITY Dossier: Ninjas@Cate,

While information on the ninja clan in Inotakimura is somewhat scarce, we have been able to ascertain the following details:

- Ninjas are trained to lunge great distances for powerful strikes against their enemies.

- They can use smoke bombs to vanish, often reappearing close to their targets for surprise attacks.

I hope this information proves helpful. Take care of yourself.

Bruno Lawrie
Senior Field Operative
UNITY Special Operations Division
zh:
UNITY档案：忍者@凯特：

尽管有关稻泷村忍者一族的情报相当有限，但我们仍然确认了以下几点：

- 忍者能够向前突进很长一段距离，对敌人发动强力攻击。

- 他们可以利用烟雾弹消失，并经常在目标附近重新现身，发动突袭。

希望这些信息能对你有所帮助。保重。

布鲁诺·劳里
高级外勤特工
UNITY特别行动部门

english:
UNITY Memo: Bonus objectives@Agent Archer,

Sometimes you will come across opportunities for bonus assignments which you can complete for additional Skill Points. Keep your eyes open for intelligence items such as notes, briefcases, or letters.

Here's a simple optional objective for practice: I've scattered six pages from the UNITY field manual throughout the general area. Collect them all before moving on.

Santa,
Director of Gadgetry
UNITY Toymaker Division
zh:
UNITY备忘录：奖励目标@阿彻特工：

有时你会遇到可供完成的奖励任务，完成后可获得额外技能点。请注意搜集笔记、公文包或信件等情报物品。

这里有个简单的可选目标，供你练习：我把UNITY外勤手册中的六页内容散落在这片区域各处。继续前进之前，请将它们全部收集起来。

圣诞老人
工具研发局局长
UNITY玩具制造部门

english:
UNITY Manual: Searching@SEARCHING

Enemies often carry valuable items such as ammunition, armor, first aid, or important documents, so be sure to search them thoroughly by holding down the Action button until the progress bar disappears. You may want to move your victims into the shadows before searching them to avoid drawing unwanted attention.

You can also search filing cabinets and stacks of paper for hints and useful intelligence items. It is often by searching that you will find bonus objectives.
zh:
UNITY手册：搜查@搜查

敌人经常携带弹药、护甲、急救用品或重要文件等有价值的物品，因此务必彻底搜查他们。持续按住“操作”键，直到进度条消失，即可拿走其携带的全部物品。为了避免引来不必要的注意，搜查前可以先把倒下的敌人搬到阴暗处。

你也可以搜查文件柜和成堆的纸张，从中寻找提示与有用的情报物品。许多奖励目标都需要通过搜查才能发现。

english:
UNITY Manual: Unconscious enemies@UNCONSCIOUS ENEMIES

Enemies that are knocked unconscious, such as by a taser or sleeping gas, will eventually wake up. They may also be roused by their comrades.

You can disarm unconscious enemies by searching them, thereby eliminating them as a threat unless they obtain a replacement weapon.
zh:
UNITY手册：昏迷的敌人@昏迷的敌人

被电击枪或催眠气体等手段击昏的敌人最终会醒来，也可能被同伴唤醒。

搜查昏迷的敌人可以解除其武装。除非他们重新获得武器，否则将不再构成威胁。

english:
UNITY Manual: Action button@ACTION BUTTON

When you target an object or character you can interact with, text will appear at the center of the screen to indicate what will happen when you press the Action button (default: Right Mouse Button). If the text is grayed out, you cannot interact with the item until some condition is met. For example, you may have to unlock a door or acquire a necessary inventory item.

The Action button will reload your currently selected weapon (assuming it can be reloaded) if nothing is targeted.
zh:
UNITY手册：操作键@操作键

当你瞄准可以互动的物体或角色时，屏幕中央会显示文字，说明按下“操作”键（默认：鼠标右键）后将发生什么。如果文字呈灰色，则表示必须先满足某项条件才能互动。例如，你可能需要先打开门锁，或取得必要的物品栏道具。

若当前没有瞄准任何目标，按下“操作”键会为当前选中的武器装弹，前提是该武器可以装弹。

english:
UNITY Manual: Hiding@HIDING

Whenever you enter a potential hiding place, the Hiding Place icon will appear at the bottom of your screen. If you stand perfectly still, you will momentarily become hidden, at which point enemies won't see you until they're right upon you. You will stay hidden as long as you remain in the hiding place and don't move quickly or fire a weapon.

If you can't hide because an enemy knows where you are, the icon will be crossed out.
zh:
UNITY手册：隐藏@隐藏

每当你进入一个可能的藏身处时，屏幕底部都会出现“藏身处”图标。只要完全静止不动，片刻后便会进入隐藏状态。此时，除非敌人几乎走到你面前，否则无法看见你。只要继续留在藏身处，不快速移动，也不开枪，就能保持隐藏状态。

如果敌人已经知道你的位置，导致你无法隐藏，图标上会出现叉号。

english:
UNITY Manual: Intelligence items@INTELLIGENCE ITEMS

Be sure to search everywhere for important documents. Some may contain information vital to your current mission. Others may give you Skill Point rewards.

Documents you pick up can be viewed at any time during a mission by accessing the Intelligence screen (default hotkey: I).
zh:
UNITY手册：情报物品@情报物品

务必仔细搜索各处的重要文件。其中一些可能包含当前任务所必需的情报，另一些则会提供技能点奖励。

任务期间，你可以随时进入“情报”界面（默认快捷键：I），查看已经取得的文件。

english: UNITY Manual: Leaving an area 1@LEAVING AN AREA, PART 1\n\nWhen you see the Door icon, it means you are approaching the end of an area. Move forward to exit, but only if you're finished exploring.
zh: UNITY手册：离开区域1@离开区域，第1部分\n\n看到“门”图标时，表示你正在接近该区域的出口。确认已经探索完毕后，继续向前即可离开。

english:
UNITY Memo: Presents@Agent Archer,

Whenever possible, I will arrange to leave useful equipment or ammunition for you in the field. Keep an eye out for foiled-wrapped presents like this one.

The coins you'll find in this package are worth more than their face value suggests, as you can throw them to distract enemies. You can even lure enemies away from their posts by tossing a coin around a corner or into an alley.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：礼物@阿彻特工：

条件允许时，我会设法在行动区域中为你留下有用的装备或弹药。请留意像这个一样用锡纸包装的礼物。

这个包裹里的硬币远比面值更有用，因为你可以把它们扔出去吸引敌人的注意。把硬币投向拐角另一侧或小巷里，甚至可以把敌人从岗位上引开。

圣诞老人

english: Reminder: Mission status@MISSION SCREEN\n\nConsult the Mission screen (default hotkey: Tab) for information on your current assignment. Here you will find your current objectives, which you must complete in order to accomplish your mission. Optional objectives (secondary tasks you can perform for bonus Skill Points) are also listed here, along with Parameters, which are general guidelines or rules of conduct. Violating parameters may result in forfeited Skill Point rewards or even mission failure.
zh: 提醒：任务状态@任务界面\n\n请查看“任务”界面（默认快捷键：Tab），了解当前任务的相关信息。这里会列出完成任务所必需的当前目标，也会显示可选目标，即完成后可获得额外技能点的次要任务，以及行动要求，也就是一般性的指导或行为准则。违反行动要求，可能导致无法获得技能点奖励，甚至造成任务失败。

english: Reminder: Equipment screen@EQUIPMENT SCREEN\n\nWhenever you acquire new weapons, gadgets, or ammunition, remember that you can consult the Equipment screen (default hotkey: M) at any time for information on their features and uses. This screen also lets you select equipment and ammunition or gadget functions while the game is paused.
zh: 提醒：装备界面@装备界面\n\n获得新武器、工具或弹药后，请记住，你可以随时进入“装备”界面（默认快捷键：M），查看它们的特点与用途。游戏暂停时，也可以在这里选择装备、弹药类型或工具功能。

english: Reminder: Skill points@SKILL POINTS\n\nYou will be awarded Skill Points for overcoming certain obstacles or accomplishing specific objectives. Access the Player screen (default hotkey: P) to spend these points to improve your abilities. Consider your playing style carefully before investing your points.
zh: 提醒：技能点@技能点\n\n克服某些障碍或完成特定目标后，你会获得技能点。进入“玩家”界面（默认快捷键：P），即可使用这些技能点提升能力。投入技能点前，请仔细考虑自己的游玩风格。

english: Reminder: Neutralizing enemies@NEUTRALIZING ENEMIES\n\nYou can dispatch enemies stealthily by using quiet weapons like the taser, crossbow, or a silenced pistol. If enemies are alerted to your presence, they will cry out when injured, attracting attention.
zh: 提醒：悄无声息地解决敌人@解决敌人\n\n你可以使用电击枪、十字弓或消音手枪等安静的武器，悄无声息地解决敌人。如果敌人已经发现你，他们受伤时会大声呼喊，引来其他人的注意。

english: Reminder: Moving bodies@MOVING BODIES\n\nEnemies will become alarmed if they see a fallen comrade, but you can use the Move Body key (default: G)to pick up incapacitated adversaries and drop them somewhere out of the way. You won't be able to run or use a weapon when carrying a body, so time your movements carefully.
zh: 提醒：搬运尸体@搬运尸体\n\n敌人看到倒下的同伴时会提高警惕，不过你可以按“搬运尸体”键（默认：G）抬起失去行动能力的敌人，再把他们放到不显眼的地方。搬运尸体时无法奔跑或使用武器，因此必须谨慎选择行动时机。

english:
Reminder: Disturbances@DISTURBANCES

Enemies can hear just about any sound you can, so learn to move carefully. You can Sneak (default: Left Shift) to move silently. Also, certain materials (such as grass, carpet, or snow) will muffle your footfalls, while other materials (such as metal or ceramic tile) amplify sound. 

Also, bumping into wind chimes or knocking over a bottle can cause a disturbance, so watch your step.
zh:
提醒：骚动@骚动

敌人几乎能听到你能听到的所有声音，因此要学会谨慎移动。你可以使用“潜行”（默认：左Shift键）悄无声息地移动。此外，草地、地毯或积雪等材质会减弱脚步声，而金属或瓷砖等材质则会放大声音。

另外，碰响风铃或撞倒瓶子都会引起骚动，因此要留意脚下。

english: Reminder: Leaning@LEANING\n\nLean around corners (default: Q and E) to see what lies ahead. Don't peek too long or enemies may come to investigate.
zh: 提醒：探身观察@探身观察\n\n你可以从拐角处探身（默认：Q键和E键），观察前方情况。不过别探头太久，否则敌人可能会过来调查。

english: UNITY Manual: Compass@COMPASS\n\nIn addition to keeping you oriented within the environment, your compass can provide other useful information. The Objective icon will direct you to locations crucial to your mission. You may also occasionally see an X, which indicates waypoints or other important destinations.
zh: UNITY手册：指南针@指南针\n\n除了帮助你在环境中辨别方向外，指南针还能提供其他有用信息。“目标”图标会指向任务中的关键地点。你有时还会看到一个X，表示路径点或其他重要目的地。

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Cate Archer@ATTENTION ALL CLAN MEMBERS

Be on the lookout for UNITY agent Cate Archer. She is to be considered armed and extremely dangerous. Report any sightings to Takashi-san at once. 

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：凯特·阿彻@全体族人注意

请严密搜寻UNITY特工凯特·阿彻。应将她视为携带武器且极度危险的人物。发现其踪迹后，立即向隆先生报告。

室井春子
助理管理员

english: UNITY Manual: Difficulty@DIFFICULTY SETTINGS\n\nKeep in mind that you can adjust the difficulty of your mission at any time by bringing up the Options menu, selecting Game, and choosing the desired setting. Difficulty settings primarily affect how much damage enemies do to you, so if you find yourself becoming frustrated or not feeling challenged enough, try modifying the setting to suit your needs.
zh: UNITY手册：难度@难度设置\n\n请记住，你可以随时打开“选项”菜单，选择“游戏”，再选择所需设置，调整任务难度。难度设置主要影响敌人对你造成的伤害。如果你感到过于沮丧，或者觉得挑战性不足，可以尝试修改难度，以符合自己的需要。

english: UNITY Manual: Saving@SAVING\n\nRemember to save your progress from time to time, either by using the Save Game option in the System menu or the Quicksave key (F6). Also, keep in mind that your progress is autosaved whenever you enter a new area, so you have the option of restarting the level if necessary.
zh: UNITY手册：保存@保存\n\n请记得不时保存进度。你可以使用“系统”菜单中的“保存游戏”选项，或按快速保存键（F6）。此外，每当你进入新区域时，游戏都会自动保存进度，因此必要时可以选择重新开始当前关卡。

english: UNITY Manual: Distractions@DISTRACTIONS\n\nOne of the most effective means of slipping past enemy agents is to distract them. For example, you can toss a coin down a dark alley to lure guards away from their posts. If the threat of an intruder doesn't get their attention, the distinctive chime of loose change on pavement surely will. If you don't have a coin, you can always improvise with your crossbow. Just don't cause too much of a ruckus or you'll alarm your enemies.
zh: UNITY手册：转移注意@转移注意\n\n转移敌人的注意，是从敌方特工身边溜过的最有效方式之一。例如，你可以把硬币扔进昏暗的小巷，将守卫从岗位上引开。即便闯入者的威胁无法吸引他们，零钱落在路面上的清脆声响也一定可以。如果手头没有硬币，也可以利用十字弓随机应变，不过不要闹出太大动静，否则会惊动敌人。

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Meeting moved@IMPORTANT! PLEASE READ!

At the Director's insistence, tonight's meeting has been moved to the main house. Please be sure to consult the revised guard post overview before reporting for duty to minimize confusion. If you will be patrolling an unfamiliar area, make sure to note the location of convenient restrooms.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：会议地点变更@重要！请务必阅读！

应局长的坚持，今晚的会议已改至主宅举行。为避免混乱，请在上岗前务必查看修订后的守卫岗位一览。如果你将在不熟悉的区域巡逻，请记下附近洗手间的位置。

室井春子
助理管理员

english:
Note from Hatori-san: Instructions@Agent Archer,

I've left you instructions for how and where to contact me. For security reasons, I've placed four encoded notes around the neighborhood, each of which contains a portion of the message. That way, if one of the notes is intercepted and decoded, my safety will not be compromised.

I also left a present for you near a vending machine.

Isamu Hatori
zh:
羽鸟先生的便条：联络说明@阿彻特工：

我给你留下了与我取得联系的方式和地点。出于安全考虑，我在这一带放置了四张加密便条，每张都包含消息的一部分。这样一来，即使其中一张被截获并破解，我的安全也不会受到威胁。

我还在一台自动售货机附近给你留了一份礼物。

羽鸟勇

english: Note from Hatori-san: Rendezvous@I'll meet you at the sweet shop on the west side of the neighborhood. Look for the sign with the crane.
zh: 羽鸟先生的便条：会合地点@我会在这一带西侧的点心铺与你会合。留意带有仙鹤图案的招牌。

english: Note from Hatori-san: Red mailbox@There are three mailboxes in front of the sweet shop. You must arrange them in a specific sequence to signal me.\n\nThe red mailbox should be open.
zh: 羽鸟先生的便条：红色邮箱@点心铺前面有三个邮箱。你必须按特定状态排列它们，作为与我联络的信号。\n\n红色邮箱应保持打开。

english: Note from Hatori-san: Gray mailbox@There are three mailboxes in front of the sweet shop. You must arrange them in a specific sequence to signal me.\n\nThe gray mailbox should be closed.
zh: 羽鸟先生的便条：灰色邮箱@点心铺前面有三个邮箱。你必须按特定状态排列它们，作为与我联络的信号。\n\n灰色邮箱应保持关闭。

english: Note from Hatori-san: Blue mailbox@There are three mailboxes in front of the sweet shop. You must arrange them in a specific sequence to signal me.\n\nThe blue mailbox should be open.
zh: 羽鸟先生的便条：蓝色邮箱@点心铺前面有三个邮箱。你必须按特定状态排列它们，作为与我联络的信号。\n\n蓝色邮箱应保持打开。

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Complaints@To all clan members:

It has come to my attention that some of you are dissatisfied with our current assignment. I realize that the Director is not an especially pleasant person to work for, but remember that Isako-san owes him a debt of honor. Please put aside your personal grudges for the sake of our clan.

If you have trouble coping with your resentment, Obaba will be available for counseling as soon as she finishes up her latest batch of poison.

Mikiko Shena
Morale Officer
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：不满情绪@致全体族人：

我注意到，有些人对我们目前的任务心怀不满。我明白局长并不是个特别好相处的雇主，但请记住，伊沙子欠他一份救命之恩。为了我们一族，请暂且放下个人恩怨。

如果你们难以排解心中的怨气，等祖母完成最新一批毒药后，可以找她接受开导。

米纪子·舍纳
士气官

english:
Note: Briefcase delivery@Agent Archer

Please deliver this briefcase to Hatori-san at your earliest convenience. It contains information pertinent to his next assignment.

Santa
zh:
便条：递送公文包@阿彻特工：

请尽快将这个公文包交给羽鸟先生。里面装有与他下一项任务有关的情报。

圣诞老人
间谍手册@间谍训练手册

english:
Letter from Isako: Page 1@To: Hideko Sato
From: Isako, Leader of the Katakuri Ninja Clan

I am grateful for your concern, but I cannot accept your generous offer. As you know, I owe the Director a debt of honor. I could not possibly stand aside and let him be slain, even though his death would free me. My conscience could not abide such a betrayal.
zh:
伊沙子的来信：第1页@收件人：佐藤英子
发件人：片栗忍者一族首领伊沙子

感谢你的关心，但我无法接受你的好意。你也知道，我欠局长一份救命之恩。即便他的死能让我重获自由，我也不可能袖手旁观，任由他被杀。我的良心无法容忍这种背叛。

english: Letter from Isako: Page 2@Perhaps if you understand the circumstances of my obligation you will appreciate my reasoning. After my parents were murdered, I was found wandering the streets of Kyoto by an old woman. Her fragile health prevented her from caring for me, but she convinced her daughter, then the leader of the Sakuragaoka ninja clan, to take me in and train me.
zh: 伊沙子的来信：第2页@也许你了解我为何负有这份恩义后，就能理解我的选择。父母被杀后，我独自在京都街头流浪，后来被一位老妇人发现。她身体虚弱，无法照顾我，于是说服了自己的女儿——当时樱丘忍者一族的首领——收留我，并训练我成为忍者。

english: Letter from Isako: Page 3@When I turned 14, I was sent on my first assignment: to assassinate a greedy merchant who had been stealing girls from their families to use as prostitutes in his gambling dens. It was a simple task, but I was captured before I could kill him, having been betrayed by the very man who had commissioned the assassination. He had tricked us so that he could apprehend me and earn his master's favor.
zh: 伊沙子的来信：第3页@十四岁时，我接到了人生中的第一个任务：刺杀一名贪婪的商人。那人强抢少女，逼她们在自己的赌坊里卖淫。任务本来很简单，可我还没来得及杀掉他就被捕了，因为委托我们刺杀他的那个人背叛了我。他从一开始就在利用我们，目的是抓住我，讨好自己的主人。

english: Letter from Isako: Page 4@Before the merchant could have me put to death, his European friend intervened, asking that I be spared so that I might work for him. The merchant agreed, and the Director, for that's who it was, became my new master. So, you see, as much as it grieves me, I owe this man my life and must repay his generosity, however selfishly motivated it was. But I thank you most humbly for your consideration.\n\nIsako
zh: 伊沙子的来信：第4页@商人正准备处死我时，他的一位欧洲朋友出面干预，要求留下我的性命，让我为他效力。商人答应了，而那位欧洲人正是局长，从此他便成了我的新主人。所以你看，尽管这令我十分痛苦，我毕竟欠他一条命，必须报答他的救命之恩，哪怕他的善意完全出于自私的目的。不过，我仍由衷感谢你的关心。\n\n伊沙子

english:
Note from Hatori-san: Apologies@Agent Archer,

Due to increased ninja activity, I can no longer remain in the area. Please make your way back to the bridge, where Yamata-san awaits your return.

Be extremely careful. I have never seen the clan so determined.

Isamu Hatori
zh:
羽鸟先生的便条：致歉@阿彻特工：

由于忍者活动加剧，我已无法继续留在这一带。请返回桥边，山田先生正在那里等你。

务必格外小心。我从未见过这一族如此坚决。

羽鸟勇

english:
UNITY Memo: Talking to people@Agent Archer

Always talk to people identified as friends to see if they have useful advice or information. You may have to address them several times to hear everything they have to say.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：与人交谈@阿彻特工：

见到被标记为友方的人物时，务必与其交谈，看看他们是否能提供有用的建议或情报。有时你需要与同一个人多次交谈，才能听完他想说的全部内容。

圣诞老人

english:
Letter: The Director@Dear Mr. Jones,

I've gathered some information about this mysterious Englishman. According to local sources, he purchased the Fujioka estate more than ten years ago. He's been overheard to say that his reason for coming to Japan was its distance from England, although no one seems to know why that would be important to him. I will investigate further.

Isamu Hatori
zh:
信件：局长@亲爱的琼斯先生：

我搜集到了一些有关这名神秘英国人的情报。据当地消息，他在十多年前买下了藤冈宅邸。有人曾听他说，自己来到日本，是因为这里离英国很远，不过似乎没人知道这一点对他为何如此重要。我会继续调查。

羽鸟勇

english:
Letter: Isako's birthday@My dear Isako,

I realize I have not always been the most ideal mentor and that you serve me more out of a sense of duty than any real allegiance. I can't say I particularly blame you. All the same, I hope you can understand how important you are to me.

Honor and competence are rare enough among the arrogant, law abiding hypocrites I am sworn to terrorize. In our industry, they're all but non-existent.

Happy birthday.

The Director
zh:
信件：伊沙子的生日@亲爱的伊沙子：

我知道自己并不总是一位理想的导师，也明白你为我效力，更多是出于责任感，而不是真正的忠诚。我不能说这完全怪你。尽管如此，我仍希望你能明白，你对我有多么重要。

在那些我发誓要让其胆战心惊、自命不凡又守法虚伪的人当中，荣誉与能力已经十分罕见；而在我们这一行，这两种品质更是几乎不存在。

生日快乐。

局长

english:
Note: Isako and the Director@Honorable Assistant Administrator,

Last night, I was on guard duty at the main house. As I was patrolling along the roof, I heard laughter through an open window. The Director was in the middle of explaining to his dinner guests the manipulative games he must play in order to placate his loyal ninja servant. He said that like a dog, Isako is easily swayed by occasional demonstrations of paternal warmth. You MUST tell her! The man is intolerable.

Masayo
zh:
便条：伊沙子与局长@尊敬的助理管理员：

昨晚，我在主宅值守。沿屋顶巡逻时，我从一扇打开的窗户里听见了笑声。当时，局长正在向赴宴的客人讲述，自己为了安抚那名忠心耿耿的忍者侍从，必须施展哪些操纵人心的手段。他说，伊沙子就像一条狗，只要偶尔对她表现出几分父亲般的温情，就很容易让她动摇。你一定要告诉她！这个男人实在令人无法忍受。

雅代

english:
Note: Chalk marks@Agent Archer,

Hatori-san informed us that he observed a ninja placing chalk marks in front of three buildings in this area. We presume these marks are signals for agents making dead drops of valuable items or information.

Please try to locate and erase these marks so that we can redirect delivery to sites of our choosing.

Santa
zh:
便条：粉笔标记@阿彻特工：

羽鸟先生告诉我们，他看到一名忍者在这一带三栋建筑前留下了粉笔标记。我们推测，这些标记是供特工投放贵重物品或情报时使用的秘密信号。

请尽量找到并擦除这些标记，以便我们将投递地点引导到自己选择的位置。

圣诞老人

english:
Note: Patience@Masayo-san

I understand and share your frustration, but we must be patient. Isako-san's sense of honor is very deep. Hearsay won't convince her to set it aside. I know this from experience. Someday he will betray himself to her. All I can do is make sure he always has plenty of sake on hand to keep his tongue loose.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
便条：耐心@雅代小姐：

我理解你的不满，也有同样的感受，但我们必须耐心等待。伊沙子的荣誉感根深蒂固，仅凭传闻无法让她放下这份恩义，这一点我深有体会。总有一天，他会亲自在她面前露出真面目。我能做的，就是确保他手边始终有足够的清酒，让他酒后失言。

室井春子
助理管理员

english:
Note from Hatori-san: Caution@Agent Archer,

When you reach the target area, be careful not to make too much noise! If you cause a disturbance, you'll lose your chance to photograph the Director. It would be a shame to miss out on the Skill Point reward by being reckless.

Isamu Hatori
zh:
羽鸟先生的便条：小心行事@阿彻特工：

到达目标区域后，千万不要发出太大声响！一旦引起骚动，你就会失去拍摄局长的机会。要是因为鲁莽行事而错过技能点奖励，那就太可惜了。

羽鸟勇

english:
UNITY Memo: Utility Launcher@Agent Archer,

The CT-180 Utility Launcher is one of our most versatile tools. Its default ammunition is a miniature Tracking Device that will mark a target's position on your compass. The dart is lightweight enough that enemies will not notice being hit by it. 

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：多功能发射器@阿彻特工：

CT-180 多功能发射器是我们用途最广泛的工具之一。其默认弹药是一枚微型追踪装置，可在指南针上标出目标的位置。飞镖非常轻，敌人甚至不会察觉自己被击中。

圣诞老人

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Alert@All clan members should be on full alert! The spy is still at large! Set up roadblocks along the eastern and southern approaches!

Do not let her escape!

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：警戒@全体族人必须进入最高警戒状态！那个间谍仍然在逃！在东侧和南侧入口设置路障！

绝不能让她逃走！

室井春子
助理管理员

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: The spy@ATTENTION ALL CLAN MEMBERS

I want the spy to die honorably and quickly. The Director and his soulless minion shall get no satisfaction from her death.

Isako
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：间谍@全体族人注意

我要那个间谍死得光荣而迅速。绝不能让局长和他那没有灵魂的走狗从她的死亡中得到满足。

伊沙子

english:
Note: Emiko Late@Emiko,

Where are you? The alarm has sounded and everyone must report to their posts. If you get this note, hurry over before Isako-san notices you are missing!

Yukiko
zh:
便条：惠美子迟到@惠美子：

你在哪里？警报已经响了，所有人都必须前往岗位。看到这张便条后赶快过来，别让伊沙子发现你不在！

由纪子

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Cate Archer@ATTENTION ALL CLAN MEMBERS

The target of tonight's operation is Cate Archer, British superspy. Do not underestimate her.

Oh, and make sure she suffers.

The Director
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：凯特·阿彻@全体族人注意

今晚行动的目标是英国超级间谍凯特·阿彻，不要低估她。

另外，务必让她受尽折磨。

局长

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Punitive poetry reading@ATTENTION ALL CLAN MEMBERS

The Director has stated that should the spy escape, the entire clan will be subjected to a punitive poetry recitation featuring his mother's collected works, including her epic, "My Ungrateful Son," her valiant but otherwise inexcusable contribution to the Icelandic saga tradition.

For the sake of your colleagues, please observe the strictest vigilance.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：惩罚性诗歌朗诵@全体族人注意

局长表示，如果间谍逃脱，全族都将被迫参加惩罚性诗歌朗诵会，内容包括他母亲的作品全集，其中还有史诗《我那忘恩负义的儿子》——这是她对冰岛萨迦传统英勇但完全不可原谅的贡献。

为了同伴着想，请保持最高程度的警戒。

室井春子
助理管理员

english:
Ninja Clan Memo: Party cancellation@ATTENTION ALL CLAN MEMBERS

Because of tonight's ongoing emergency, we will be rescheduling Mikiko-san's birthday celebration for tomorrow night.

Haruko Muroi
Assistant Administrator
zh:
忍者一族备忘录：聚会取消@全体族人注意

由于今晚的紧急情况仍在持续，米纪子小姐的生日庆祝活动将改至明晚举行。

室井春子
助理管理员

english: UNITY Manual: Leaving an area 2@LEAVING AN AREA, PART 2\n\nA Door icon with a two-way arrow indicates that you can return to an area after leaving it. Occasionally, you will have to go back and forth between areas to overcome obstacles or accomplish certain objectives.
zh: UNITY手册：离开区域2@离开区域，第2部分\n\n带双向箭头的“门”图标表示离开后仍可返回该区域。有时为了克服障碍或完成特定目标，你必须在不同区域之间来回移动。

english:
Soviet Memo: Drowning@To: All Personnel
From: Human Resources

The productivity of our great installation has suffered due to the unfortunate, probably accidental drowning deaths of comrades Zymlyanoi and Alexei last week. Patrols are hereby prohibited from taking shortcuts across the frozen lake until further notice.

You are being watched.
zh:
苏联备忘录：溺水@收件人：全体人员
发件人：人力资源部

上周，兹姆利亚诺伊同志和阿列克谢同志不幸且很可能意外溺亡，导致我们伟大设施的生产效率受到影响。即日起，巡逻人员禁止抄近路穿越结冰湖面，直至另行通知。

你正在受到监视。

english:
UNITY Memo: Welder@Agent Archer,

I've added a little something extra to your hairspray. Use it to weld off certain types of metal locks and hinges. Good luck!

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：焊接器@阿彻特工：

我在你的发胶里加了一点额外功能。用它可以焊断某些类型的金属锁和铰链。祝你好运！

圣诞老人

english:
Soviet paperwork: Cigarette rations@To: All Personnel

Addendum 90/C-4 of the Personal Hygiene & Fitness Manual (volume 7, page 3,483) stipulates a daily ration of 18 cigarettes per soldier. Exceeding this allowance is punishable by death, unless the cigarettes are stolen (which is punishable by torture and death) or given freely by a comrade (punishable by torture but not by death). Failure to meet the 18 cigarette quota is also punishable by death.

You are being watched.
zh:
苏联文件：香烟配给@收件人：全体人员

《个人卫生与体能手册》第90/C-4号补充条款（第7卷，第3483页）规定，每名士兵每日配给18支香烟。超过配额者将被处死，除非香烟是偷来的——这种情况将受到拷问并处死；或由同志自愿赠送——这种情况只受拷问，不处死。未达到每日18支香烟配额者同样将被处死。

你正在受到监视。

english:
UNITY Memo: Mission brief@Agent Archer

Our intelligence suggests that getting into the facility will be much simpler than getting out. Therefore, your first objective will be to sabotage the enemy's communications and power supply.

You'll also need to plant charges at a bridge near your current position for detonation on your return. Destroying the bridge should cut off any pursuit.

I've marked the position of a hunting cabin where we've left you some additional supplies, including a sniper rifle that should come in handy.

Santa.
zh:
UNITY备忘录：任务简报@阿彻特工：

我们的情报显示，进入设施会比离开容易得多。因此，你的首要目标是破坏敌方通信和电力供应。

你还需要在当前位置附近的一座桥上安放炸药，返程时引爆。摧毁桥梁应该可以切断追兵。

我已经标出一座狩猎木屋的位置，我们在那里给你留了额外补给，包括一支应该很有用的狙击步枪。

圣诞老人

english:
UNITY Memo: Utility launcher@Agent Archer,

I've enclosed a standard issue CT-180 Utility Launcher with 10 reusable tranquilizer darts. Each dart delivers a powerful sedative that will put a target to sleep instantly. Note that unconscious enemies will awaken eventually.

You can use the Change Ammo key (default: F) to cycle between your Tranquilizer and Tracking Bug ammunition. Remember that you can also go to the Equipment screen to switch ammunition while the game is paused.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：多功能发射器@阿彻特工：

随附一具标准配发的CT-180 多功能发射器，以及10枚可重复使用的麻醉飞镖。每枚飞镖都会注入强效镇静剂，使目标立即入睡。请注意，昏迷的敌人最终会醒来。

你可以使用“切换弹药”键（默认：F），在麻醉飞镖和追踪器弹药之间切换。请记住，游戏暂停时也可以进入“装备”界面切换弹药。

圣诞老人

english:
UNITY Memo: Hunting cabin@Agent Archer,

Please find the supplies our agent left for you.

When you've completed your objectives, return here and radio headquarters. You'll want to wait for dark before proceeding to the military compound.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：狩猎木屋@阿彻特工：

请找到我方特工为你留下的补给。

完成目标后返回这里，通过无线电联系总部。继续前往军事设施前，最好等到天黑。

圣诞老人

english:
Soviet paperwork: Coffee consumption@To: All Personnel

Addendum 90/C-4 of the Personal Hygiene & Fitness Manual (volume 12, page 4) specifies that every soldier may consume no more and no less than 9 cups of coffee per day. Personnel caught diluting their coffee with water or other liquid substances will be shot on sight. Anyone caught pouring coffee into planters or down drains will be executed by lethal injection. Giving your coffee to a dog is punishable by filing duty in the Main Records Building.

You are being watched.
zh:
苏联文件：咖啡摄入量@收件人：全体人员

《个人卫生与体能手册》第90/C-4号补充条款（第12卷，第4页）规定，每名士兵每日饮用咖啡不得多于或少于9杯。被发现用水或其他液体稀释咖啡者将被当场击毙。被发现把咖啡倒进花盆或下水道者将被注射处决。把咖啡喂狗者将被罚去主档案大楼整理文件。

你正在受到监视。

english:
Soviet Memo: M-9 access request@Lieutenant Guniko,

I am writing to request access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area in the Main Records Building. I have been reassigned to Project: Omega, but cannot report for duty without proper security clearance. I have already submitted several requests for clearance, but they were denied due to the fact that I do not have access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area. I am unsure how to proceed.

Respectfully,
Corporal Butsenko
zh:
苏联备忘录：M-9访问申请@古尼科中尉：

我写信申请进入主档案大楼的M-9数据处理单元区域。我已被调往欧米伽计划，但没有适当安全权限便无法报到。我已经提交过数次权限申请，却都因我无权进入M-9数据处理单元区域而遭到拒绝。我不知道该怎么办。

谨致敬意
布岑科下士

english:
Soviet Memo: M-9 access denial@Corporal Butsenko,

I am afraid I cannot approve your request for access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area. Although I appreciate the difficulty of your circumstances, I do not have the authority to grant security clearance to anyone who does not already have access to the M-9 Data Processing Unit area. Once you have obtained the necessary authorization, I can provide the necessary authorization. I hope this information makes everything clear for you.

Lieutenant Guniko
zh:
苏联备忘录：M-9访问申请驳回@布岑科下士：

恐怕我无法批准你进入M-9数据处理单元区域的申请。虽然我理解你的困难，但我无权向任何尚未拥有M-9数据处理单元区域访问权的人授予安全权限。等你取得必要授权后，我便可向你提供必要授权。希望这些信息已经把一切解释清楚。

古尼科中尉

english:
Document: Readiness Report Part I@Soviet Military Readiness Report

Part I. Background Information

This report has been prepared in accordance with the wishes of General Nikolai Zhukov, who is a very nice general and one of my personal heroes. Did you know that General Zhukov was a decorated veteran of the Great Patriotic War? It's true! He is also an avid botanist with a special interest in cruciferous plants, which I too like very much. Especially chard.
zh:
文件：战备报告第1部分@苏军战备报告

第1部分：背景资料

本报告依照尼古拉·朱可夫将军的意愿编写。他是一位非常亲切的将军，也是我个人崇拜的英雄之一。你知道朱可夫将军是卫国战争中荣获勋章的老兵吗？这是真的！他还是一位热衷植物学的爱好者，尤其喜爱十字花科植物，而我也非常喜欢，特别是牛皮菜。

english:
Soviet Paperwork: Fuel request@REQUISITION FORM J-9:

1. Item(s) Requested: Vehicle Fuel, 10 barrels.
2. Reason for Request: Inadequate supply.
3. By making this Request, are you suggesting that the Soviet Union isn't meeting your needs? ( )Yes (x)No
zh:
苏联文件：燃料申请@J-9申请表：

1.申请物品：车辆燃料，10桶。
2.申请理由：供应不足。
3.提交本申请是否意味着你认为苏联无法满足你的需求？（ ）是（x）否

english:
Soviet Report: BLINDSIDE@To: General Zhukov
From: KLAUS

BLINDSIDE is proceeding on schedule. Of all our illustrious operations against the Main Adversary, none has ever been as bold or ambitious as this, nor as guaranteed to secure such absolute victory for the Soviet Union and total humiliation for our enemies. I shall report again once I've made contact with MR. BIG and outlined our proposal. I'm sure he will be most receptive to our generous offer.
zh:
苏联报告：侧击行动@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：克劳斯

“侧击行动”正在按计划推进。在我们针对主要敌人的所有光辉行动中，从未有任何一次如此大胆、如此雄心勃勃，也从未有任何行动如此有把握为苏联赢得绝对胜利，并让敌人彻底蒙羞。等我与“大人物”接触并说明提案后，会再次汇报。我相信他一定会欣然接受我们慷慨的条件。

english:
Soviet Report: BLINDSIDE stalled@To: General Zhukov
From: KLAUS

BLINDSIDE is dead in the water. I suspect treachery, as my attempts to meet with MR. BIG have been repeatedly foiled. The Main Adversary must have learned of our intentions to recruit President Johnson, which explains why I cannot schedule an appointment with him. I am confident that even a five minute interview would have been sufficient to turn him to our cause, but the Americans are extremely crafty. Trust no one.
zh:
苏联报告：侧击行动受阻@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：克劳斯

“侧击行动”已经彻底停滞。我怀疑有人背叛，因为我多次试图与“大人物”会面，却一再遭到阻挠。主要敌人一定已经获悉我们准备招募约翰逊总统的意图，这就解释了为什么我无法预约他。我确信只需五分钟面谈，就足以让他加入我们，但美国人极其狡猾。不要相信任何人。
间谍训练手册@间谍训练手册

english:
Document: Readiness Report Part II@Soviet Military Readiness Report

Part II. Conclusions

As has already been stated, General Zhukov is a most admirable individual whose numerous outstanding achievements provide an excellent example for all good Soviets to follow. He is fond of cross country skiing, Siberian folk music, and romantic evenings on the shore of Lake Baikal with any of his various mistresses, including my wife, Nadia. In conclusion, I think it's clear that the Soviet military is blessed with a leader whose wisdom is all the readiness we could ever ask for.
zh:
文件：战备报告第2部分@苏军战备报告

第2部分：结论

正如前文所述，朱可夫将军是一位极其令人敬佩的人物，他众多卓越成就为所有优秀苏联公民树立了绝佳榜样。他喜爱越野滑雪、西伯利亚民间音乐，以及和众多情妇中的任何一位在贝加尔湖畔度过浪漫夜晚，其中也包括我的妻子娜迪娅。总而言之，我认为很明显，苏军有幸拥有这样一位领袖，他的智慧就是我们所需的全部战备。

english:
Soviet Memo: Sabotage@TOP SECRET ANTI-SABOTAGE REPORT

Comrade Karpov,

After inspecting your facility, I would conclude that the only serious threat of sabotage you face would arise from a demolition charge placed inside the access panel between the two main generators. Obviously, the likelihood that a decadent capitalist spy would recognize this opportunity is virtually non-existent.

I need hardly mention that this report should be kept under lock and key.

Corporal Butsenko
zh:
苏联备忘录：破坏行动@绝密反破坏报告

卡尔波夫同志：

检查过你们的设施后，我认为你们面临的唯一严重破坏威胁，是有人把爆破炸药安放在两台主发电机之间的检修面板内。显然，腐朽的资本主义间谍识破这一机会的可能性几乎不存在。

不用我提醒，这份报告必须锁好保管。

布岑科下士

english:

1.Reason for request: 4th Quarter progress report for General Zhukov on Project Omega
2. Date required:

苏联文件：M-9访问申请@M-9数据处理单元访问申请

1.申请理由：向朱可夫将军提交欧米伽计划第四季度进展报告
2.所需日期：
（ ）三个月后
（ ）六个月后
（ ）明年某个时候

3.若选择“其他”，必须提供三名亲属姓名，以备申请被拒且需要执行惩罚性处决：奥列格·安德罗波夫、谢尔盖·奥西波夫、列娜·奥西波娃

english:
Letter: Anya's Visit@Dearest Sergei,

Thank you for your kind letter. Of course I forgive you. I understand that you were drunk. Besides, the scar tissue is hardly noticeable.

I can't believe you got me three pairs of American blue jeans! I miss you so much. I must come visit at once! You're sure they are the right size? Oh, but how I long to see you. I'm so excited! How I've dreamed of blue jeans!

Anya
zh:
信件：安雅来访@最亲爱的谢尔盖：

谢谢你亲切的来信，我当然原谅你。我明白你当时喝醉了，而且疤痕组织几乎看不出来。

真不敢相信你给我弄到了三条美国牛仔裤！我太想你了，必须马上去看你！你确定尺寸合适吗？啊，我多么渴望见到你。我太兴奋了！我做梦都想要牛仔裤！

安雅

english:
Letter: Anya's Reassurance@Darling Sergei,

How can you even think such a thing, my sweet?! I'm excited about the jeans, of course, but it's YOU I want to see. I'm not the kind of woman to hold a grudge against a man for breaking a bottle of vodka over her head for no reason! I think of those few days I spent in the hospital as a much needed vacation. And the doctor says the seizures shouldn't last much longer! Aren't you excited to see me in American denim?

Anya
zh:
信件：安雅的安慰@亲爱的谢尔盖：

亲爱的，你怎么会这么想？！我当然对牛仔裤很兴奋，但我真正想见的是你。我可不是那种会因为一个男人毫无缘由地把伏特加酒瓶砸在自己头上，就一直怀恨在心的女人！我把住院的那几天当成一次十分需要的假期。而且医生说抽搐应该不会持续太久了！想到我穿着美国牛仔布的样子，你难道不兴奋吗？

安雅

english:
Letter: Anya's Forgiveness@Sergei, my love,

I can't wait to see you! It is thoughtful of you to leave the back door unlocked, but I'm concerned about the electrified security fence. Remember what happened to poor Yuri's wife last summer? Although the new hairstyle suits her. My brother said you could pour some sugar in the fuel tank of generator that powers the security fence since it's on a separate circuit. He used to be stationed there.

Anya
zh:
信件：安雅的宽恕@谢尔盖，我的爱人：

我等不及要见你了！你特意不锁后门很体贴，但我担心带电的安全围栏。还记得去年夏天可怜的尤里妻子发生了什么吗？不过新发型倒挺适合她。我哥哥说，给安全围栏供电的发电机使用独立回路，可以往燃料箱里倒些糖。他以前就驻扎在那里。

安雅

english: UNITY Memo: Fuel depot sabotage@Agent Archer,\n\nThe fuel depot that supplies the base is located in the outer yard near your current position. Sabotaging it will serve two purposes. First, it should create a rather dramatic diversion to help facilitate your exfiltration from the base. Second, it will cripple the base's operations until it can be repaired, which will benefit our upcoming covert missions in the vicinity. The timer on this explosive is set to detonate during your escape.
zh: UNITY备忘录：破坏燃料库@阿彻特工：\n\n为基地供应燃料的燃料库位于你当前地点附近的外院。破坏它能达到两个目的：首先，它会制造相当壮观的骚动，帮助你撤离基地；其次，在修复前会瘫痪基地运作，有利于我们即将在附近展开的秘密任务。这枚炸药的计时器已经设定，会在你逃离时引爆。

english:
Recipe for Soup@Russian Cabbage Soup: 

1 lb rump roast, 1 medium head shredded cabbage, 1 large onion, 2 tbsp vinegar, 1 clove garlic, 2 tbsp sugar. 

In large pot, cover ingredients with cold water. Let stand for 1 hour. Boil 3 hours.
zh:
汤的食谱@俄式卷心菜汤：

1磅臀肉牛排、1颗中等大小的卷心菜切丝、1个大洋葱、2汤匙醋、1瓣大蒜、2汤匙糖。

将所有材料放入大锅，用冷水没过。静置1小时，煮沸3小时。

english: Note: No more cabbage!@No more Cabbage Soup! Have you spent time near the latrine? Have mercy on your fellow comrades!
zh: 便条：别再吃卷心菜了！@别再做卷心菜汤了！你在厕所附近待过吗？可怜可怜你的同志们吧！

english:
Note: Strange package@Lieutenant Pupkin,

I found this strange package while on patrol near the southern wall. Its shiny, attractive wrapping leads me to suspect an elaborate Capitalist plot. I will rely on your wise judgment to decide what to do with it.

Sergeant Kominski
zh:
便条：奇怪的包裹@普普金中尉：

我在南墙附近巡逻时发现了这个奇怪包裹。它闪亮诱人的包装使我怀疑这是一场精心策划的资本主义阴谋。我将依靠您的英明判断，决定如何处理。

科明斯基中士

english: Before you even THINK about pouring sugar in this fuel tank so your little sweetie can get past the electrified fence, remind yourself of what befell Sergei Putkin, whose conscientious lady friend, Anya, offered a tearful confession to me the morning after he sabotaged the generator to sneak her into the compound. Remind yourself of the worms gnawing the skin from his cowardly, unpatriotic bones.\n\nYou are being watched.
zh: 在你哪怕只是想到往这个燃料箱里倒糖，好让你的小情人通过带电围栏之前，先想想谢尔盖·普特金的下场。他破坏发电机、把她偷偷带进基地后的第二天早上，他那位尽责的女友安雅流着泪向我坦白了一切。想想那些蛆虫如何啃噬他懦弱、不爱国的尸骨皮肉。\n\n你正在受到监视。

english:
Soviet paperwork: Resubmission form@REQUISITION RESUBMISSION FORM J-9-17b ADDENDUM

According to Page 137 of the Instructions for Completing Requisition Form J-9: "failure to specify a Delivery Priority is generally acceptable due to the fact that requisitioned items are rarely if ever sent anyway." Just to be safe, however, I am resubmitting a fully completed REQUISTION FORM J-9 along with a REQUISTION RESUBMISSION FORM and this REQUISITION RESUBMISSION FORM ADDENDUM.

Please do not liquidate my family.
zh:
苏联文件：重新提交表@J-9-17b申请重新提交表补充条款

根据《J-9申请表填写说明》第137页：“由于申请物品通常很少甚至从不发放，因此未填写交付优先级通常可以接受。”不过为安全起见，我仍重新提交一份填写完整的J-9申请表，以及一份申请重新提交表和本申请重新提交表补充条款。

请不要处决我的家人。
