english:
Soviet Memo: Addendum G-9@To: Human Resources
From: Lieutenant Petrakov

Due to the issuance of Addendum G-9 of the Disciplinary Action Form, which offers two new voluntary punitive alternatives to Filing Duty (specifically, Death by Firing Squad and Death by Asphyxiation), please prepare for an increase in firing squad and asphyxiation requests.
zh:
苏联备忘录：G-9补充条款@收件人：人力资源部
发件人：彼得拉科夫中尉

鉴于《纪律处分表》G-9补充条款新增了两种可自愿选择、用来替代整理文件的惩罚方式——具体为行刑队枪决和窒息处死——请做好枪决与窒息申请数量增加的准备。

english: UNITY Manual: Security cameras@SECURITY CAMERAS\n\nIf a security camera spots you, an alarm will sound, bringing reinforcements to search the area. It will take the camera a moment to focus and identify you as a threat, so learn to duck back out of sight the moment you hear the distinctive mechanical whine of the lens turning. Because cameras are monitored remotely, destroying them will raise an alarm, but you can use special camera disabling ammunition for your CT-180 Utility Launcher to render them inoperative.
zh: UNITY手册：监控摄像机@监控摄像机\n\n如果监控摄像机发现你，就会拉响警报，引来援军搜索该区域。摄像机需要片刻才能对焦，并将你识别为威胁，因此一旦听到镜头转动时独特的机械声，务必立即躲回视线之外。由于摄像机受到远程监控，摧毁它们也会触发警报。不过，你可以为CT-180 多功能发射器使用专门的摄像机干扰弹，使其失效。

english:
UNITY Memo: Camera disabler@Agent Archer,

I hope this package reaches you safely. I had to send it by rather unconventional means. 

Enclosed you will find a CT-180 Utility Launcher with Camera Disabler ammunition. These devious devices attach to a security camera, capture images from its viewpoint, and project the dummy images into the camera lens. Anyone monitoring the security system will believe he or she is witnessing live footage.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：摄像机干扰器@阿彻特工：

希望这个包裹能安全送到你手中。我不得不采用相当不寻常的方式寄送。

包裹内是一具CT-180 多功能发射器，以及摄像机干扰弹。这些巧妙装置会附着在监控摄像机上，捕捉其视角中的画面，再将伪造影像投射到镜头中。任何监控安全系统的人都会以为自己看到的是实时画面。

圣诞老人

english: Note: No Smoking!@NO SMOKING IS PERMITTED IN THIS AREA.\n\nViolators will be shot.
zh: 便条：禁止吸烟！@本区域严禁吸烟。\n\n违者枪决。

english:
Recipe: Herring in a Fur Coat@Mama Pupkin's Recipe for Herring in a Fur Coat:

A herring, 3 boiled potatoes, 1 boiled beetroot, 6 spring onions, 1 jar oil-cured black olives, 2 hard-boiled eggs, sliced.

Scale and dice herring into 1-inch pieces. Peel potatoes and beetroot and dice them into 1/2-inch pieces. Chop spring onions into 1/4-inch pieces. Spread herring pieces on the bottom of the serving bowl, cover with spring onions, then potatoes, then beets. Spread mayonnaise over beets and decorate with olives and slices of egg. Serve chilled.
zh:
食谱：皮袄鲱鱼@普普金妈妈的皮袄鲱鱼食谱：

鲱鱼1条、煮土豆3个、煮甜菜根1个、青葱6根、油浸黑橄榄1罐、水煮蛋2个并切片。

将鲱鱼去鳞并切成1英寸小块。土豆和甜菜根去皮，切成半英寸小块。青葱切成四分之一英寸小段。将鲱鱼铺在盘底，依次盖上青葱、土豆和甜菜。最后在甜菜上抹蛋黄酱，并用橄榄和鸡蛋片装饰。冷藏后食用。

english: Note: Sugar@ATTENTION\n\nUntil further notice, the sugar will be kept under lock and key to prevent a repeat of last Saturday's generator sabotage. To request sugar, file a requisition form with your commanding officer.
zh: 便条：糖@注意\n\n为防止上周六的发电机破坏事件重演，即日起糖将上锁保管。如需用糖，请向指挥官提交申请表。

english: Note: Cabbage soup bonus@ATTENTION ALL PERSONNEL: As a reward for last month's 2 percent drop in the accidental and semi-accidental mortality rate at this facility, all soldiers are to receive a bonus serving of cabbage soup every night this week! Keep up the good work and soon you'll have all the cabbage soup you can eat!\n\nGeneral Zhukov
zh: 便条：卷心菜汤奖励@全体人员注意：由于本设施上月意外及半意外死亡率下降了2%，本周每晚所有士兵都将额外获得一份卷心菜汤作为奖励！继续努力，很快你们就能想吃多少卷心菜汤就吃多少！\n\n朱可夫将军

english:
Safe combination@Lieutenant Petrakov,

I've been summoned to Moscow to participate in a special tribunal to weed out unpatriotic citizens in government positions. I left the "top secret" document we discussed in the wall safe of my office, which is on the third floor of the old records building. The combination is 12-38-53. Please return the document when you are done. I would hate for it to fall into the wrong hands!

Lieutenant Pupkin
zh:
保险柜密码@彼得拉科夫中尉：

我被召往莫斯科，参加一场清除政府部门中不爱国分子的特别审判。我把我们讨论过的“绝密”文件留在旧档案大楼三楼办公室的墙内保险柜里，密码是12-38-53。用完后请将文件放回，我可不希望它落入不该拿到的人手中！

普普金中尉

english:
Letter from Oleg@My fellow conspirators,

The hour of revolution draws near. I have made the necessary preparations. In less than a week, we three shall have shrugged off the chains of tyranny and set an example for all Russians who hunger for liberation as we do.

Oleg Dorofeev
zh:
奥列格来信@各位共谋者：

革命的时刻即将来临。我已经做好必要准备。不到一周，我们三人就将挣脱暴政的锁链，为所有像我们一样渴望解放的俄罗斯人树立榜样。

奥列格·多罗费耶夫

english:
Letter from Sergei@My brothers in conspiracy,

The revolution is indeed almost upon us. I can practically feel the sweet wind of freedom on my skin. The waiting is a prison. I feel caged, anxious, trapped in this miserable uniform and all it represents.

Sergei Romanov
zh:
谢尔盖来信@各位共谋兄弟：

革命确实近在眼前。我几乎能感到自由的甜美微风拂过皮肤。等待本身就是牢笼，我感到被囚禁、焦躁不安，困在这身可悲的制服以及它所代表的一切之中。

谢尔盖·罗曼诺夫

english:
Letter from Yuri@My fellow revolutionaries,

I just saw the weather report. A cold front is moving in from the north. While like both of you I lust for liberation, perhaps we can postpone the revolution until the weather improves. Running naked through the compound in the middle of a blizzard sounds more like insanity than insurgency.

Yuri Prokofiev
zh:
尤里来信@各位革命同志：

我刚看了天气预报，一股冷锋正从北方移来。我和你们一样渴望解放，不过也许可以等天气好转后再发动革命。暴风雪中赤身裸体跑过基地，听起来更像发疯，而不是起义。

尤里·普罗科菲耶夫

english:
Soviet Memo: Project Omega@To: Lieutenant Pupkin
From: General Zhukov's Office

The General requests that you provide him with a feasibility matrix on Project Omega within 10 days. Please obtain an M-9 Access Request Form from the Forms Office.
zh:
苏联备忘录：欧米伽计划@收件人：普普金中尉
发件人：朱可夫将军办公室

将军要求你在10天内提交欧米伽计划的可行性矩阵。请前往表格办公室领取M-9访问申请表。

english:
Soviet Memo: Project Omega@To: Lieutenant Petrakov
From: Colonel Pupkin

So, Evo, what do you make of this Omega business of the General's? I'm scheduled to run a feasibility matrix next week on the M-9, assuming I can get clearance to use the machine. My gut tells me it's not worth the money. Let them approach the decadent West, I say.
zh:
苏联备忘录：欧米伽计划@收件人：彼得拉科夫中尉
发件人：普普金上校

埃沃，你怎么看将军这桩欧米伽生意？假设我能获准使用M-9，下周就要运行一次可行性矩阵。直觉告诉我不值这个价。依我看，就让他们去接触腐朽的西方吧。

english:
Soviet paperwork: M-9 request@ACCESS REQUEST FOR M-9 DATA PROCESSING CENTER

1.Reason for request: Monthly Employee Terminations
2. Date required: 
 ( ) 3 months, ( ) 6 months, ( ) next year some time, (x) other: Priority One order from General Zhukov
3. If Other, you must provide the names of three relatives in case Request is denied and punitive executions are deemed necessary: Zenia Yakov, Eduard Stepanov, Igor Stepanov
zh:
苏联文件：M-9申请@M-9数据处理中心访问申请

1.申请理由：每月解雇员工
2.所需日期：
（ ）三个月后，（ ）六个月后，（ ）明年某个时候，（x）其他：朱可夫将军一级优先命令
3.若选择“其他”，必须提供三名亲属姓名，以备申请遭拒并认为有必要实施惩罚性处决：泽尼娅·雅科夫、爱德华·斯捷潘诺夫、伊戈尔·斯捷潘诺夫

english: Letter: Project Eyes Wide Open@Pupkov Laboratory, Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky\n\nProject Eyes Wide Open Results: The benefits of stimulants are clear. Group A (based in Siberia) was allotted 18 cigarettes and 9 cups of coffee per day. Control Group B (based in Finland) abstained. Over a period of 26 months, Group A was found to sleep 42 percent less on average. While the mortality rate due to on-the-job accidents for Group A was 87 percent higher, we conclude high worker turnover will mitigate decreases in productivity due to aging.
zh: 信件：睁眼计划@普普科夫实验室，堪察加彼得罗巴甫洛夫斯克\n\n“睁眼计划”结果：兴奋剂的益处十分明显。A组（驻西伯利亚）每天配给18支香烟和9杯咖啡；对照B组（驻芬兰）则完全禁用。在26个月内，A组平均睡眠时间减少了42%。尽管A组因工作事故造成的死亡率高出87%，但我们认为较高的员工流动率会减轻老龄化导致的生产效率下降。
照片：德米特里·沃尔科夫@

english:
Soviet Communiqué: The Director@To: Commander Pim
From: General Nikolai Zhukov

Please inform your illustrious Director that as a proud Communist, I am immune to his coercive Capitalistic sales tactics. Even a leader as visionary as I does not rush into schemes that could jeopardize global stability. I appreciate your willingness to send service representatives to hold seminars for my staff, but do not presume that I am so indebted as to sign a contract without fully evaluating the service I will be purchasing.
zh:
苏联公报：局长@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：尼古拉·朱可夫将军

请转告贵方尊贵的局长，身为一名骄傲的共产主义者，我不会屈服于他那套资本主义强买强卖的推销伎俩。即使像我这样高瞻远瞩的领袖，也不会草率参与可能危及全球稳定的计划。感谢你们愿意派服务代表来给我的部下举办讲座，但别以为我会因此欠下人情，在未全面评估所购服务前就签署合同。

english:
Soviet paperwork: Repair restroom@REPAIR REQUEST FORM 19a

1. Repair(s) Requested: Patch hole in women's restroom.
2. Reason for Request: The glories of our fine Russian women have distracted hard working men from their duties.
3. Approved by: Sergeant Egor.
zh:
苏联文件：修理女厕@维修申请表19a

1.申请维修：修补女厕所墙上的洞。
2.申请理由：我国优秀女性的魅力让勤劳的男性无法专心工作。
3.批准人：叶戈尔中士。

english:
Soviet paperwork: Repair restroom denied@REJECTION FORM R-27

The request for Repair to women's bathroom in the new Records Facility is denied.

Signed: General Nikolai Zhukov
zh:
苏联文件：女厕维修驳回@R-27驳回表

新档案设施女厕所的维修申请已被驳回。

签署人：尼古拉·朱可夫将军

english:
Soviet Memo: U.S. Plans@To: General Zhukov
From: Vladimir Kryuchkov

I hope you are sitting down, comrade. Last night I got word from ANATOLI, our man in Palm Beach. He's the farm boy we sent from Kamchatka to infiltrate the highest levels of the Pentagon, which he has done very rapidly considering his poor grasp of the English language. As we feared, the Main Adversary has big plans for Khios. Please see the attached report.
zh:
苏联备忘录：美国计划@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：弗拉基米尔·克留奇科夫

同志，希望你现在是坐着的。昨晚我们在棕榈滩的人“阿纳托利”传来消息。他就是那个从堪察加派去渗透五角大楼最高层的农家小子。考虑到他英语很差，进展却异常迅速。正如我们担心的那样，主要敌人正在对希俄斯策划大动作。详见附件报告。

english:
Soviet Report: Khios 1@U.S. PLANS FOR KHIOS
Part I.

As we all know, the U.S. has been developing a project to covertly launch a nuclear first strike against the Soviet Union by attaching warheads to tiger sharks and sending them up the Dnieper River to Moscow from the Black Sea. They have even created special apparatus for the sharks that let them survive in fresh water. Now ANATOLI reports that this project has been put on hold to prepare for the American invasion of Khios.
zh:
苏联报告：希俄斯1@美国对希俄斯的计划
第1部分

众所周知，美国一直在秘密研发一项计划：把核弹头绑在虎鲨身上，从黑海送入第聂伯河，逆流前往莫斯科，以此对苏联发动核先发打击。他们甚至为鲨鱼研制了能在淡水中生存的特殊装置。如今阿纳托利报告称，为准备美国入侵希俄斯，该计划已被暂时搁置。

english:
Soviet Report: Khios 2@U.S. PLANS FOR KHIOS
Part II.

The goals of the Main Adversary are clear: conquer Khios militarily, perform highly immoral scientific experiments on the civilian populace, and replace the island's schools and hospitals with fast food restaurants and resort hotels, all in an effort to exploit the precious natural resources of Khios.
zh:
苏联报告：希俄斯2@美国对希俄斯的计划
第2部分

主要敌人的目标十分明确：以武力征服希俄斯，对岛上平民实施极不道德的科学实验，并把学校和医院改造成快餐店与度假酒店，目的都是掠夺希俄斯宝贵的自然资源。

english:
Expense account: ANATOLI@EXPENSE ACCOUNT SUMMARY
Operative Code Name: ANATOLI
Location: Palm Beach, Florida
Total expenses: $573,000 U.S.

Itemized list of purchase items:
 - Beach-side condominium (to establish agent legend)
 - Chevrolet Corvette Stingray (transportation)
 - 32' yacht (in case I might flee U.S.)
 - Living expenses (basic items like food, utilities, bar tabs, concert tickets, prostitutes, etc.)
zh:
费用账户：阿纳托利@费用账户摘要
特工代号：阿纳托利
地点：佛罗里达州棕榈滩
费用总额：573,000美元

采购项目明细：
 - 海滨公寓（建立特工身份掩护）
 - 雪佛兰科尔维特Stingray（交通工具）
 - 32英尺游艇（以防需要逃离美国）
 - 生活开支（食品、水电、酒吧账单、演唱会门票、妓女等基本项目）

english:
Soviet Memo: Project: Omega@To: Director of H.A.R.M.
From: General Nikolai Zhukov

Regarding this so-called Project: Omega of yours, we need to clarify a few matters before we submit a Letter of Intent. First, we are looking for a solution that not only makes it feasible for us to annex Khios, but also to defend it once we achieve our ultimate objective: to build the world's first five star Communist hotel and casino on the northern end of the island. Can Project: Omega meet this need?
zh:
苏联备忘录：欧米伽计划@收件人：H.A.R.M.局长
发件人：尼古拉·朱可夫将军

关于你们所谓的欧米伽计划，在提交意向书前，我们需要澄清几件事。首先，我们需要的方案不仅要让吞并希俄斯成为可能，还必须在实现最终目标后帮助我们守住它：在岛屿北端建造世界首家五星级共产主义酒店兼赌场。欧米伽计划能满足这一需求吗？

english: Note: Vending machine@Comrades, do not be fooled by this machine! While filing yesterday, I found evidence of an elaborate conspiracy to trick honest Soviet citizens out of their precious rubles. These vending machines don't actually contain any CCCP Soda. They're just hollow cases with a large tray for collecting coins and a small speaker that plays mechanical noises. Trust no one!\n\nMikhail
zh: 便条：自动售货机@同志们，不要被这台机器骗了！昨天整理文件时，我发现了一场精心策划的阴谋，专门骗取诚实苏联公民珍贵的卢布。这些自动售货机里根本没有任何苏联汽水，只是带有大型投币盘和小扬声器的空壳，扬声器会播放机械运转声。不要相信任何人！\n\n米哈伊尔

english: Report: Puffins@FRATERCULA CIRRHATA\n\nThe tufted puffin gets its name from the conspicuous pale yellow plume that sprouts from behind the bird's eyes. The eyes themselves are an extraordinary yellow color with a bright red ring around the outside. The puffin is a monogamous creature that mates for life. The couple takes turns caring for their one youngster in the rocky den while the other fishes for the whole family all day long.
zh: 报告：角嘴海雀@FRATERCULA CIRRHATA\n\n角嘴海雀因眼后长出的醒目淡黄色羽冠而得名。它们的眼睛本身呈奇特的黄色，外围有一圈鲜红色。海雀实行终身一夫一妻制，夫妻轮流在岩石巢穴中照料唯一的幼鸟，另一只则整天捕鱼养活全家。

english: Report: Sea Eagle@HALIAECTUS SPELLAGICUS\n\nA Steller sea eagle almost never hunts for his food on his own. The day begins by spying on smaller birds of prey, such as ravens, and following them to a potential meal. From that point, the eagle then proceeds to steal the food. A heated battle can ensue as multiple eagles attempt to steal the same food, and often claws and beaks are used in the attacks.
zh: 报告：虎头海雕@HALIAECTUS SPELLAGICUS\n\n虎头海雕几乎从不亲自捕猎。一天开始时，它会监视乌鸦等较小型猛禽，然后跟随它们找到潜在食物，随后将食物抢走。当多只海雕争夺同一份食物时，可能爆发激烈战斗，爪子和喙常被用来攻击。

english: Report: Brown Bear@URSUS ARCTOS\n\nThe brown bear is vegetarian for most of the spring, but spends the summer and fall seasons gorging itself on river salmon to prepare itself for the long winter's nap. An adult bear can lose up to 350 pounds per winter, which it must gain back before the next cold season.
zh: 报告：棕熊@URSUS ARCTOS\n\n棕熊在春季大部分时间以植物为食，但夏秋两季会大量吞食河中的鲑鱼，为漫长冬眠做准备。成年棕熊一个冬天最多可减重350磅，必须在下一次寒季到来前补回来。

english: Report: Fur Seal@CALLORHINUS URSINUS\n\nThe Northern fur seal is a fascinating sea mammal. Rookeries, or flocks, of males arrive first in May and June to establish their territories in areas such as the Pribilof Islands. The males are extremely territorial over their harems and will exert themselves in violent battles and loud echoing personalized calls to claim their property and prove their power.
zh: 报告：北方海狗@CALLORHINUS URSINUS\n\n北方海狗是一种迷人的海洋哺乳动物。每年五六月，雄性会率先抵达普里比洛夫群岛等繁殖地，划定领地。它们对自己的后宫极具占有欲，会通过激烈搏斗和响亮且独特的叫声宣示领地、证明力量。

english:
Soviet Memo: Kamchatka survey@To: General Zhukov's Office
From: Corporal Pupkin

Most revered leader, the people's glorious nature survey of the Kamchatka area is complete. We can now begin the removal of these animals to make way for ten glorious new factories planned for the region, each of which will be manufacturing factory equipment to allow us to build more factories! We expect a tremendous increase in productivity!
zh:
苏联备忘录：堪察加调查@收件人：朱可夫将军办公室
发件人：普普金下士

最受尊敬的领袖，人民对堪察加地区的光荣自然调查已经完成。现在可以开始清除这些动物，为该地区计划兴建的十座光荣新工厂腾出空间。每座工厂都将生产工厂设备，让我们能够建造更多工厂！预计生产效率将大幅提高！

english:
UNITY Memo: General Zhukov@Agent Archer,

Should you run into a General Nikolai Zhukov, consider him a target of opportunity. Former NKVD. He was involved in the relocation of the Chechen people to Central Asia in '44. Linked to various crimes against humanity, including a particularly grisly mass murder. We want him liquidated.

Santa
zh:
UNITY备忘录：朱可夫将军@阿彻特工：

如果遇到尼古拉·朱可夫将军，可将其视为机会目标。他曾供职于内务人民委员部，参与了1944年将车臣人迁往中亚的行动，并与多项反人类罪行有关，包括一起尤其骇人的大屠杀。我们要他被消灭。

圣诞老人

english: Note: Spies reported@ATTENTION\n\nA female capitalist spy has been seen in the area. Those responsible for her capture will receive extra portions of cabbage soup. Those NOT responsible for her capture will be given latrine duty
zh: 便条：发现间谍@注意\n\n该地区发现一名女性资本主义间谍。抓获她的人将额外获得卷心菜汤；未参与抓捕的人将被派去打扫厕所。

english:
Soviet Memo: Recent explosions@To: Maintenance Division
From: Sergeant Butsenko

I have continually warned others of the hazards of storing fuel in open areas. The recent series of explosions has confirmed my views. I suggest a Fuel Committee be started to evaluate the problem and document the solution.
zh:
苏联备忘录：近期爆炸@收件人：维修部门
发件人：布岑科中士

我一直警告其他人，把燃料露天存放非常危险。近期接连发生的爆炸证明了我的看法。建议成立燃料委员会，评估问题并记录解决方案。

english: Note: Spies still at large@I am disheartened that no one has yet captured the capitalist spy for the glory of Mother Russia! If this spy is not apprehended by morning, responsible personnel will receive punitive executions.\n\nColonel Pupkin
zh: 便条：间谍仍在逃@至今仍无人为了俄罗斯母亲的荣耀抓住那个资本主义间谍，令我非常失望！如果明早之前还未将她逮捕，相关责任人员将接受惩罚性处决。\n\n普普金上校

english:
Letter: Dear Mother@Dear Mother,

How are you? It has been long time, yes? How is Cincinnati? I am big time pilot now. Today I flew to Siberia on secret mission. Job is dangerous, but I get paid good money. You are getting checks, yes? It makes me happy.

Love,
Misha
zh:
信件：亲爱的母亲@亲爱的母亲：

你好吗？很久没联系了，对吧？辛辛那提怎么样？我现在是大人物飞行员了。今天我飞到西伯利亚执行秘密任务。工作很危险，但薪水不错。你有收到支票吧？这让我很开心。

爱你的
米沙

english:
Letter: Blitzny training@February 28, 1967

Mr. Blitzny (or should I say Mr. Goodman),

It is imperative that your training be complete by early June. A sublime opportunity has presented itself in Amsterdam.

Regards,
Mr. X
zh:
信件：布利茨尼训练@1967年2月28日

布利茨尼先生（或许该称古德曼先生）：

你的训练必须在六月初前完成。阿姆斯特丹出现了一个绝佳机会。

此致
X先生

english:
Carbon Copy: Trouble with chicks@Carbon Copy

March 6, 1967

Mr. X,

I am still having trouble scoring with chicks. It makes it very hard to feel like a real super spy when girls don't want to talk to me. In the movies, spies always get lots of women. This situation is affecting my morale. At this rate, I'm not sure I can be ready by June.

Urgently,
Melvin Blitzny
a.k.a. Tom Goodman
zh:
副本：泡妞困难@副本

1967年3月6日

X先生：

我还是泡不到女人。女孩都不愿和我说话，这让我很难觉得自己是真正的超级间谍。电影里的间谍总有一大群女人，这种情况严重打击了我的士气。照这样下去，我不确定六月前能准备好。

十万火急
梅尔文·布利茨尼
又名汤姆·古德曼

english:
Letter: Delay unacceptable@March 19, 1967

Mr. Blitzny, 

Delays are unacceptable. You WILL be prepared to assume the identity of Tom Goodman on schedule. I need you on the UNITY payroll as soon as possible. I hope I have made myself perfectly clear.

Regards,
Mr. Smith
zh:
信件：不接受延期@1967年3月19日

布利茨尼先生：

延期不可接受。你必须按计划做好准备，接替汤姆·古德曼的身份。我需要你尽快进入UNITY的工资名册。希望我已经说得足够清楚。

此致
史密斯先生

english:
Carbon Copy: Don't rush me!@Carbon Copy

March 20, 1967

Mr. X (or should I say Smith),

I'm tired of hearing about this deadline of yours. If there's one thing I learned from selling vacuum cleaners, it's that you can't rush art. I will be ready when I am ready and not a minute sooner. Stick that in your fancy pants.

Regards,
Tom Goodman
zh:
副本：别催我！@副本

1967年3月20日

X先生（或者该叫史密斯）：

我受够你一直念叨那个期限了。卖吸尘器让我明白一件事：艺术不能催。我准备好时自然会准备好，一分钟都不会提前。把这话塞进你那条花哨裤子里吧。

此致
汤姆·古德曼

english:
Letter: Prissy sap@March 29, 1967

Listen to me, you prissy little sap, I've had about enough of your posturing. Perhaps you don't appreciate the gravity of the situation, so allow me to spell it out in terms your puerile intellect can grasp. You are being watched. Constantly. Should you deviate from the plan I have outlined for you, you will disappear without a trace. I will personally supervise your extermination to ensure that it is as excruciating and protracted as possible.

Smith
zh:
信件：娇气蠢货@1967年3月29日

听着，你这个娇气的小蠢货，我受够你装腔作势了。也许你不明白事态有多严重，那我就用你幼稚头脑能够理解的方式说明：你一直受到监视。如果偏离我为你制定的计划，你将无声无息地消失。我会亲自监督你的灭口，确保过程尽可能痛苦而漫长。

史密斯

english:
Unsent Letter: Go to hell@Unsent Original

March 29, 1967

Mr. Sissy,

Why don't you just go to hell, you dumb stupid idiot. I hate you! I hate you! I hate you!

Die,
Goodman
zh:
未寄出的信：下地狱吧@未寄出原稿

1967年3月29日

娘娘腔先生：

你怎么不直接下地狱，你这个愚蠢的大白痴。我恨你！我恨你！我恨你！

去死吧
古德曼

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo@The following Top Secret material is intended for H.A.R.M. personnel only!

To: All H.A.R.M. Personnel
From: Anoop Banerjee
Date: September 2, 1967
Subject: Project Omega

Starting this November, H.A.R.M. will begin prototyping for a new secret weapon venture called Project: Omega. We're looking for an experienced, highly organized product manager to head up this effort. If you or anyone you know is interested in working with our top notch research and development team on this exciting project, please contact me by internal courier at the branch office in Calcutta.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录@以下绝密材料仅限H.A.R.M.人员阅读！

收件人：全体H.A.R.M.人员
发件人：阿努普·班纳吉
日期：1967年9月2日
主题：欧米伽计划

从今年11月开始，H.A.R.M.将为一项名为欧米伽计划的新秘密武器项目制作原型。我们正在寻找一名经验丰富、组织能力出众的产品经理来领导这项工作。若你或你认识的人有兴趣与我们一流的研发团队共同参与这一激动人心的项目，请通过内部信使联系加尔各答分部的我。

english:
Invoice for vacuum cleaners@INVOICE 2306a

To: Mr. Melvin Blitzny
From: Lucky Suck Vacuum Company, Walla Walla, Washington

Order for 260 Lucky Suck type B vacuum cleaners with detachable nozzle and swivel head.
zh:
吸尘器发票@发票2306a

收件人：梅尔文·布利茨尼先生
发件人：幸运吸吸尘器公司，华盛顿州沃拉沃拉

订购260台幸运吸B型吸尘器，配可拆卸吸嘴和旋转头。

english:
H.A.R.M. Communiqué: Magnus Armstrong@To: Melvin Blitzny/Tom Goodman
From: Dmitrij Volkov

You will report to Oslo, Sweden, on April 4, 1967, for H.A.R.M. orientation and mental conditioning. One of my associates, Magnus Armstrong, will retrieve you from the airport. He is not difficult to recognize. His more distinctive characteristics include a thick red beard, a kilt (which he wears regardless of the weather), and the pervasive aroma of Scotch whiskey. You will do as he says.

Welcome to H.A.R.M.
zh:
H.A.R.M.公报：马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗@收件人：梅尔文·布利茨尼／汤姆·古德曼
发件人：德米特里·沃尔科夫

你须于1967年4月4日前往瑞典奥斯陆，参加H.A.R.M.入职说明与精神调教。我的一名同事马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗会到机场接你。他很容易辨认：浓密红胡子、无论天气如何都穿苏格兰裙，而且浑身散发苏格兰威士忌味。照他说的做。

欢迎加入H.A.R.M.

english:
Letter: Dear John letter@Dear Loni,

I am leaving you and shacking up with your best friend, Jill. Sorry, honey, but you never gave me my due! As soon as we got hitched, you stopped wearin' makeup, gained 30 pounds, and you ain't done the dishes for over a week. Can you blame me for leaving?

Your former husband, Kevin
zh:
信件：绝交信@亲爱的洛妮：

我要离开你，和你最好的朋友吉尔住在一起。抱歉，亲爱的，但你从没给我应有的待遇！我们刚结婚，你就不化妆了，胖了30磅，连碗都一个多星期没洗。你能怪我离开吗？

你的前夫，凯文

english:
Farley Fertility Letter@FARLEY FERTILITY

To: Mrs. Loni Hickey

The results of our tests indicate the child is not a biological match to Mr. Hickey. Thank you for choosing Farley Fertility to serve your needs. Good luck finding the father!
zh:
法利生育诊所来信@法利生育诊所

收件人：洛妮·希基夫人

检测结果表明，这个孩子与希基先生没有生物学亲子关系。感谢你选择法利生育诊所为你服务。祝你早日找到孩子父亲！

english:
Letter: Steve or Dwayne@Betty,

What am I to do! The baby ain't Kevin's. At least that narrows it down to either Steve or Dwayne. Do you think I should tell them?

Loni
zh:
信件：史蒂夫还是德韦恩@贝蒂：

我该怎么办！孩子不是凯文的。至少范围缩小到史蒂夫或德韦恩了。你觉得我该告诉他们吗？

洛妮

english: Mobile Home Ad@THE MOBILE HOME ADVANTAGE!\n\nTired of seeing the same scenery year after year? A mobile home could be the answer!
zh: 活动房屋广告@活动房屋的优势！\n\n厌倦年复一年看着同样的风景？活动房屋也许正是答案！

english:
Letter: Loan denied@Dear Mr. Hickey,

Your application for a Mobile Home Loan has been denied due to your recent bankruptcy.

Signed: Mr. Dullwhittle
First Bank of Stucky
zh:
信件：贷款驳回@亲爱的希基先生：

由于你近期破产，你的活动房屋贷款申请已被驳回。

签署人：达尔惠特先生
斯塔基第一银行
照片：卡马尔·库布昌达尼@

english:
Letter: Kamal blackmail@Dear Kamal,

How are you? I am fine. As you see from this fine picture, my friend, we know you have been passing secrets to UNITY. If you do not pay us 5,000 rupees by next Tuesday, we shall see if your boss, Anoop Banerjee, would be willing to buy them.

Evil Alliance
zh:
信件：勒索卡马尔@亲爱的卡马尔：

你好吗？我很好。朋友，从这张漂亮的照片中可以看出，我们知道你一直在向UNITY泄露机密。如果下周二之前不支付5,000卢比，我们就看看你的上司阿努普·班纳吉愿不愿意花钱买这些照片。

邪恶联盟

english:
H.A.R.M. Password@To: All H.A.R.M. Personnel

Today's password is supposed to be  Mulligatawny, but my instincts tell me the boss will probably change it to the customary "Balaji Malpani better shape up or he's going to die a very slow, painful death."

Balaji Malpani
zh:
H.A.R.M.密码@收件人：全体H.A.R.M.人员

今天的密码原本应该是“穆利加汤”，但直觉告诉我，老板很可能会改成惯用的那句：“巴拉吉·马尔帕尼最好赶紧振作，否则他会死得非常缓慢、非常痛苦。”

巴拉吉·马尔帕尼

english:
Letter: Finding the H.A.R.M. password@Agent Archer,

To gain entrance to H.A.R.M.'s India headquarters, you'll need to locate Balaji Malpani, Anoop Banerjee's right hand man. He is responsible for coming up with and distributing the daily passwords. Either eliminate him or use this recording device to eavesdrop when he calls Banerjee this afternoon.

Balaji keeps a room in the Hotel Happy Guest. Plant the bug on the phone in his apartment, hide until the conversation ends, then activate the bug to play back the entire conversation.

Good luck,
Kamal
zh:
信件：寻找H.A.R.M.密码@阿彻特工：

要进入H.A.R.M.印度总部，你必须找到阿努普·班纳吉的得力助手巴拉吉·马尔帕尼。他负责每天制定并分发密码。你可以消灭他，也可以使用这台录音设备，偷听他今天下午给班纳吉打电话。

巴拉吉在快乐宾客酒店有一间房。把窃听器装在他公寓的电话上，躲到通话结束，然后启动窃听器播放完整录音。

祝你好运
卡马尔

english:
Letter: Kamal blackmail@Agent Archer,

A gang of Evil Alliance thugs has discovered I am passing secrets to UNITY. Until they are apprehended, I cannot afford to be seen. I've heard their hideout is located in this part of the city. See if you can put them out of commission and obtain the blackmail evidence.

May Lord Shiva protect you!
Kamal
zh:
信件：卡马尔遭勒索@阿彻特工：

一群邪恶联盟暴徒发现我正在向UNITY泄露机密。在他们被抓住前，我不能公开露面。听说他们的藏身处就在这一带。看看能否让他们停止活动，并取得用来勒索我的证据。

愿湿婆神保护你！
卡马尔

english:
Letter: Angaraka Gang@To: Evil Alliance Studio 4
From: Kumar

My friends, the contract is almost signed! Soon we can say goodbye to Evil Alliance and get to work on our first project as the Angaraka Gang!

(Not for distribution outside Studio 4!)
zh:
信件：安伽罗迦帮@收件人：邪恶联盟4号摄影棚
发件人：库马尔

朋友们，合同马上就要签署了！很快我们就能告别邪恶联盟，开始以“安伽罗迦帮”的名义制作第一个项目！

（不得在4号摄影棚以外传播！）

english:
Letter: Angaraka Gang@To: Kumar
From: Ganesh

What? When did we get a new name? Angaraka Gang? Everyone will believe we suffer from dreadful skin disease! Who is responsible for this idiocy? No one will remember that Angaraka is also the charm to free the bearer from debts!

Let us not be too clever for our own good, my friend!
zh:
信件：安伽罗迦帮@收件人：库马尔
发件人：加内什

什么？我们什么时候改了新名字？安伽罗迦帮？大家会以为我们全都患有可怕的皮肤病！是谁想出的蠢主意？没人会记得安伽罗迦也是能让佩戴者摆脱债务的护符！

朋友，我们可别聪明反被聪明误！

english:
Note: Unlocked windows@ATTENTION ALL EMPLOYEES

The courtyard is off limits to unauthorized persons. If I discover these windows unlocked one more time, may Lord Vishnu protect the offender from my wrath!

Anoop Banerjee
Chief Executive Officer
zh:
便条：窗户未锁@全体员工注意

未经授权者禁止进入庭院。如果我再发现这些窗户没有上锁一次，愿毗湿奴神保护肇事者免受我的怒火！

阿努普·班纳吉
首席执行官

english:
Note: Unpaid window bill@To: Erin Keyes, H.A.R.M. Comptroller
From: Nanda Devi Window Washers

Ms. Keyes, our records show an outstanding balance of 47 rupees for services rendered. We have attempted to refer this matter to Mr. Banerjee at your Indian headquarters office, but he has been most uncooperative. Please remit the balance due within 30 days or we will fling monkey doo doo at the windows of your compound in retaliation.
zh:
便条：未付清洁费@收件人：H.A.R.M.财务主管艾琳·凯斯
发件人：南达德维窗户清洁公司

凯斯女士，我们的记录显示仍有47卢比服务费未付。我们曾试图将此事转交贵方印度总部的班纳吉先生处理，但他极不配合。请在30天内支付欠款，否则我们将把猴粪扔到贵方基地的窗户上作为报复。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Window washing@To: Anoop Banerjee
From: Erin Keyes, H.A.R.M. Comptroller

Mr. Banerjee, I have received a complaint from Nanda Devi Window Washers regarding non-payment of a window-washing bill. Please resolve this matter by the usual methods.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：窗户清洁@收件人：阿努普·班纳吉
发件人：H.A.R.M.财务主管艾琳·凯斯

班纳吉先生，我收到南达德维窗户清洁公司关于未支付清洁费的投诉。请按惯常方式解决此事。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Windows@To: Nanda Devi Window Washers
From: Anoop Banerjee

You call these windows clean? I curse you, your mother, your sisters, and your dog. I'm sending over a representative to see that you get the payment you are due. Goodbye.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：窗户@收件人：南达德维窗户清洁公司
发件人：阿努普·班纳吉

这也叫擦干净了？我诅咒你、你的母亲、姐妹和狗。我会派代表过去，确保你们拿到应得的“报酬”。再见。

english:
Note: Account correction@To: Anoop Banerjee
Cc: Erin Keyes, H.A.R.M. Comptroller
From: Nanda Devi Window Washers

Mr. Banerjee, we must apologize profusely! Actually, it seems that the outstanding balance we had reported was a clerical error on our part. How idiotic of us! We are truly sorry for the inconvenience! To redress this unfortunate misunderstanding, we are happy to offer our services for free from now on!
zh:
便条：账目更正@收件人：阿努普·班纳吉
抄送：H.A.R.M.财务主管艾琳·凯斯
发件人：南达德维窗户清洁公司

班纳吉先生，我们必须郑重道歉！事实上，之前报告的欠款似乎是我方文书错误。我们真是太蠢了！对于造成的不便，我们深感抱歉！为弥补这场不幸误会，我们很乐意从今以后免费提供服务！

english:
H.A.R.M. Surveillance: E.A.@SURVEILLANCE REPORT 9F
Attention: Anoop Banerjee

Sir, I believe our friends may be making their move soon. I suggest we move the merchandise to the freezer in the basement. It's more secure than the one in the employee lounge.

Prem
zh:
H.A.R.M.监控报告：邪恶联盟@监控报告9F
呈交：阿努普·班纳吉

先生，我认为我们的“朋友”可能很快就会行动。建议将货物转移到地下室冷库，那里比员工休息室的冰柜更安全。

普雷姆

english:
H.A.R.M. Surveillance: Raid@SURVEILLANCE REPORT 9H
Attention: Anoop Banerjee

Sir, PacPac has discovered the location of Evil Alliance's India branch office! They are using that old movie theater down the street! I have scheduled a nighttime raid for next Tuesday at 9:30pm during their nightly movie screening. I couldn't get tickets for Samir and Ajay, but we can let them in the side door after the show starts.

Prem
zh:
H.A.R.M.监控报告：突袭@监控报告9H
呈交：阿努普·班纳吉

先生，帕克帕克已经发现邪恶联盟印度分部的位置！他们就在街尾那家旧电影院里！我已安排下周二晚上9:30，在他们夜间放映时发动突袭。萨米尔和阿贾伊没买到票，不过电影开始后可以从侧门放他们进去。

普雷姆

english:
Note from Kamal: Equipment@Agent Archer, 

Evil Alliance is headquartered in the old movie theater across the street. I suppose it suits their theatrical, overly dramatic modus operandi. I was able to obtain a diagram of the building that indicates points at which demolition charges would cause the greatest structural damage. You'll have to find explosives on site.

Kamal

P.S. Santa sent this package for you.
zh:
卡马尔的便条：装备@阿彻特工：

邪恶联盟总部设在街对面的旧电影院。我想这很符合他们戏剧化、过度夸张的行事风格。我设法取得了一张建筑图，上面标出了安放爆破炸药后能造成最大结构破坏的位置。炸药需要你在现场寻找。

卡马尔

附言：圣诞老人给你寄来了这个包裹。

english:
Letter: Elope now!@To Ms. Lala Faqueera,
14 Pullagura Street

Lala,

I have such worry! Your father will yet have his way and marry you off to another man. We must elope soon!

With love, 
Prem
zh:
信件：马上私奔！@收件人：拉拉·法基拉小姐
普拉古拉街14号

拉拉：

我忧心极了！你父亲迟早会得逞，把你嫁给别的男人。我们必须尽快私奔！

爱你的
普雷姆

english:
Letter: Wild daughter@Dr. Nallapuneni,

Doctor, I am very concerned about my daughter. My husband has tried to arrange a good match, but no one will have her! She is wild and belligerent. She will attract only the worst sort of man. What shall I do?

Sincerely,
Mrs. Faqueera
zh:
信件：野丫头@纳拉普内尼医生：

医生，我非常担心女儿。丈夫试图为她安排一门好亲事，却没有任何人愿意娶她！她野蛮又好斗，只会招来最糟糕的男人。我该怎么办？

诚挚的
法基拉夫人

english:
Letter: Guari charm@Mrs. Faqueera,

I understand your concerns. You must purchase a Gauri charm and some pickled garlic and hide it under her bed to insure a good husband. It worked wonders for my own Phoolwati!

Dr. Nallapuneni
zh:
信件：高里护符@法基拉夫人：

我理解你的担忧。你必须购买一个高里护符和一些腌蒜，藏在她床下，以确保她找到好丈夫。这对我女儿普尔瓦蒂非常灵验！

纳拉普内尼医生

english:
Safe combination@To: Security Assistant Sonal
From: Associate Team Leader Madhu

The monthly reports MUST be filed by tomorrow morning. Also, make sure the box office receipts are totaled. You know how the boss feels about mathematics.

P.S. Because I'm sure you have forgotten it, the combination to the safe to 6-23-6.
zh:
保险柜密码@收件人：安保助理索纳尔
发件人：副组长马杜

月度报告必须在明早前归档。另外，确保把售票收入汇总好。你知道老板对数学是什么态度。

附言：我敢肯定你又忘了，保险柜密码是6-23-6。

english:
E.A. Memo: Ambushing H.A.R.M.@Vijay,

Good news! The time for revenge has come. The H.A.R.M. Activities Director just reserved 30 seats for Thursday night's show. We can ambush them as soon as the show begins! Please issue bullets to the men, but be careful not to exceed our weekly allotment!

Associate Team Leader Madhu
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：伏击H.A.R.M.@维杰：

好消息！复仇的时刻到了。H.A.R.M.活动主管刚预订了周四晚场的30个座位。电影一开场我们就能伏击他们！请给弟兄们发子弹，但注意不要超过每周配额！

副组长马杜

english:
E.A. Memo: Explosives@To: Security Assistant Sonal
From: Associate Team Leader Madhu

These explosives are for next Thursday's big operation, so make sure you lock them in the secret film vault where they'll be safe.
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：炸药@收件人：安保助理索纳尔
发件人：副组长马杜

这些炸药用于下周四的大行动，务必锁进秘密胶片库，确保安全。

english: Note: Hazardous sand bags@Due to the unfortunate injuries of Junior Associates Ramesh and Samir, the main stage area is off limits until Maintenance can remove those hazardous hanging sand bags.
zh: 便条：危险沙袋@由于初级成员拉梅什和萨米尔不幸受伤，在维修部门拆除那些危险的悬挂沙袋前，主舞台区域禁止进入。

english:
E.A. Memo: Venkatashalapathi@To: Associate Team Leader Madhu
From: Team Member Vijay

Sir, I respectfully submit we change the name of Operation Venkatachalapathi. People are confusing it with Operation Velatachalapathi. It is demoralizing to be confused with that disgraceful incident. We suggest a new name: Operation Shakti. It has a nice ring, yes?
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：文卡塔查拉帕蒂@收件人：副组长马杜
发件人：组员维杰

先生，我谨建议更改“文卡塔查拉帕蒂行动”的名称。人们总把它和“维拉塔查拉帕蒂行动”混淆。与那次可耻事件混为一谈，严重打击士气。我们建议新名称：“沙克蒂行动”。听起来不错，对吧？

english:
E.A. Memo: Venkatashalapathi@To: Team Member Vijay
From: Associate Team Leader Madhu

Vijay, I cannot believe you are bringing this up now. Marketing has already approved Operation Venkatachalapathi. Do you know what a hassle it is to pick a new name? I make no promises.
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：文卡塔查拉帕蒂@收件人：组员维杰
发件人：副组长马杜

维杰，真不敢相信你现在才提这件事。市场部已经批准“文卡塔查拉帕蒂行动”。你知道重新取名有多麻烦吗？我不作任何保证。

english:
E.A. Memo: How about Shakti@To: Marketing
From: Associate Team Leader Madhu

I formally request Operation Venkatachalapathi be renamed to Operation Shakti. You must admit Venkatachalapathi doesn't fit well on our new letterhead.
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：沙克蒂如何@收件人：市场部
发件人：副组长马杜

我正式申请将“文卡塔查拉帕蒂行动”更名为“沙克蒂行动”。你们必须承认，文卡塔查拉帕蒂印在新信纸上很不协调。

english:
E.A. Memo: Are you crazy?@To: Associate Team Leader Madhu
From: Marketing

May Lord Ganesha's sacred axe remove your left pinky! Have you not heard of Shakti Cola? They would happily slap us with a trademark infringement. We have already exceeded our budget. Your request is Denied with a capital D.
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：你疯了吗？@收件人：副组长马杜
发件人：市场部

愿象头神的神圣斧头砍掉你的左小指！你没听说过“沙克蒂可乐”吗？他们会很乐意以商标侵权起诉我们。预算已经超支。你的申请被正式驳回。

english:
E.A. Memo: Marketing is worthless@To: Team Member Vijay
From: Associate Team Leader Madhu

Alas my friend, once again the marketing department has proven their worthlessness. We are stuck with Project Venkatachalapathi.
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：市场部毫无用处@收件人：组员维杰
发件人：副组长马杜

唉，朋友，市场部再次证明了自己的毫无用处。我们只能继续使用“文卡塔查拉帕蒂计划”。

english: Trademark Search: Venkatachalapathi@TRADEMARK SEARCH: Venkatachalapathi\n\nWe have found only two possible infringements for this name. One is a small papaya plantation. The other is a rodent removal service. We feel these are sufficiently distinct to cause no issues. Total amount due for search: 10,000 rupees.
zh: 商标检索：文卡塔查拉帕蒂@商标检索：文卡塔查拉帕蒂\n\n只发现两个可能侵权对象：一家小型木瓜种植园，以及一家灭鼠服务公司。我们认为两者差异足够大，不会造成问题。检索费用总额：10,000卢比。

english:
Cease and Desist: Venkatachalapathi@CEASE AND DESIST

From: Venkatachalapathi Rodent Removal
To: Mr. Baba Madhu

Mr. Madhu, this letter serves as official notice of your trademark infringement. Please desist immediately or we will see you in court!
zh:
停止侵权函：文卡塔查拉帕蒂@停止侵权通知

发件人：文卡塔查拉帕蒂灭鼠公司
收件人：巴巴·马杜先生

马杜先生，本函是对你侵犯我方商标的正式通知。请立即停止，否则法庭见！

english:
E.A. Memo: Trademark cleanup@To: Maintenance
From: Associate Team Leader Madhu

Have you seen the Cease and Desist letter? I assume Maintenance will take care of the matter in the usual fashion? On second thought, make it extra painful.

Surely I must have done something quite evil in my former life to deserve such headaches!
zh:
邪恶联盟备忘录：商标善后@收件人：维修部门
发件人：副组长马杜

你们看到那封停止侵权函了吗？我想维修部门会按惯常方式处理吧？再想想，让过程格外痛苦一点。

我前世一定做过相当邪恶的事，才会遭受这种头痛！

english:
Note: H.A.R.M. vault@Agent Archer,

Getting into the vault won't be easy. First, you'll have to bypass the electronic gates and security cameras. You should also expect to find guards on duty in the lower area.

Unfortunately, I haven't been beyond that point, so I'm not sure what you'll face, but I've heard Anoop talking about the light fixtures on the walls. I suppose they're useful in some way.

Good luck,
Kamal
zh:
便条：H.A.R.M.保险库@阿彻特工：

进入保险库并不容易。首先必须绕过电子门和监控摄像机，下层区域应该还有值班守卫。

遗憾的是，我从没深入到那里，不清楚你会面对什么。不过我听阿努普提过墙上的灯具，我想它们应该有某种用途。

祝你好运
卡马尔

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Vault security@To: Anoop Banerjee
From: The Director

I've just finished reviewing the results of the latest security inspection and was pleased to see such a dramatic improvement in your rating for this year. Of course, it couldn't really have got much worse, could it? Still, it's gratifying to note even a minor decline in your incompetence. Keep up the good work!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：保险库安全@收件人：阿努普·班纳吉
发件人：局长

我刚审核完最新安全检查结果，很高兴看到你今年的评分大幅提高。当然，也不可能比以前更差了，对吧？不过，即便只是你的无能程度略有下降，也值得欣慰。继续努力！

english:
Letter: Thanks from UNITY@To: Kamal Khubchandani
From: Bruno Lawrie, Temporary Director of UNITY

I must thank you sincerely for your invaluable and selfless assistance in this matter. I'm not entirely sure what has motivated you to help us, but I assure you that UNITY will compensate you generously. Also, should you find yourself in need of employment as a consequence of your actions, I'm sure we can make arrangements.
zh:
UNITY感谢信@收件人：卡马尔·库布昌达尼
发件人：UNITY临时局长布鲁诺·劳里

我必须诚挚感谢你在此事中提供的宝贵而无私的协助。我不完全清楚帮助我们的动机，但可以保证UNITY会给予丰厚补偿。另外，如果你的行动导致失业，我相信我们也能作出安排。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Chemical request@To: Dr. Kussman, Antarctica Base
From: Anoop Banerjee, H.A.R.M. India Headquarters
Re: Project Omega Materials

The supply of chemicals you requested has been shipped to McMurdo via the Falkland Islands. That stash of tea you wanted is in the red box. Enjoy, my friend!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：化学品申请@收件人：南极基地库斯曼博士
发件人：H.A.R.M.印度总部阿努普·班纳吉
主题：欧米伽计划材料

你申请的化学品已经经福克兰群岛运往麦克默多。你要的那批茶在红箱子里。朋友，慢慢享用！

english:
Note: Bugs@Agent Archer,

Santa is interested in additional intelligence on H.A.R.M.'s Indian operations. He has asked that you bug the phones of three key employees. These bugs will be recovered later by other agents, so you only need to plant them to achieve your objective. Good luck!

Kamal
zh:
便条：窃听器@阿彻特工：

圣诞老人希望获得更多关于H.A.R.M.印度行动的情报。他要求你在三名关键员工的电话上安装窃听器。稍后会有其他特工回收，因此只需完成安装即可达成目标。祝你好运！

卡马尔

english:
Letter: Kamal's reply@Carbon copy

To: Bruno Lawrie
From: Kamal Khubchandani

Thank you for your generous offer. My motive for assisting you is simple: I am fed up. I do not pretend that I am particularly righteous, but recently my daughter, Laxmi, was born. Seeing her for the first time, I was filled with such overpowering love and peace that I wept. It was very difficult to go back to work and pretend to enjoy the company of these cartoon criminals and their petty schemes. I am sick of villainy.
zh:
信件：卡马尔的回复@副本

收件人：布鲁诺·劳里
发件人：卡马尔·库布昌达尼

感谢你的慷慨提议。协助你们的理由很简单：我受够了。我并不假装自己特别正义，但最近女儿拉克希米出生了。第一次看到她时，强烈的爱与平静涌上心头，我忍不住哭了。之后回到工作岗位，假装享受这些漫画式罪犯和他们琐碎阴谋的陪伴，变得非常困难。我厌倦了作恶。

english:
Document: Project Omega@To: Anoop Banerjee
From: Dr. Kussman

Well, my good friend, Project: Omega is proceeding right on schedule. We've had a couple of minor setbacks, but nothing to worry about. The world will never forget 1966, the Year of Omega! We're going to permanently raise the bar in evil Doomsday schemes!

So when are you coming to visit me in Antarctica? I'm starved for intelligent conversation. We're about two hours due south of Russkaya by plane. There isn't much to do, but we have a ping pong table!
zh:
文件：欧米伽计划@收件人：阿努普·班纳吉
发件人：库斯曼博士

好朋友，欧米伽计划正在完全按计划推进。虽然遇到几次小挫折，但无需担心。世界永远不会忘记1966年——欧米伽之年！我们将永久提高邪恶末日计划的标准！

你什么时候来南极看我？我太缺少有水平的谈话了。我们在俄罗斯站正南方约两小时航程处。这里没什么娱乐，不过有一张乒乓球桌！

english:
Receipt: Weasel substitutes@To: Anoop Banerjee
From: Vicious, Mean, and Nasty Animal Importers

We regret that we have not been able to obtain any rabid ferocious weasels for your death trap. Our supplier assures us a shipment is en route from Canada. In the meantime, please accept these temporary substitutes. While not as deadly as rabid weasels, these creatures can be quite petulant.
zh:
收据：黄鼠狼替代品@收件人：阿努普·班纳吉
发件人：凶残、恶毒与卑劣动物进口商

很遗憾，我们没能为你的死亡陷阱弄到患狂犬病的凶猛黄鼠狼。供应商保证一批货正从加拿大运来。在此期间，请先接受这些临时替代品。虽然不如疯黄鼠狼致命，但这些生物也可能相当暴躁。

english:
Notice: Pantomime Festival@Sanjay Productions presents

The World Famous
PIERRE, THE MIME KING
and his Troupe de Pantomine

One night only! Tickets are limited.
zh:
通知：哑剧节@桑贾伊制作公司呈现

世界闻名的
哑剧之王皮埃尔
及其哑剧团

仅演一晚！门票有限。

english:
Note: Rope pulls@Sacre Bleu! My patience wears thin. For the thousandth time, Rope Pulls begin with the RIGHT hand. The next one of you who perpetrates such inexcusable incompetence in my presence shall have his left hand amputated as a permanent reminder of his stupidity.

We practice a sacred Art, mes amis. Honor it and you shall flourish in my grace.

Pierre
zh:
便条：拉绳动作@天哪！我的耐心快耗尽了。第一千次重申，拉绳动作必须从右手开始。下一个敢在我面前犯这种不可原谅错误的人，将被砍掉左手，让他永远记住自己的愚蠢。

朋友们，我们从事的是神圣艺术。尊重它，你们便会在我的恩典中成长。

皮埃尔

english:
Letter: Failed mime@Dear Babette,

Mon Dieu! I can't seem to do anything right! Every day is another mistake, another failure. I cannot stand the self-loathing! I am an ugly blemish on the divine face of pantomime. I miss you terribly, my sweet.

Love, 
Jacques
zh:
信件：失败的哑剧演员@亲爱的巴贝特：

天哪！我好像什么都做不好！每天都是新的错误、新的失败。我无法忍受这种自我厌恶！我是哑剧神圣面孔上的丑陋污点。我非常想念你，亲爱的。

爱你的
雅克

english: Mime Manual@THE ART OF PANTOMIME\n\nTechnique is IMPRESSIVE. Artistry is INTERESTING. IMPRESSIVE alone does not stand the test of time. The next fellow comes along and is taller than you, quicker, wealthier. IMPRESSIVE is based on relatives: better or worse. INTERESTING stands alone. When something is INTERESTING, time stops! This is the key!
zh: 哑剧手册@哑剧的艺术\n\n技术令人印象深刻，艺术性引人入胜。单凭“令人印象深刻”无法经受时间考验。总会有下一个人比你更高、更快、更富有。“令人印象深刻”依赖比较：更好或更差。“引人入胜”则独立存在。当某件事真正引人入胜时，时间会停止！这就是关键！

english: H.A.R.M. File: Archer profile@H.A.R.M. FILE 2317: Catherine Archer, Updated Profile\n\nArcher was born in 1942 to Lord William Archer and Catherine Anne MacDougal. Mother died from complications arising from childbirth. Lord Archer squandered his health and inheritance, taking his own life when Archer was 12. She spent time in an orphanage and a few foster homes before running away to London, where she became a notorious cat burglar known as The Fox. Recruited some years later by Bruno Lawrie to work for UNITY.
zh: H.A.R.M.档案：阿彻资料@H.A.R.M.档案2317：凯瑟琳·阿彻，更新版资料\n\n阿彻于1942年出生，父亲是威廉·阿彻勋爵，母亲是凯瑟琳·安妮·麦克杜格尔。母亲因分娩并发症去世。阿彻勋爵挥霍了健康和遗产，并在阿彻12岁时自杀。她曾待过孤儿院和几个寄养家庭，后来逃往伦敦，成为臭名昭著的猫盗“狐狸”。数年后被布鲁诺·劳里招募进入UNITY。
照片：马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗@

english:
H.A.R.M. File: Archer info@H.A.R.M. FILE 2345: Catherine Anne Archer (aka The Fox)

Height: 5 feet 8 inches
Eyes: Green
Hair: Brown
Nationality: Scottish
Last Confirmed Contact: Siberia
zh:
H.A.R.M.档案：阿彻信息@H.A.R.M.档案2345：凯瑟琳·安妮·阿彻（又名“狐狸”）

身高：5英尺8英寸
眼睛：绿色
头发：棕色
国籍：苏格兰
最后确认接触地点：西伯利亚

english:
H.A.R.M. File: Armstrong@H.A.R.M. FILE 1201: Magnus Armstrong

Height: 6 feet 3 inches
Eyes: Blue
Hair: Red
Nationality: Scottish
Last Confirmed Contact: England
zh:
H.A.R.M.档案：阿姆斯特朗@H.A.R.M.档案1201：马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗

身高：6英尺3英寸
眼睛：蓝色
头发：红色
国籍：苏格兰
最后确认接触地点：英格兰

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Sign-up@To: General Zhukov
From: Dr. Kussman
Re: Project Omega Monthly Update

General, we are ready to begin field testing next week, three weeks ahead of schedule. Have your comrades made a final decision regarding this once in a lifetime opportunity? Be advised there are other interested parties. Also, if you sign up within the next 48 hours, we'll throw in our extended 18 month warranty.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：尽快签约@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：库斯曼博士
主题：欧米伽计划月度更新

将军，我们已准备好下周开始实地测试，比计划提前三周。你的同志们是否已对这次千载难逢的机会作出最终决定？请注意，还有其他有意者。另外，如果在未来48小时内签约，我们将附赠18个月延长保修。

english:
Propaganda literature@PROJECT OMEGA AND YOU!

If you're like me, you've seen the Project: Omega status reports in the monthly newsletter and asked yourself, "What is Project: Omega, anyway?" Well, I can't tell you what it is (until you sign a non-disclosure agreement and submit to extensive psychological reprogramming), but I can tell you that Project: Omega is the key to H.A.R.M.'s future! And it needs your help! 

Sign up today at your local Human Resources Bureau and help pave the way to a glorious tomorrow.
zh:
宣传材料@欧米伽计划与你！

如果你和我一样，可能在每月通讯中看过欧米伽计划状态报告，并问自己：“欧米伽计划到底是什么？”好吧，我不能告诉你具体内容——至少要等你签署保密协议并接受全面心理重编程后才行——但我可以告诉你，欧米伽计划是H.A.R.M.未来的关键！而且它需要你的帮助！

今天就到当地人力资源局报名，为光荣的明天铺平道路。

english: H.A.R.M. File: Zhukov@H.A.R.M. FILE 6987: General Nikolai Zhukov\n\nReassigned to Siberia after a falling out with General Kopat in Petrograd. May have involved Zhukov's affair with Kopat's 18-year-old wife. Or 24-year-old daughter. Zhukov is the perfect target for Project: Omega, possessing the ideal combination of military rank and mental mediocrity to see the benefits of the project without taking into consideration its shortcomings.
zh: H.A.R.M.档案：朱可夫@H.A.R.M.档案6987：尼古拉·朱可夫将军\n\n在彼得格勒与科帕特将军闹翻后，被调往西伯利亚。原因可能是朱可夫与科帕特18岁的妻子，或24岁的女儿有染。朱可夫是欧米伽计划的理想目标：军衔足够高，智力又足够平庸，能够看到项目的好处，却不会考虑其缺点。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Broken doorknobs@To: Dr. Kussman
From: Maintenance

We regret we are unable to replace your broken doorknob as we are busy moving the explosives out of the maintenance shed.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：损坏的门把手@收件人：库斯曼博士
发件人：维修部门

很遗憾，我们目前无法更换损坏的门把手，因为正忙着把炸药从维修棚里搬出去。

english:
Invoice for chemicals@ACME Chemical Company

INVOICE #4023

Customer: Dr. Karl Kussman
Products: 400 liters of embalming fluid, 60 kilograms of sodium bicarbonate, 20 boxes of Red Hot Sugar Poppers.
zh:
化学品发票@ACME化学公司

发票编号4023

客户：卡尔·库斯曼博士
产品：防腐液400升、碳酸氢钠60千克、“火辣糖爆弹”20箱。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Schedule overruns@To: Dr. Kussman
From: The Director

I'm sure I don't need to point out that we are in peril of falling irremediably behind schedule, Doctor. Nor should I have to remind you that you personally signed off on this deadline. Interesting word, "deadline". Don't you think?

I want results, Dr. Kussman, and I want them on schedule and on budget. If we miss our ship date, we'll be slipping into the holiday season. If that happens, I won't have to kill you. The Marketing department will do it for me.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：进度超期@收件人：库斯曼博士
发件人：局长

博士，我想不用提醒你，我们正面临无法挽回地落后于进度的危险。也不必提醒你，这个截止期限是你亲自签字批准的。“截止期限”这个词很有意思，不是吗？

我要结果，库斯曼博士，而且必须按时、按预算交付。如果错过出货日期，就会拖进假日季。到那时不用我杀你，市场部会替我动手。
阿比盖尔·安德斯的照片@

english: Journal: Hotchkins@Journal of Melbert Hotchkins. Day 189.\n\nIn the past week, subject #42 (Anders, Joseph, Lt.) has become increasingly hostile. We've increased his dosage, but I fear we may have to give up on him. There is one other option, but it will require us to transport him to the underwater facility in the Aegean for reconditioning.
zh: 日记：霍奇金斯@梅尔伯特·霍奇金斯日记，第189天。\n\n过去一周，42号实验对象（约瑟夫·安德斯中尉）敌意日益增强。我们提高了剂量，但恐怕可能不得不放弃他。还有一个选择，不过需要把他运往爱琴海水下设施重新调教。

english:
H.A.R.M. File: Lt. Anders@H.A.R.M. FILE 6714: Lt. Joseph Anders

Collected from U.S. military base in Norway during Operation Press Gang. Has a wife, Marianne; a daughter, Abigail; and a terrier, Sparky. Distinguished military career with plenty of combat experience.

Notes: In terms of his professional background, he's the ideal candidate, but I'm concerned about his strong family ties. Monitor carefully.

Dr. Kussman
zh:
H.A.R.M.档案：安德斯中尉@H.A.R.M.档案6714：约瑟夫·安德斯中尉

在“强行征募行动”期间从挪威的美国军事基地捕获。妻子名叫玛丽安，女儿名叫阿比盖尔，还有一只叫斯帕基的梗犬。军旅履历出色，拥有丰富实战经验。

备注：从职业背景而言，他是理想候选人，但我担心他与家人的关系过于牢固。严密监视。

库斯曼博士

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Field Test@To: Dr. Kussman
From: The Director

The India branch has failed us. It seems that our favorite meddlesome super spy, Cate Archer, got inside their vault. We must accelerate the schedule. It's time the Super Soldiers had a field test, don't you think? I want the entire division en route to India before UNITY arrives at your facility. We must verify that the Super Soldiers are as invulnerable to damage as you promise.

And I don't want to hear any excuses about your so-called renegade lieutenant. If you can't control your own test subjects, I'll find a mad scientist who can.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：实地测试@收件人：库斯曼博士
发件人：局长

印度分部辜负了我们。看来我们最喜欢的那个多管闲事超级间谍凯特·阿彻闯进了他们的保险库。必须加快进度。该让超级士兵接受实地测试了，你不觉得吗？在UNITY抵达你们设施前，我要整个部队启程前往印度。我们必须确认超级士兵确如你承诺的那样刀枪不入。

另外，别再拿你所谓的叛逃中尉当借口。如果连自己的实验对象都控制不了，我会另找一个做得到的疯狂科学家。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Explosives@To: Maintenance
From: Dr. Kussman

Please arrange to have the demolition charges in Lab 2 moved to the maintenance shed at once. I shouldn't have to point out that it's a bad idea to store explosives in close proximity to where we're doing weapon tests. Perhaps you'd like to stow them under your cots instead?
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：炸药@收件人：维修部门
发件人：库斯曼博士

请立即安排将2号实验室的爆破炸药移至维修棚。我应该不用提醒你们，在进行武器测试的地方附近存放炸药是个糟糕主意。也许你们更愿意把它们塞到自己的床铺下面？

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Supplies@To: Dr. Kussman
From: Dmitrij Volkov, Director of Executive Action

Thank you for the lovely Get Well Soon card. It was very considerate in light of the fact that it was I who assassinated your uncle in Oslo all those years ago. I understand you and he were close.

As to the nature of my mishap, I was vacationing in Switzerland shortly after the demise of Baroness Dumas, our illustrious former Associate Director. While skiing in the Alps, I reached out to clout an unsuspecting child with my ski pole as I sped past and got tangled up with his sister. We plummeted off a hundred foot cliff into a small, pleasant café. Fortunately, she broke my fall.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：补给@收件人：库斯曼博士
发件人：执行行动局局长德米特里·沃尔科夫

感谢你那张漂亮的“早日康复”卡。考虑到多年前在奥斯陆刺杀你叔叔的人正是我，这实在很体贴。听说你们关系亲密。

至于我这次意外，是在我们尊贵的前副局长杜马斯男爵夫人去世后不久，我去瑞士度假。在阿尔卑斯山滑雪时，我高速经过一个毫无防备的孩子，伸手想用滑雪杖打他，却和他的妹妹缠在一起。我们从百英尺高的悬崖摔进一家小而舒适的咖啡馆。幸运的是，她替我垫了落地。

english:
Status report: Subject #42@INTERNAL STATUS REPORT
(Not for publication in monthly newsletter!)

Overall, results are highly satisfactory. We're almost two full weeks ahead of schedule. That said, we've also experienced an unfortunate setback. Subject #42, one of our two Lieutenants, is still showing signs of autonomy. Episodes have been escalating in frequency and aggression. Recommend full reconditioning at earliest opportunity. Project: Omega can't afford any rogues!
zh:
状态报告：42号实验对象@内部状态报告
（不得刊登在月度通讯中！）

总体而言，结果非常令人满意，进度几乎提前整整两周。不过也遭遇了一次不幸挫折。42号实验对象——两名中尉之一——仍表现出自主意识，发作频率与攻击性不断增加。建议尽快进行全面重新调教。欧米伽计划绝不允许出现失控者！

english:
Note: Punishment@To: All Personnel
From: Anoop Banerjee

Well, my friends, it seems the Director is venting his wrath upon us rather than those wretched mimes. While I am personally willing to admit my culpability in being duped by the spy, it was the Frenchman's fault that she escaped. Therefore, I have chosen to resign from H.A.R.M. and start a private security company. Those of you interested in a new career direction are welcome to join this exciting venture.
zh:
便条：惩罚@收件人：全体人员
发件人：阿努普·班纳吉

朋友们，看来局长正在把怒火发泄到我们身上，而不是那些可恶的哑剧演员。虽然我愿意承认自己被间谍欺骗应负责任，但她能逃走完全是那个法国人的错。因此，我决定辞去H.A.R.M.职务，创办一家私人安保公司。有兴趣转换职业方向的人，欢迎加入这项激动人心的新事业。

english:
UNITY Memo: Jones on leave@To: All Personnel
From: Mr. Jones

Bear in mind that I will be on vacation for three weeks starting this coming Monday. Bruno Lawrie will be Temporary Director of UNITY in my absence. Please afford him every courtesy. See you soon!
zh:
UNITY备忘录：琼斯休假@收件人：全体人员
发件人：琼斯先生

请记住，我将从下周一开始休假三周。在我缺席期间，布鲁诺·劳里将担任UNITY临时局长。请给予他应有的礼遇。回头见！

english:
Memo: Bruno's Plea@To: All Personnel
From: Bruno Lawrie, Temporary Director

I realize you all find it terribly humorous that I've been left in charge, but please, in the name of decency, resist the urge to address me as, "Your majesty," or worse yet, "Sire". I beg of you.
zh:
备忘录：布鲁诺的恳求@收件人：全体人员
发件人：临时局长布鲁诺·劳里

我知道大家都觉得由我负责此事非常好笑，但看在基本礼貌的分上，请克制住称呼我“陛下”，或者更糟糕的“吾王”的冲动。我求你们了。

english:
Letter: Gossip@Dear Emma,

Darling! How are you? It's no fun here since you left. I hear they fired that charming Mr. Goodman you had such a crush on. Terrible shame. Phyllis is still stuck with Bob. You'd think she'd at least dress him better! Well, back to filing. Keep in touch!

Tiffany
zh:
信件：闲话@亲爱的艾玛：

亲爱的！你好吗？你离开后这里一点意思都没有。听说他们解雇了那个迷人的古德曼先生，就是你暗恋的那个。真可惜。菲莉丝还和鲍勃困在一起，你会以为她至少能给他穿得体面一点！好了，我得回去整理文件了。保持联系！

蒂芙尼

english:
Note: Dr. Schenker hiding@Cate,

I am hiding.

Sincerely,
Dr. Schenker
zh:
便条：申克博士躲藏@凯特：

我正在躲藏。

谨致敬意
申克博士

english:
Report: SITREP@SITUATION REPORT
Project: Omega
Prepared by Isaac Barnes

UNITY agents have discovered the nature and objective of Project: Omega, which involves the invasion of Khios by means of virtually indestructible, chemically engineered Super Soldiers. Recovered documents indicate that the Soviets are planning some sort of Communist super casino, but we suspect their true aim is to exploit the island's precious natural resources. Clearly, this sort of forcible, military exploitation by the Soviets would interfere with the genial, manipulative exploitation planned by NATO. We must act quickly and decisively.
zh:
报告：态势报告@态势报告
欧米伽计划
编写人：艾萨克·巴恩斯

UNITY特工已查明欧米伽计划的性质与目标：利用几乎无法摧毁、经化学工程改造的超级士兵入侵希俄斯。取回的文件显示，苏联正计划建设某种共产主义超级赌场，不过我们怀疑他们真正目的是掠夺岛上宝贵的自然资源。显然，苏联这种强制性的军事掠夺会妨碍北约原本计划进行的亲切而操纵性的掠夺。我们必须迅速果断地行动。

english:
Memo: Bruno's Plea@To: All Personnel
From: Bruno Lawrie, Temporary Director

Perhaps I wasn't explicit enough in my previous request. I would be eternally grateful if you could abstain from using any artificially inflated form of address, including:

- My lord
- Your honor
- Your holiness
- My supreme commander

Thank you.
zh:
备忘录：布鲁诺的恳求@收件人：全体人员
发件人：临时局长布鲁诺·劳里

也许我之前说得不够明确。如果大家能避免使用任何人为夸大的称呼，我将永远感激，包括：

- 大人
- 阁下
- 圣座
- 最高统帅

谢谢。

english: Duty roster@DUTY ROSTER CHANGES\n\nPlease note that Frank's team is moving to day shifts this week. I guess that's what happens when you whine like a sissy about not getting enough sleep! Sheesh.
zh: 值勤表@值勤安排变更\n\n请注意，弗兰克的小队本周改上白班。我猜这就是像娘娘腔一样抱怨睡眠不足的结果！真是的。

english:
Manifest for new uniforms@Shipping Manifest

Four dozen H.A.R.M. uniforms (black and red). 

Please return the old uniforms to headquarters for recycling.
zh:
新制服货运清单@货运清单

H.A.R.M.制服四打（黑红配色）。

请将旧制服送回总部回收。

english:
Note: Secrecy@To: All Personnel
From: Commander Pim

As you know, the Super Secret Submarines are the key to Project: Omega's success. We must therefore observe a code of strictest secrecy regarding their existence and capabilities. Do not discuss them even with your wives or girlfriends. Loose lips sink ships, as they say.

Remember what H.A.R.M. stands for!
zh:
便条：保密@收件人：全体人员
发件人：皮姆指挥官

如各位所知，超级秘密潜艇是欧米伽计划成功的关键。因此，我们必须对它们的存在和能力执行最严格保密规定。即使面对妻子或女友也不得谈论。俗话说，嘴松船沉。

记住H.A.R.M.代表什么！

english:
Mission statement #1@To: All personnel
From: Megan O'Malledy, Morale Officer

Hi, everyone! As you know, we recently held a contest inviting all employees to submit ideas for the new H.A.R.M. Mission Statement. Thanks for all four of your entries! Unfortunately, there's only room for one Mission Statement on the H.A.R.M. emblem, so three of you are just plain out of luck. Here's the third place entry:

"Our mission is to proactively develop globally applicable expertise in order to build a sustainable results-oriented evil enterprise."
zh:
使命宣言1@收件人：全体人员
发件人：士气官梅根·奥马利迪

大家好！如各位所知，我们最近举办了新H.A.R.M.使命宣言征集比赛，感谢全部四份参赛作品！遗憾的是，H.A.R.M.徽章上只能放一条使命宣言，所以其中三位只能认倒霉。以下是第三名作品：

“我们的使命是积极开发可在全球应用的专业能力，从而建立可持续、以结果为导向的邪恶企业。”

english:
Letter: New uniforms@Hey Rodney,

Can you believe they finally listened to us grunts and got some decent uniforms? I hope they retake the company picture. When I get back can you hook me up with Margaret? She's hot!

Your pal, 
Nathan
zh:
信件：新制服@嘿，罗德尼：

真不敢相信他们终于听取我们这些小兵的意见，弄来了像样的制服！希望他们重新拍公司合照。我回来后，你能帮我约玛格丽特吗？她真性感！

你的朋友
内森

english:
Letter: Clark's proposal@Dear Martha,

I have lived in agony since that fateful day in Morocco. For months, I have mentally flagellated myself for my brash decision. Last month, I left my wife and defected from the Soviet Union to join an independent firm with better benefits and an excellent profit-sharing program. I miss you terribly and want us to be together again. Will you have me back?

Clark
zh:
信件：克拉克的求婚@亲爱的玛莎：

自从摩洛哥那个决定命运的日子以来，我一直生活在痛苦中。几个月来，我不断在心中鞭挞自己，后悔那个鲁莽决定。上个月，我离开妻子并叛逃苏联，加入一家福利更好、利润分成制度优秀的独立公司。我非常想念你，希望我们重新在一起。你愿意接受我回来吗？

克拉克

english:
Mission statement #2@To: All personnel
From: Megan O'Malledy, Morale Officer

Hello, folks! Here's the second place entry in the Mission Statement contest:

"Our aim is to enthusiastically explore new maintainable law-breaking paradigms in order to fully functionalize our evildoing opportunities and actualize our potential."
zh:
使命宣言2@收件人：全体人员
发件人：士气官梅根·奥马利迪

各位好！以下是使命宣言比赛的第二名作品：

“我们的目标是热情探索可持续的新型违法范式，以充分实现作恶机会的功能化，并兑现我们的潜力。”

english:
Mission statement #3@To: All personnel
From: Megan O'Malledy, Morale Officer

Hidy ho, fellow H.A.R.M. collaborators! I'm honored to present the new H.A.R.M. Mission Statement, submitted by Dmitrij Volkov, our illustrious Director of Executive Action:

"Our mission is to cause HARM! Don't forget it or I'll strangle you with your own severed tongue."

Very... succinct!
zh:
使命宣言3@收件人：全体人员
发件人：士气官梅根·奥马利迪

嗨，各位H.A.R.M.合作者！我很荣幸宣布新的H.A.R.M.使命宣言，由我们尊贵的执行行动局局长德米特里·沃尔科夫提交：

“我们的使命就是制造伤害！别忘了，否则我会用你被割下来的舌头勒死你。”

非常……简洁！

english:
Note: Letterhead@To: All Section Chiefs
From: Admin

The new H.A.R.M. letterhead has arrived! Supply will be picking up the old letterhead later this week for recycling.
zh:
便条：信纸@收件人：各部门主管
发件人：行政部

新的H.A.R.M.信纸已经送达！后勤部门将在本周晚些时候回收旧信纸。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Epsilon Cancellation@To: Professor Hibbard
From: Commander Pim

I understand you have filed a complaint with headquarters about the cancellation of Project: Epsilon. My dear Professor, you cannot possibly consider that mess salvageable. The last thing we need this close to Condition Omega is an overly ambitious, inadequately managed distraction like Epsilon draining our resources and undermining morale.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：取消伊普西隆计划@收件人：希巴德教授
发件人：皮姆指挥官

听说你就取消伊普西隆计划一事向总部提出了投诉。亲爱的教授，你不可能真认为那摊烂事还有挽救余地。如今距离欧米伽状态如此之近，我们最不需要的就是伊普西隆这种野心过大、管理不善的干扰项目继续消耗资源、打击士气。

english: Note: Robots on umbilicus@URGENT NOTICE!!!\n\nRobots are NOT to be deployed in the umbilicus under any circumstances. Their targeting systems aren't sophisticated enough to distinguish between enemy agents and large fish. I'm sure even the least imaginative of you can predict the consequences of robots shooting at passing sea creatures through the glass.
zh: 便条：脐带通道内的机器人@紧急通知！！！\n\n任何情况下都不得在脐带通道内部署机器人。它们的目标识别系统还不够先进，无法区分敌方特工和大型鱼类。即使你们当中最缺乏想象力的人，也该能预见机器人隔着玻璃向路过海洋生物开火会造成什么后果。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Subject #42@To: Dr. Hall
From: Dr. Kussman

Considering the enormous expense of developing a Super Soldier, I think the only rational course of action is to attempt a full reconditioning of Subject #42. My research indicates that additional exposures to the solution would tend to have a cumulative effect, so it's quite possible we can still salvage Lt. Anders. It's certainly worth a try!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：42号实验对象@收件人：霍尔博士
发件人：库斯曼博士

考虑到研发一名超级士兵所需的巨额成本，我认为唯一合理的做法，是尝试对42号实验对象进行全面重新调教。我的研究表明，继续接触这种溶液会产生累积效果，因此我们很可能仍能挽救安德斯中尉。绝对值得一试！

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Pods@To: Doctor Hall
From: Maintenance

We've installed the Test Subject Pods according to your specifications. We're going to be pretty busy this week because of the air conditioning meltdown, so be sure to let us know well in advance (meaning 24 hours, not 15 minutes) if you need alterations.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：培养舱@收件人：霍尔博士
发件人：维修部门

我们已经按照你的规格安装好实验对象培养舱。本周由于空调系统崩溃，我们会非常忙，所以需要改动时务必提前充分通知——意思是提前24小时，而不是15分钟。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Armstrong@To: All Personnel
From: Commander Pim

Please be advised that the Test Subject Area is off limits to anyone except Groundwork: Omega team members until further notice. We are currently host to two extremely dangerous individuals, but Dr. Hall assures us that they will be as docile as kittens by the end of the week.

Remember what H.A.R.M. stands for!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：阿姆斯特朗@收件人：全体人员
发件人：皮姆指挥官

请注意，即日起实验对象区域仅限“基础工程：欧米伽”小组成员进入。我们目前收容了两个极度危险的人物，但霍尔博士保证，他们到本周末就会温顺得像小猫。

记住H.A.R.M.代表什么！

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Inoperative Robot@To: Confucius Lee, Robotics Dept.
From: Commander Pim

Mr. Lee, I came across an inoperative robot on the crew deck this morning. It seemed to have shorted itself out by jamming a fork into an electrical outlet. Is this behavior normal?
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：失效机器人@收件人：机器人部门孔夫子·李
发件人：皮姆指挥官

李先生，今天早上我在船员甲板发现一台无法运作的机器人。它似乎把叉子插进电源插座，导致自己短路。这种行为正常吗？

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Robot Malfunction@To: Commander Pim
From: Confucius Lee, Robotics Dept.

Commander, as you recall, I was instructed to follow Security Chief Fenster's design specification explicitly, which I begrudgingly did. While Chief Fenster was very particular about making the robots invulnerable to small arms fire and even most explosive devices, he didn't think to insulate the circuitry. So they're highly susceptible to electricity. This isn't the first report of a robot suicide. Maybe it's because they weren't accepted for Project: Omega?
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：机器人故障@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：机器人部门孔夫子·李

指挥官，如你所记得，我奉命必须严格遵照安保主管芬斯特的设计规格，虽然我极不情愿，还是照做了。芬斯特主管十分重视让机器人免疫轻武器火力和大多数爆炸装置，却没想到给电路做绝缘处理。因此它们极易受到电流影响。这已经不是第一次收到机器人自杀报告。也许是因为它们没被欧米伽计划录用？

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Services Dept.@To: All Team Leaders
From: Commander Pim
Priority: TOP SECRET

This communiqué is to advise you of a meeting this Thursday to discuss the rapidly escalating situation with the Super Computer Services Department. We either need to completely overhaul the new requisition system or hire sixteen new service representatives to handle the workload. Given our already astronomical administrative overhead, staffing up that dramatically isn't really an option.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：服务部门@收件人：全体组长
发件人：皮姆指挥官
优先级：绝密

本公报通知各位，本周四将召开会议，讨论超级计算机服务部门迅速恶化的局势。我们要么彻底改革新的申请制度，要么增聘16名服务代表来处理工作量。考虑到行政开销已经高得离谱，如此大幅扩编并不现实。

english: Super Computer Manual@Super Computer User Manual, Supplement 18-G
zh: 超级计算机手册@《超级计算机用户手册》补充说明18-G

english: Note: Potty break@Taking a potty break. Back in 5 minutes.\n\nSpencer
zh: 便条：上厕所@去趟厕所，5分钟后回来。\n\n斯宾塞

english:
Catalogue request form@REQUISITION FORM 207-B

Product: Super Computer Services Manual
Item number: #349295-290948-2934/Z
How did you obtain this product number?
 (x) Super Computer Product Services Catalogue
 ( ) from a friend
 ( ) extortion
 ( ) made it up
zh:
目录申请表@207-B申请表

产品：《超级计算机服务手册》
