zh: 超级计算机服务产品目录@《超级计算机服务产品目录》。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Non-payment@To: General Zhukov
From: Erin Keyes, H.A.R.M. Comptroller

Please be advised that in the event of non-payment of the outstanding balance on your Super Soldier Solution Platinum Plus Package, priced at $1 million U.S. (plus $612.47 for shipping and handling), H.A.R.M. will be authorized to incite Condition Omega at the expense of the Soviet Union, according to the terms of the LOI. If you have already deposited this amount in an offshore account, please disregard this notice.

 H.A.R.M. looks forward to future illegal transactions with you!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：未付款@收件人：朱可夫将军
发件人：H.A.R.M.财务主管艾琳·凯斯

请注意，根据意向书条款，如果未支付“超级士兵溶液白金加强套餐”的欠款——价格为100万美元，另加612.47美元运费与手续费——H.A.R.M.将获准由苏联承担费用，发动欧米伽状态。如果你已将该款项存入离岸账户，请忽略本通知。

H.A.R.M.期待今后继续与你进行非法交易！

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Armstrong's fate@To: Commander Pim
From: The Office of the Director

The Director has decided on a most suitable punishment for Magnus Armstrong, whose moral ambivalence and nationalistic tendencies indirectly led to the dissolution of Project: Lambda and the destruction of the Dumas Alpine chateau. Because his loyalty has proven so inconstant, we shall reinforce it compulsorily... by turning him into a Super Soldier! Transfer him to the labs on sublevel 4 for immediate processing.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：阿姆斯特朗的命运@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：局长办公室

局长已经为马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗决定了一项最合适的惩罚。他道德立场摇摆不定，又有民族主义倾向，间接导致拉姆达计划解散和杜马斯高山庄园被毁。既然他的忠诚如此反复无常，我们就强制强化它……把他改造成超级士兵！立即将其转移到地下四层实验室进行处理。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Super Secret Submarine@To: Commander Pim
From: Captain Clayton

The maiden voyage of the Super Secret Submarine was an unmitigated success (except for a few leaks in the engine room and the fact that we lost power for 15 minutes for no apparent reason). I'm also happy to report that the radar tests far exceeded expectations. We were able to sneak up behind a U.S. warship and weld profanities onto her hull, which should cause an uproar next time she's in dry-dock.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：超级秘密潜艇@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：克莱顿船长

超级秘密潜艇的处女航取得了毫无保留的成功——除了机舱里有几处漏水，以及莫名其妙断电15分钟。我也很高兴报告，雷达测试结果远超预期。我们成功潜到一艘美国军舰后方，并把脏话焊在它的船体上。等它下次进干船坞时，肯定会引起轩然大波。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Private lounge@To: Commander Pim
From: The Director

Commander, my private lounge is strictly off limits, even to you. Before you stammer out a feeble denial, I had that empty champagne bottle checked for fingerprints. I'm sure you can guess whose they were. That lounge is my escape pod in the event of a base emergency, Commander. If I have to spend hours waiting to be rescued, I don't want to do so amidst someone else's detritus.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：私人休息室@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：局长

指挥官，我的私人休息室严格禁止任何人进入，包括你。在你结结巴巴地作出软弱否认前，我已经检查过那个空香槟瓶上的指纹。你应该能猜到是谁的。发生基地紧急情况时，那间休息室就是我的逃生舱。要是必须等待数小时才能获救，我可不想身边全是别人的垃圾。

english:
Letter: Epsilon rumor@Wes,

Have you heard the rumor about Epsilon? Better break out the resume! I heard M.A.L.A.D.Y. is hiring. Don't you know someone over there? I thought you could put in a good word for me.

James
zh:
信件：伊普西隆传闻@韦斯：

听说伊普西隆的传闻了吗？最好把简历找出来！我听说M.A.L.A.D.Y.正在招人。你不是认识那边的人吗？我想你可以替我美言几句。

詹姆斯

english:
Letter: Epsilon rumor untrue@James,

Don't be so gullible! Project: Epsilon is going to be a great success! Professor Hibbard assures me the rumors are untrue, and I believe him!

Wes
zh:
信件：伊普西隆传闻不实@詹姆斯：

别这么容易上当！伊普西隆计划一定会大获成功！希巴德教授向我保证传闻不是真的，我相信他！

韦斯

english:
Complaint form@H.A.R.M. EMPLOYEE COMPLAINT FORM
Reason for complaint: Employee bonding sessions.
Comments: Ever since this whole reorganization started, this outfit has been going downhill. First it was the uniforms. Then the logo. Then that whole trademark issue with Hair Alternative Replacement for Men or whatever it was called. Now we gotta get up at 6am for daily "bonding" sessions? Count me out!
Complaint filed by: Ha ha, nice try!
zh:
投诉表@H.A.R.M.员工投诉表
投诉理由：员工团建活动。
意见：自从这次所谓重组开始，整个组织就一路走下坡。先是制服，然后是标志，再后来又冒出那个叫“男性头发替代协会”还是什么的商标问题。现在每天早上6点还得起床参加“团建”活动？别算上我！
投诉人：哈哈，想得美！

english:
Maintenance Checklist@MAINTENANCE CHECKLIST:

 (x) Leaky Pipe Fittings
 (x) Fire hazards
 (x) Sub-standard storage of chemicals
 (x) Slippery walkways
zh:
维修检查表@维修检查表：

（x）管道接头漏水
（x）火灾隐患
（x）化学品存放不合标准
（x）通道湿滑

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Epsilon terminations@To: All Personnel
From: Commander Pim

The Project: Epsilon team has been terminated for gross incompetence. Note that you may see them floating outside portholes, so don't be alarmed.

Let this be a reminder that we need to do a better job of screening applicants!

Remember what H.A.R.M. stands for!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：解雇伊普西隆团队@收件人：全体人员
发件人：皮姆指挥官

伊普西隆计划团队因严重无能已被处决。你们可能会看到他们漂在舷窗外，请勿惊慌。

这也提醒我们，今后必须更认真地筛选应聘者！

记住H.A.R.M.代表什么！

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Our American friend@To: Commander Pim
From: The Director

According to our zealous American friend, the U.S. is extremely eager to incite a nuclear war at the earliest possible juncture. Only a motive is lacking. He greeted our modest proposal with great delight. I think we've found the ideal ally.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：我们的美国朋友@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：局长

据我们那位热情的美国朋友所说，美国极其渴望尽早挑起核战争，现在只缺一个动机。他对我们这份小小提案欣喜若狂。我想我们已经找到了理想盟友。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Robots@To: Confucius Lee
From: Hugo Madmiller

Sir, I'm at the end of my rope. Every time somebody has a problem with one of these stupid robots, I get lectured. Today, I had to listen to Keith Stevens tell me about the robots he designed when he was working at Murderlicious. I tried telling him we didn't design the robots, but he just kept pushing me. I wanted to sock him right in the mouth.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：机器人@收件人：孔夫子·李
发件人：雨果·马德米勒

先生，我已经忍无可忍了。每次这些蠢机器人出问题，都会有人来教训我。今天我还得听基思·史蒂文斯讲他在“美味谋杀公司”工作时设计过的机器人。我告诉他这些机器人不是我们设计的，可他还是咄咄逼人。我真想一拳打在他嘴上。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Robots@To: J.P. Fenster, Security Chief
From: Confucius Lee, Robotics Dept.

I've started forwarding complaints about the Super Robots to the Office of the Director, along with your original design specifications. I think you'll find that your pathetic conspiracy to indict me for the Robots' shortcomings doesn't hold up to scrutiny. Before you submit your next spec (assuming you live that long), maybe you should MEASURE THE BULKHEADS TO MAKE SURE THE ROBOTS CAN FIT THROUGH, IDIOT!!!
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：机器人@收件人：安保主管J.P.芬斯特
发件人：机器人部门孔夫子·李

我已经开始把有关超级机器人的投诉连同你最初的设计规格，一并转交局长办公室。我想你会发现，你那套企图把机器人缺陷全推到我头上的可悲阴谋，经不起审查。下次提交设计规格前——假设你还能活到那时候——也许应该先量一下舱壁，确认机器人能不能通过，你这个白痴！！！

english:
Letter: Rumor?@Bill,

Is it true what happened in India? And now Epsilon? What this outfit needs is a union!

Rhett
zh:
信件：传闻？@比尔：

印度发生的事是真的吗？现在连伊普西隆也完了？这个组织需要工会！

雷特

english: Note: Robots and water@ATTENTION ALL PERSONNEL:\n\nThanks to Security Chief Fenster's shrewd design specifications, the Super Robots will malfunction at about 60 percent humidity. I probably don't have to point out, therefore, that direct contact with water is a VERY BAD IDEA. Keep Robots away from damp areas.
zh: 便条：机器人与水@全体人员注意：\n\n多亏安保主管芬斯特英明的设计规格，超级机器人在湿度约60%时就会发生故障。因此我大概不必指出，直接接触水是极其糟糕的主意。请让机器人远离潮湿区域。

english:
Letter: Martha's answer@Clark,

Mother forwarded your letter to me. You must take me for a fool. Return to you? After the way you abandoned me in Morocco? I was devastated, Clark. I wandered in the desert for weeks, delirious with grief, until Berber nomads found me on the verge of starvation near Merzouga. Clark, I fell in love with the desert. The void left in my heart by your lies and deception has been filled by reverence for the great Sahara. It's more of a companion than you ever were.

Martha
zh:
信件：玛莎的答复@克拉克：

母亲把你的信转给了我。你一定把我当成傻瓜。回到你身边？在你把我抛弃在摩洛哥以后？我当时彻底崩溃了，悲痛得神志不清，在沙漠里游荡了数周，直到柏柏尔游牧民在梅尔祖卡附近发现了濒临饿死的我。克拉克，我爱上了沙漠。你的谎言和欺骗在我心中留下的空洞，已经被我对伟大撒哈拉的敬畏填满。它比你更像一个伴侣。

玛莎

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: CT-180@To: Commander Pim
From: Crewman Miller

I am unable to finish my analysis of the UNITY CT-180. I seem to have glued the ammo casing to my desk. Maintenance has been notified and I hope to be up and running again by tomorrow.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：CT-180@收件人：皮姆指挥官
发件人：船员米勒

我无法完成对UNITY CT-180的分析。我似乎把弹药壳粘在了桌子上。已经通知维修部门，希望明天能恢复工作。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Magnus Armstrong@To: Security
From: Commander Pim

The Director will be arriving later today. He'll probably want to gloat over Armstrong, so make sure to have a security detail standing by. We don't want any unfortunate accidents.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：马格努斯·阿姆斯特朗@收件人：安保部门
发件人：皮姆指挥官

局长今天晚些时候会到。他大概想去当面嘲讽阿姆斯特朗，所以安排一支安保小队待命。我们不希望发生任何不幸事故。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Positive thinking@To: All personnel
From: Megan O'Malledy, Morale Officer

I realize that we're in a mean, hurtful industry that prides itself on causing destruction and misery, but that's no excuse for negativity. I've been hearing a lot of grumbling lately. I know some of you didn't like the uniforms I designed. Or the new logo. That's fine, really. My feelings aren't hurt. I just put on my happy face and everything is A-OK. When people throw me a frown, I catch it and turn it upside down. You heartless bastards. I hope you all rot in hell.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：积极思考@收件人：全体人员
发件人：士气官梅根·奥马利迪

我知道我们身处一个刻薄伤人、以制造毁灭和痛苦为荣的行业，但这不能成为消极的借口。最近我听到了很多抱怨。我知道有人不喜欢我设计的制服，或者新标志。没关系，真的，我没有受伤。我只要摆出开心的表情，一切都会好起来。别人给我一张苦脸，我就把它接住再倒过来。你们这些没心没肺的混蛋。我希望你们全都下地狱腐烂。

english: Last Will and Testament@Last Will and Testament\n\nI, Frank J. Thompson, being of sound mind and body, do hereby bequeath my car and my comic book collection to my nephew, Chuck. The $5,000 in cash under my mattress goes to Mom to cover my rent for last year. Sorry it's so late, Ma. To my useless brother Larry, I leave NOTHING! On second thought, Lar, I leave you this piece of advice: get yourself a life, 'cause you ain't getting what's left over from mine!
zh: 遗嘱@遗嘱\n\n本人弗兰克·J·汤普森，神志清醒、身体健康，特此将汽车和漫画书收藏留给侄子查克。床垫下的5,000美元现金留给母亲，用来支付我去年欠的房租。抱歉这么晚才给你，妈。至于我那没用的弟弟拉里，我什么都不留！再想想，拉尔，我还是留给你一句忠告：去过点自己的生活吧，因为你别想继承我剩下的人生！

情书@弗雷德：

我一直爱着你。

戈登

english:
Letter: Uncle Winston@Dear Eustace,

I haven't been able to reach you on the phone since yesterday afternoon, so I'm forced to write instead. I spoke with Uncle Winston today. He's feeling much better after passing the kidney stone. The doctor said it was as big as the Hope Diamond. I'm sure he'd appreciate a call from his favorite nephew, but I suppose that's too much to ask.

Your Mother
zh:
信件：温斯顿舅舅@亲爱的尤斯塔斯：

从昨天下午开始我就一直打不通你的电话，只好改写信。今天我和温斯顿舅舅谈过，他排出肾结石后感觉好多了。医生说那颗石头有“希望钻石”那么大。我相信他会很高兴接到最喜爱侄子的电话，不过我想这要求也许太过分了。

你的母亲

english:
Letter: Felicia Pullbutter@Dear Eustace,

I ran into Shirley Pullbutter at the Club last night. She had some VERY intriguing news about Felicia. It seems her husband, that dreadful boor from Edinburgh, hung himself in the cellar last month, which means Felicia's single again! I know you've always found her rather homely, but you haven't seen her since the electrolysis and dental surgery. Her sideburns are much less prominent and she can even get her mouth most of the way closed.

Your Mother
zh:
信件：费莉西亚·普尔巴特@亲爱的尤斯塔斯：

昨晚我在俱乐部遇见雪莉·普尔巴特，她告诉了我一些关于费莉西亚的非常有趣的消息。她的丈夫——那个来自爱丁堡、粗俗得要命的家伙——上个月在地窖上吊了，这意味着费莉西亚又恢复单身！我知道你一直觉得她不太漂亮，不过自从脱毛和牙科手术后，你还没见过她。她的鬓角已经没那么明显，嘴巴甚至大部分时候都能闭上了。

你的母亲

english:
Note: Man-Handler operation@ALL PERSONNEL

Make sure the Man-Handler has had ample time to warm up before operating or its contents may spontaneously reflux. Last week's incident took several days to clean up.

A service technician has been called, but please show some consideration in the meantime.
zh:
便条：辣手摧花机操作@全体人员

操作前务必让“辣手摧花机”充分预热，否则内部物可能会自发倒流。上周事故花了好几天才清理干净。

我们已联系维修技师，在此期间请多加体谅。

english:
H.A.R.M. Document: PR plan page 1@CONFIDENTIAL - Director's Eyes Only

Re: Revised PR Plan: Print

Starting in May, we'll be running full page ads in Criminality Monthly and Maximum Villain Magazine. We've also got gun-point interviews scheduled for several European newspapers, as well as a batch of death threats and extortion letters for the U.S. press.

We'll be submitting our Radio and Television PR schedules separately.
zh:
H.A.R.M.文件：公关计划第1页@机密——仅限局长阅览

主题：修订版公关计划：印刷媒体

从五月开始，我们将在《犯罪月刊》和《终极恶棍》杂志刊登整版广告。我们还安排了几家欧洲报纸的枪口采访，以及一批发给美国媒体的死亡威胁和勒索信。

广播与电视公关日程将另行提交。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Hygiene@To: Human Resources
From: Associate Commander Saperstein

Henchman Frankel's body odor is beginning to affect morale. I've had two men inquiring about transfers in the past three days.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：卫生问题@收件人：人力资源部
发件人：副指挥官萨珀斯坦

手下弗兰克尔的体味开始影响士气。过去三天已经有两个人来询问调职。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Hygiene@To: All employees
From: Human Resources

Starting next Tuesday, we have arranged for mandatory laundry service for all secret lair henchman. Drop laundry in cavern D by 9am. Failure to comply will result in a 50 percent salary penalty for the week. Please consider your colleagues' comfort and welfare and remember that we work in a poorly ventilated subterranean environment. Thank you for your assistance.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：卫生问题@收件人：全体员工
发件人：人力资源部

从下周二开始，所有秘密巢穴手下都必须使用强制洗衣服务。请在上午9点前把衣物送到D洞穴。不遵守者当周工资扣除50%。请考虑同事的舒适与福祉，并记住我们的工作环境是通风不良的地下区域。感谢配合。

english:
H.A.R.M. Document: PR plan page 2@CONFIDENTIAL - Director's Eyes Only

Re: Revised PR Plan: Radio

Our radio schedule is a little lighter than last year, but we've got a couple of exciting events planned. First is a guest appearance we've arranged for you on the Mark Mulroy talk radio show. You'll need to bring along a firearm to get a word in edgewise, but it should be good exposure. Also, we just acquired K.H.R.M. radio station in Anaheim. The new format will be surf music with subliminal messages.
zh:
H.A.R.M.文件：公关计划第2页@机密——仅限局长阅览

主题：修订版公关计划：广播

今年的广播安排比去年略少，不过我们策划了几个令人兴奋的活动。首先，我们为你安排了马克·穆尔罗伊谈话广播节目的嘉宾席。想插上话，你得带把枪，但应该能获得不错曝光。另外，我们刚收购了阿纳海姆的K.H.R.M.电台，新节目格式将是冲浪音乐配潜意识信息。

english:
H.A.R.M. Document: PR plan page 3@CONFIDENTIAL - Director's Eyes Only

Re: Revised PR Plan: Television

Television once again forms the bedrock of our PR efforts. This coming quarter alone, we've lined up five morning, seven prime time, and two late night interruptions of broadcasting service to deliver Doomsday messages. We also think we might have finagled an appearance for you on The Tonight Show, including five full minutes for your stand-up routine.
zh:
H.A.R.M.文件：公关计划第3页@机密——仅限局长阅览

主题：修订版公关计划：电视

电视再次构成我们公关工作的基础。仅下一季度，我们就安排了五次晨间、七次黄金时段和两次深夜中断广播，用来发布末日宣言。我们还认为可能替你争取到《今夜秀》出场机会，其中包括整整五分钟的单口喜剧表演。

english:
Letter: Reclusiveness@Dear Eustace,

Please don't tell me you're slipping into another one of your reclusive phases. I can't stand you when you're emotionally unavailable. It's times like these I think I'd have been better off getting myself a sheepdog than bearing a son. Dogs are stupid and unhygienic, but at least they show some appreciation.

Your Mother

P.S. Aunt Phyllis sends her love.
zh:
信件：离群索居@亲爱的尤斯塔斯：

别告诉我你又进入了离群索居的阶段。你封闭感情时，我实在无法忍受。有时我真觉得，与其生个儿子，还不如养条牧羊犬。狗又蠢又不讲卫生，但至少懂得感恩。

你的母亲

附言：菲莉丝姨妈向你问好。

english:
Invasion plan, part I@Khios Invasion Plan

We have completed our tactical analysis of the Khios situation and have determined the following:

Part I. Arrival
There is only one way onto the island by sea: Through a cave that climbs from a tiny beach on the western coast to the cliffs above. It's a treacherous route, but with the Super Soldiers advancing ahead of us, we will slice through any defenses we encounter. The Super Secret Submarine should be able to pull right up alongside the beach for easy disembarkation.
zh:
入侵计划，第1部分@希俄斯入侵计划

我们已经完成对希俄斯局势的战术分析，并得出以下结论：

第1部分：登陆
从海上进入岛屿只有一条路：穿过西海岸小海滩上的洞穴，向上攀登至悬崖。路线十分危险，但只要超级士兵在前方推进，我们就能突破遇到的一切防御。超级秘密潜艇应该可以直接靠到海滩旁，方便登陆。

english:
Invasion plan, part II@Khios Invasion Plan

Part II. Attack
Historically, the inhabitants of Khios have been able to rely on the overwhelming tactical advantage afforded by the island's unforgiving terrain. No conventional invasion force has ever come close to making the long, treacherous climb from the shore. All the defenders have to do is pour some boiling oil down the stairwell and the assault is over. Our Super Soldiers will render any such tactics useless and allow us to quickly crush any organized resistance.
zh:
入侵计划，第2部分@希俄斯入侵计划

第2部分：进攻
历史上，希俄斯居民一直依靠岛上险恶地形带来的压倒性战术优势。任何常规入侵部队都无法完成从海岸开始的漫长危险攀登。守军只需沿楼梯倒些沸油，进攻就会结束。我们的超级士兵将使这种战术完全失效，让我们迅速粉碎任何有组织抵抗。

english:
Invasion plan, part III@Khios Invasion Plan

Part III. Occupation
Once the island has been secured, we will begin Operation Occupation Nation Emancipation Initiation. Phase One starts with a thorough inventory of the island's surviving residents, followed by Phase Two, in which we sell them all to a pharmaceutical company for medical experimentation. For Phase Three, we'll issue a statement to the international press announcing the establishment of the H.A.R.M. Happy Adventure Theme Park Island.
zh:
入侵计划，第3部分@希俄斯入侵计划

第3部分：占领
控制岛屿后，我们将启动“占领国家解放启动行动”。第一阶段是全面清点岛上幸存居民；第二阶段把他们全部卖给制药公司进行医学实验；第三阶段向国际媒体发表声明，宣布成立“H.A.R.M.欢乐冒险主题公园岛”。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Assassins@To: Dmitrij Volkov
From: The Director

Well, your mime solution was every bit as much of a fiasco as I predicted. Not that Isako was any better. I'm starting to question her value to the organization. We should have brought in the Australian.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：刺客@收件人：德米特里·沃尔科夫
发件人：局长

你的哑剧演员方案果然像我预测的一样彻底失败。伊沙子也没好到哪里去，我开始怀疑她对组织还有多少价值。我们当初应该把那个澳大利亚人请来。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Surprise visit@To: Associate Commander Gudmundson
From: Carly Isadora Tehore, Activities Coordinator

CODE RED ALERT

I just got off the phone with the Director's mother. She's planning a surprise visit from next week until sometime in October and wants me to prepare the guest house for her. I offered to book her tickets for her, but she said she doesn't want to end up in Burma this time. What should I do?
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：突然来访@收件人：副指挥官古德蒙松
发件人：活动协调员卡莉·伊莎多拉·特霍尔

红色警报

我刚和局长的母亲通完电话。她计划从下周开始突然来访，一直住到十月某个时候，还要我准备好客房。我主动提出替她订票，但她说这次不想再被送到缅甸。我该怎么办？

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Director's Mother@To: Carly Isadora Tehore, Activities Coordinator
From: Associate Commander Gudmundson

There's no need for panic. We have contingency plans for emergencies such as this. According to my records, we averted the last visit with Excuse 47: Company Holiday in East Detroit. This time I think we're going to need to skip down to Excuse 66: Quarantine Due to Outbreak of Scarlet Fever.
zh:
H.A.R.M.备忘录：局长的母亲@收件人：活动协调员卡莉·伊莎多拉·特霍尔
发件人：副指挥官古德蒙松

不必惊慌，我们有应对此类紧急情况的预案。记录显示，上次来访是用47号借口“公司在东底特律度假”成功阻止的。这次我想得直接跳到66号借口：“猩红热疫情导致隔离”。

english:
Memo: Anti-Super Soldier Serum@Dear Cate,

You can equip these Anti-Super Soldier Serum capsules in your CT-180 Utility Launcher. Unfortunately, it isn't concentrated enough to destroy an active target, but you can knock Super Soldiers out temporarily by inflicting enough damage. Shoot them with the serum while they are powered down. Be quick or they'll recover and you'll have to knock them out again!

Sincerely,
Dr. Schenker
zh:
备忘录：抗超级士兵血清@亲爱的凯特：

你可以把这些抗超级士兵血清胶囊装入CT-180 多功能发射器。遗憾的是，浓度不足以直接消灭仍在活动的目标，不过造成足够伤害后，可以暂时击昏超级士兵。趁他们失去动力时用血清射击。动作要快，否则他们会恢复，你就得再次将其击昏！

谨致敬意
申克博士

english:
Letter: Apartment keys@Dearest Phoolwati,

I pray to blessed Kaamdhenu Vidya, the sacred cow, that you will meet me again. I left the keys to the apartment in the usual place. How I am longing to see you!

Love, Balaji
zh:
信件：公寓钥匙@最亲爱的普尔瓦蒂：

我向神圣母牛迦摩度奴·维迪亚祈祷，希望你还会再与我见面。我把公寓钥匙留在老地方了。我多么渴望见到你！

爱你的，巴拉吉

english:
Letter: Flowers@Balaji dear,

How I have missed you, my sweet! Will you meet me later at my apartment? I'm cooking lamb tika masala with mint chutney.

Phoolwati

P.S. Please don't pick flowers for me from my planter box downstairs. I appreciate the sentiment, but my lovely white carnations won't flourish if they're constantly molested.
zh:
信件：鲜花@亲爱的巴拉吉：

亲爱的，我太想你了！稍后能来我的公寓见面吗？我正在做羊肉提卡玛萨拉配薄荷酸辣酱。

普尔瓦蒂

附言：请不要从楼下花箱里摘花送给我。我很感激你的心意，但如果总被糟蹋，我那些漂亮的白色康乃馨就长不好了。

english:
H.A.R.M. Memo: Prisoners@To: Dr. Kussman

The Director has asked that all prisoners be transferred to our underwater facility in the Aegean Sea. Please contact HR for specific details.
zh:

zh: 摧毁超级秘密潜艇，获得%1!d!点技能点！

english: %1!d! skill points awarded for defeating a Super Soldier!
zh: 击败一名超级士兵，获得%1!d!点技能点！

english: You won't be so happy when I sound the alarm!
zh: 等我拉响警报，你就高兴不起来了！

english: Time to sound the alarm, I think!
Somebody's here and we didn't invite them!
Quit loafing and help me search!

zh: 你看到什么可疑的东西了吗？

english: Be wary of danger, my friend!
These odds are not in my favor!

zh: 我要被烧死了！啊啊啊啊！

english: How would you like your death served!?
I've got you now, you meddling pest!
zh: 这下抓到你了，你这个多管闲事的害虫！

english: How about some pain, my friend?
zh: 朋友，来尝点苦头怎么样？

english: What is this I'm stuck in?
I'm not taking the blame for this.
That is the sound of trouble!
You're messing with the wrong person!
I look forward to killing you!
Don't think you can escape so easily!
zh: 别以为能这么轻易逃掉！

english: Don't think the darkness will hide you!
I'll just turn on the lights.
Why must I be punished be fate?
zh: 为什么命运非要惩罚我？
我就在你后面，你这个白痴！

english: Why am I made to suffer!?!
You can't hide from me, my friend.
I know you're around here somewhere!
I'll find you! This I promise!
This is no place for sleeping!
Keep your eyes open, my friend.
This is no time for goofing off!
zh: 现在可不是偷懒的时候！

english: I'll teach you a thing or two!
Just you wait till my friends get here!
zh: 等我朋友来了你就知道了！

english: I have some punishment for you!
This is not at all comfortable!
I seem to have stepped in something!
Hi, kitty! Would you like me to pet you?
zh: 嗨，小猫！想让我摸摸你吗？

english: Your untimely demise isn't MY fault.
zh: 你这么早死可不是我的错。

english: I refuse to be blamed for your incompetence.
zh: 我拒绝为你的无能负责。

english: What the boss doesn't know won't hurt him.
You've made a big mistake, my friend!
Don't think I didn't hear you!
You can't fool me, you know!
I don't like what I'm seeing!
Blood is leaking out of me!
I'll find you. This I promise!
What a slippery little person you are!
If I find you, you're in very, very big trouble!
zh: 等我找到你，你就有大麻烦了！

english: This is no time for lying down!
zh: 现在可不是躺下的时候！

english: Hurry! We got us a spy!
Get over here and take what's coming to ya!!!
Bend over and kiss your sweet potatoes goodbye!
zh: 弯下腰，和你的小命说再见吧！

english: Like I'm supposed to be scared of you?!?
I'm not falling for that again.
Wait'll I get my hands on you!
Somebody help me out of this thing!
zh: 谁来把我从这东西里弄出去！
这是什么黏糊糊的东西？

english: Hi, kitty! Oh, ain't you cute!
I ain't taking the blame for this!
This stuff sure comes in handy.
I don't like the looks of this.
Looks like we got an intruder!
Huh. Looks like we got some spy spoor.
zh: 嗯，看来有间谍留下的踪迹。

english: Footprints, eh? Let's just see where they go.
zh: 脚印？让我看看通向哪里。

english: Where the heck did you go?
I think something's wrong around here.
zh: 我觉得这里有些不对劲。
逮捕所有看起来可疑的人！

english: Stay where I can see you!
How did this happen to you?
This is for your own good!
I have some justice for you!
You've said that one too many times.
Don't try to run from me!
You're under arrest, I tell you!
I seem to be having difficulties.
I'm just going to rest for a moment.
Come out with your hands up!
No sign of that criminal anywhere.
zh: 到处都没有那个罪犯的踪影。

english: I can see you are afraid!
You shall die like a little piggy!
I grow weary of your games.

zh: 你一直惊慌失措，真让人厌烦。

english: It's hopeless for you, mon ami!
Perhaps I'll just rest my eyes.
No, please! I'll be good from now on!
zh: 不，求你了！我以后会听话的！

english: Don't think you can evade me!
I'll find you! This I vow!
You can't fool me! I'm a mime, you know!
zh: 你骗不了我！别忘了，我可是哑剧演员！

english: I have been disrobed of my weapon!
What has become of my weapon?
This way! Where did you go?
That spy will pay for this!
zh: 那个间谍会为此付出代价！

english: You won't get away from me!

zh: 快！到处都是资本主义间谍！

english: I'll feed you to the wolves!

zh: 我会享受杀死你的过程！
一座无名坟墓正等着你！

english: You should lay off the vodka, comrade. It makes you paranoid.
zh: 同志，你该少喝点伏特加，它让你疑神疑鬼。
去死吧，你这腐朽的猪猡！

english: Help me get this thing off!
I'm not filling out the paperwork.
Sorry, Comrade, but there's less red tape this way.
zh: 抱歉，同志，但这样能少走些官僚程序。

english: I don't like the way this looks!
Hm, footprints? Where do they go?
Did a spy come this way? I'd better follow these footprints.
zh: 有间谍从这里经过吗？我最好沿着脚印追踪。
我闻得到你身上的腐朽气息！

english: I'll find you, you miserable spy!
zh: 我会找到你的，你这个可恶的间谍！
没有间谍能逃出我的手掌心。

english: What's going on with the lights?
A greedy Capitalist spy stole my weapon!
zh: 一个贪婪的资本主义间谍偷了我的武器！

english: Don't make me hunt you down.
You can run, but you can't hide!
Say hello to Bruno for me.
I'm going to enjoy watching you die.
zh: 我会好好欣赏你死去的样子。

english: You're lucky I'm in this chair.
zh: 算你走运，我现在坐在这张椅子上。

english: I'm going to mount your head on my wall.
zh: 我要把你的脑袋挂在墙上。
别朝这只该死的鸟开枪。

english: Oh, target practice with the bird. Very, very funny.
zh: 哦，拿这只鸟练枪法是吧？真是太、太好笑了。

english: Shooting the bird is a waste of money. This is an expensive bird!
zh: 朝这只鸟开枪纯属浪费钱，它可是很贵的！

english: I and the bird are here to help you. Don't shoot us!
zh: 我和这只鸟是来帮你的，别朝我们开枪！

english: Oh, so glad you could find it in your heart to shoot the bloody bird.
zh: 哦，真高兴你终于狠下心，朝这只该死的鸟开枪了。

english: Adds black bars to the sides of your screen to help hide imperfections during cinematics.
zh: 在屏幕两侧添加黑边，以遮挡过场动画中的画面瑕疵。

english: Adjust experimental gameplay options that MAY break the game, but are otherwise neat!
zh: 调整可能导致游戏故障、但颇具趣味的实验性游戏选项！

english: Determines how far you need to move the analog stick/trigger before the input is recorded in-game.
zh: 决定摇杆或扳机键移动多远后，游戏才会识别输入。

english: Horizontal Field of View (Equivalent to %1!s! when corrected for aspect ratio.)
zh: 水平视野（按宽高比校正后相当于%1!s!）

english: Keep the game running when it's minimized.
zh: 游戏最小化后仍继续运行

english: Launch a web browser to Modernizer's download page to check for updates.
zh: 启动网页浏览器并打开Modernizer下载页面以检查更新

english: NOLF 2 has some issues above 60 fps, and may soft-lock the game.
zh: 《无人永生2》在超过60 FPS时存在一些问题，可能导致游戏软锁死

english: Set the sensitivity of the view analog stick
zh: 设置视角摇杆的灵敏度

english: Speeds up the analog stick the longer you hold it in a direction.
zh: 沿某方向按住摇杆越久，摇杆响应速度越快

english: This cut feature may cause corpses to clip through the world and become unreachable.
zh: 此项被删减的功能可能导致尸体穿过场景并变得无法触及

english: Toggle anti-aliasing (There may be small visual bugs!)
zh: 启用或禁用抗锯齿（可能会出现轻微画面问题！）
